---
title: "Interactions between mechanisms of reproductive isolation"
output:
  html_document: 
    toc: yes
    number_sections: yes
---



This is the analysis file corresponding to the manuscript “Interactions between mechanisms of reproductive isolation”. It was conducted using the following R version:
```{r R version}
print(R.version$version.string)
```


Load packages and function files
```{r load package and function files}
# load packages 
library(ggplot2)
print(paste(c("ggplot version ", as.character(packageVersion("ggplot2"))),collapse=""))
library(cowplot)
print(paste(c("cowplot version ", as.character(packageVersion("cowplot"))),collapse=""))
library(knitr)
print(paste(c("knitr version ", as.character(packageVersion("knitr"))),collapse=""))
library(fields)
print(paste(c("fields version ", as.character(packageVersion("fields"))),collapse=""))
#load function files
source("./functions_24.R")
```

This file requires mostly the file with the simulations metrics (poooled otgether in the "all_data_summary.csv" file), but in some instances, the file(s) containing the whole population itself are required. These sections of code are wrapped in a if condition and depend on a Boolean called "hasPopFile". Per default, hasPopFile=FALSE.  
In the second part, the analysis mostly relies on the mean metrics of sojourn time (provided in the "summary_assay.csv" file). But in some instances, the raw invasion files are required. These sections are wrapped in a if condition and depend on a Boolean called "hasRawAssayFile". Per default, hasRawAssayFile=FALSE.

```{r}
hasPopFile=FALSE
hasRawAssayFile=FALSE
```


# Properties of the mutations 
Load the mutations files map for the default case, and generate the map and attached distribution, displaying: 
1) the distribution of mutational effects per linkage block,
2) the mean (blue) and range of phenotype (orange and red) reachable per linkage blocks using all mutations (dots) or only mutations not involved in the DMIs (square)
3) the matrix of DMIs within and between linkage blocks
4) the distribution of the effect of single and double mutations at the environment optimum
5) the map of DMIs
```{r checking mutations properties for different scenarios, warning=FALSE}
#pdf("Figure/different_maps.pdf",width=8,height=6)
mut_info=display_dmi_map_v2("example/mutations_500L_1D_var0d05_50DMI.txt",5,5) # Default map
#dev.off()
```

Figure S27
```{r computing the mutational bias for the default genetic architecture, warning=FALSE}
#pdf("Figure/mut_bias.pdf",width=8,height=6)
mut_info=mutational_bias("example/mutations_500L_1D_var0d05_50DMI.txt",5,2)
mut_info=mutational_bias("example/mutations_500L_1D_var0d05_50DMI.txt",5,5)
mut_info=mutational_bias("example/mutations_500L_1D_var0d05_50DMI.txt",5,8)# Default map
#dev.off()
```

Figure S1
```{r preference function, warning=FALSE}

data_mc_profil=cbind(seq(0,12,0.1),cbind(rep(0.1,121),exp(log(0.1)*seq(0,12,0.1)^2/100)))

data_mc_profil=rbind(data_mc_profil,cbind(seq(0,12,0.1),cbind(rep(0.01,121),exp(log(0.01)*seq(0,12,0.1)^2/100))))

data_mc_profil=rbind(data_mc_profil,cbind(seq(0,12,0.1),cbind(rep(0.001,121),exp(log(0.001)*seq(0,12,0.1)^2/100))))

#pdf("Figure/example_pref.pdf",width=6,height=4)
ggplot(as.data.frame(data_mc_profil),aes(x=V1,y=V3,col=as.factor(V2)))+geom_line()+theme_bw()+theme(legend.position = c(.9,.85))+labs(col="Choosiness",x="Squared distance",y="P(mnating acceptance)")
#dev.off()
```

# Distribution phenotypes
Distribution of phenotypes, within a population, for the two life cycles (juvenile dispersal; mig-sel - or adult dispersal; sel-mig) and all 10 replicates for males and females (default parameters). 

For m=0.05, we display:
1) the distribution per replicate and per sex, with color indicating the frequency of the phenotype in population A
2) the distribution of phenotype for population A per replicate (each in a different color)
Figure S2B
```{r dist pheno default, fig.height=4, fig.width=6}
if(hasPopFile){
  mat_pheno_dist=matrix(0,nrow=40,ncol=200)
  for (i in 1:10){
    load_pop=read.table(paste("output_default/pop_LC_0_LA0.1_MC1_DMI0.1_rep",i,".txt",sep=""),fill=NA,skip=1,colClasses = "factor")
    load_pop1=load_pop[1:which(load_pop$V1=="Female_pop2"),]
    n1f=as.numeric(as.character(load_pop1[1,2]))
    n1m=as.numeric(as.character(load_pop1[2+2*n1f,2]))
    load_pop1=load_pop1[load_pop1[,6]!="" ,c(2,4,6,8,10,12)]
    load_pop1=as.data.frame(lapply(lapply(load_pop1,as.character),as.numeric))
    load_pop1$pheno=rowSums(load_pop1[,-1])
    load_pop1=load_pop1[c(T,F),c(1,7)]+load_pop1[c(F,T),c(1,7)]
    
    mat_pheno_dist[i,]=hist(load_pop1[seq(1,n1f),2],breaks=seq(-10,10,0.1),plot=FALSE)$counts
    mat_pheno_dist[i+10,]=hist(load_pop1[seq(n1f+1,n1f+n1m),2],breaks=seq(-10,10,0.1),plot=FALSE)$counts
    
  }
  for (i in 1:10){
    load_pop=read.table(paste("output_LC1/pop_LC_1_LA0.1_MC1_DMI0.1_rep",i,".txt",sep=""),fill=NA,skip=1,colClasses = "factor")
    load_pop1=load_pop[1:which(load_pop$V1=="Female_pop2"),]
    n1f=as.numeric(as.character(load_pop1[1,2]))
    n1m=as.numeric(as.character(load_pop1[2+2*n1f,2]))
    load_pop1=load_pop1[load_pop1[,6]!="" ,c(2,4,6,8,10,12)]
    load_pop1=as.data.frame(lapply(lapply(load_pop1,as.character),as.numeric))
    load_pop1$pheno=rowSums(load_pop1[,-1])
    load_pop1=load_pop1[c(T,F),c(1,7)]+load_pop1[c(F,T),c(1,7)]
    
    mat_pheno_dist[i+20,]=hist(load_pop1[seq(1,n1f),2],breaks=seq(-10,10,0.1),plot=FALSE)$counts
    mat_pheno_dist[i+30,]=hist(load_pop1[seq(n1f+1,n1f+n1m),2],breaks=seq(-10,10,0.1),plot=FALSE)$counts
    
  }
  #pdf("Figure/Distribution_phenotype_strgm.pdf",width=8,height=6)
  image.plot(seq(40),seq(-10,10,.1),mat_pheno_dist,zlim=c(1,max(mat_pheno_dist)),col = c("grey",plasma(100)),ylab="Phenotype",xlab="",xaxt = "n",yaxt="n",ylim=c(-6,6))
  abline(v=c(10.5,30.5),lty=3)
  abline(v=20.5)
  axis(1,labels = c("sel-mig\n Female","sel-mig\n Male","mig-sel\n Female","mig-sel\n Male"),at = c(5.5,15.5,25.5,35.5))
  axis(2,labels=c("opt A:\n 5", "opt B:\n 5","0","2.5","-2.5"),at=c(5,-5,0,2.5,-2.5))
  #dev.off()
  
  list_col=viridis::inferno(11)
  plot(-10000,xlim=c(-6,6),ylim=c(0,2500),ylab="Counts",xlab="Phenotype")
  for(i in 1:10){
    points(seq(-9.95,9.95,.1),mat_pheno_dist[i,]+mat_pheno_dist[10+i,],type = 'l',col=list_col[i])
  }
  abline(h=0,v=c(-5,5))
  mat_pheno_dist_default=mat_pheno_dist
}
```


Distribution of phenotypes for m=0.2
```{r dist pheno strgm, fig.height=4, fig.width=6}
if(hasPopFile){
  mat_pheno_dist=matrix(0,nrow=40,ncol=200)
  for (i in 1:20){
    load_pop=read.table(paste("output_strgm/pop_LC_0_LA0.1_MC1_DMI0.1_rep",i,".txt",sep=""),fill=NA,skip=1,colClasses = "factor")
    load_pop1=load_pop[1:which(load_pop$V1=="Female_pop2"),]
    n1f=as.numeric(as.character(load_pop1[1,2]))
    n1m=as.numeric(as.character(load_pop1[2+2*n1f,2]))
    load_pop1=load_pop1[load_pop1[,6]!="" ,c(2,4,6,8,10,12)]
    load_pop1=as.data.frame(lapply(lapply(load_pop1,as.character),as.numeric))
    load_pop1$pheno=rowSums(load_pop1[,-1])
    load_pop1=load_pop1[c(T,F),c(1,7)]+load_pop1[c(F,T),c(1,7)]
    
    mat_pheno_dist[i,]=hist(c(load_pop1[seq(1,n1f),2],load_pop1[seq(n1f+1,n1f+n1m),2]),breaks=seq(-10,10,0.1),plot=FALSE)$counts
    #mat_pheno_dist[i,]=hist(load_pop1[seq(1,n1f),2],breaks=seq(-10,10,0.1),plot=FALSE)$counts
    #mat_pheno_dist[i+10,]=hist(load_pop1[seq(n1f+1,n1f+n1m),2],breaks=seq(-10,10,0.1),plot=FALSE)$counts
    
  }
  for (i in 1:20){
    load_pop=read.table(paste("output_strgm_LC1/pop_LC_1_LA0.1_MC1_DMI0.1_rep",i,".txt",sep=""),fill=NA,skip=1,colClasses = "factor")
    load_pop1=load_pop[1:which(load_pop$V1=="Female_pop2"),]
    n1f=as.numeric(as.character(load_pop1[1,2]))
    n1m=as.numeric(as.character(load_pop1[2+2*n1f,2]))
    load_pop1=load_pop1[load_pop1[,6]!="" ,c(2,4,6,8,10,12)]
    load_pop1=as.data.frame(lapply(lapply(load_pop1,as.character),as.numeric))
    load_pop1$pheno=rowSums(load_pop1[,-1])
    load_pop1=load_pop1[c(T,F),c(1,7)]+load_pop1[c(F,T),c(1,7)]
    
    mat_pheno_dist[i+20,]=hist(c(load_pop1[seq(1,n1f),2],load_pop1[seq(n1f+1,n1f+n1m),2]),breaks=seq(-10,10,0.1),plot=FALSE)$counts
    #mat_pheno_dist[i+20,]=hist(load_pop1[seq(1,n1f),2],breaks=seq(-10,10,0.1),plot=FALSE)$counts
    #mat_pheno_dist[i+30,]=hist(load_pop1[seq(n1f+1,n1f+n1m),2],breaks=seq(-10,10,0.1),plot=FALSE)$counts
    
  }
  #pdf("Figure/Distribution_phenotype_strgm.pdf",width=8,height=6)
  image.plot(seq(40),seq(-10,10,.1),mat_pheno_dist,zlim=c(1,max(mat_pheno_dist)),col = c("grey",plasma(100)),ylab="Phenotype",xlab="Replicate",xaxt = "n",yaxt="n",ylim=c(-6,6))
  #abline(v=c(10.5,30.5),lty=3)
  abline(v=20.5)
  #axis(1,labels = c("sel-mig Female","sel-mig Male","mig-sel Female","mig-sel Male"),at = c(5.5,15.5,25.5,35.5))
  axis(1,labels = c("Adult dispersal","Juvenile dispersal"),at = c(10.5,30.5))
  axis(2,labels=c("opt A:\n 5", "opt B:\n 5","0","2.5","-2.5"),at=c(5,-5,0,2.5,-2.5))
  #dev.off()
  
  list_col=viridis::inferno(11)
  plot(-10000,xlim=c(-6,6),ylim=c(0,2500),ylab="Counts",xlab="Phenotype")
  for(i in 1:10){
    points(seq(-9.95,9.95,.1),mat_pheno_dist[i,]+mat_pheno_dist[10+i,],type = 'l',col=list_col[i])
  }
  abline(h=0,v=c(-5,5))
  mat_pheno_dist_strgm=mat_pheno_dist
}
```

Comparison of m=0.05 and m=0.2
We display the mean distribution (over 10 replicates) of phenotypes in population A, with the two life cycles: red (m=0.2 and sel-mig), orange (m=0.2 and mig-sel), cyan (m=0.05 and mig-sel) and blue (m=0.05 and sel-mig). Males are displayed in the first plot and females in the second.
Figure S2C
```{r comparaison dist pheno}
if(hasPopFile){
  mat_pheno_dist_strgmD=mat_pheno_dist/rowSums(mat_pheno_dist)
  mat_pheno_dist_defaultD=mat_pheno_dist_default/rowSums(mat_pheno_dist_default)
  
  
  #pdf("Figure/Distribution_phenotype_comp.pdf",width=8,height=6)
  plot(-10000,xlim=c(-6,6),ylim=c(0,0.25),ylab="Proportion",xlab="Phenotype")
  
  points(seq(-9.95,9.95,.1),colSums(mat_pheno_dist_strgmD[11:20,])/10,col="red",type='l')
  points(seq(-9.95,9.95,.1),colSums(mat_pheno_dist_strgmD[31:40,])/10,col="orange",type='l')
  
  points(seq(-9.95,9.95,.1),colSums(mat_pheno_dist_defaultD[11:20,])/10,col="blue",type='l')
  points(seq(-9.95,9.95,.1),colSums(mat_pheno_dist_defaultD[31:40,])/10,col="cyan",type='l',lwd=1.5)
  abline(h=0,v=c(-5,5),lty=2)
  
  plot(-10000,xlim=c(-6,6),ylim=c(0,0.25),ylab="Proportion",xlab="Phenotype")
  
  points(seq(-9.95,9.95,.1),colSums(mat_pheno_dist_strgmD[1:10,])/10,col="red",type='l')
  points(seq(-9.95,9.95,.1),colSums(mat_pheno_dist_strgmD[21:30,])/10,col="orange",type='l')
  
  points(seq(-9.95,9.95,.1),colSums(mat_pheno_dist_defaultD[1:10,])/10,col="blue",type='l')
  points(seq(-9.95,9.95,.1),colSums(mat_pheno_dist_defaultD[21:30,])/10,col="cyan",type='l',lwd=1.5)
  abline(h=0,v=c(-5,5),lty=2)
  #dev.off()
}
```

Distribution of phenotypes for m=0.0005
```{r dist pheno Rwkm}
if(hasPopFile){
  mat_pheno_dist=matrix(0,nrow=40,ncol=200)
  for (i in 1:10){
    load_pop=read.table(paste("output_Rwkm/pop_LC_0_LA0.1_MC1_DMI0.1_rep",i,".txt",sep=""),fill=NA,skip=1,colClasses = "factor")
    load_pop1=load_pop[1:which(load_pop$V1=="Female_pop2"),]
    n1f=as.numeric(as.character(load_pop1[1,2]))
    n1m=as.numeric(as.character(load_pop1[2+2*n1f,2]))
    load_pop1=load_pop1[load_pop1[,6]!="" ,c(2,4,6,8,10,12)]
    load_pop1=as.data.frame(lapply(lapply(load_pop1,as.character),as.numeric))
    load_pop1$pheno=rowSums(load_pop1[,-1])
    load_pop1=load_pop1[c(T,F),c(1,7)]+load_pop1[c(F,T),c(1,7)]
    
    mat_pheno_dist[i,]=hist(load_pop1[seq(1,n1f),2],breaks=seq(-10,10,0.1),plot=FALSE)$counts
    mat_pheno_dist[i+10,]=hist(load_pop1[seq(n1f+1,n1f+n1m),2],breaks=seq(-10,10,0.1),plot=FALSE)$counts
    
  }
  for (i in 1:10){
    load_pop=read.table(paste("output_Rwkm_LC1/pop_LC_1_LA0.1_MC1_DMI0.1_rep",i,".txt",sep=""),fill=NA,skip=1,colClasses = "factor")
    load_pop1=load_pop[1:which(load_pop$V1=="Female_pop2"),]
    n1f=as.numeric(as.character(load_pop1[1,2]))
    n1m=as.numeric(as.character(load_pop1[2+2*n1f,2]))
    load_pop1=load_pop1[load_pop1[,6]!="" ,c(2,4,6,8,10,12)]
    load_pop1=as.data.frame(lapply(lapply(load_pop1,as.character),as.numeric))
    load_pop1$pheno=rowSums(load_pop1[,-1])
    load_pop1=load_pop1[c(T,F),c(1,7)]+load_pop1[c(F,T),c(1,7)]
    
    mat_pheno_dist[i+20,]=hist(load_pop1[seq(1,n1f),2],breaks=seq(-10,10,0.1),plot=FALSE)$counts
    mat_pheno_dist[i+30,]=hist(load_pop1[seq(n1f+1,n1f+n1m),2],breaks=seq(-10,10,0.1),plot=FALSE)$counts
    
  }
  #pdf("Figure/Distribution_phenotype_Rwkm.pdf",width=8,height=6)
  image.plot(seq(40),seq(-10,10,.1),mat_pheno_dist,zlim=c(1,max(mat_pheno_dist)),col = c("grey",plasma(100)),ylab="Phenotype",xlab="",xaxt = "n",yaxt="n",ylim=c(-6,6))
  abline(v=c(10.5,30.5),lty=3)
  abline(v=20.5)
  axis(1,labels = c("sel-mig Female","sel-mig Male","mig-sel Female","mig-sel Male"),at = c(5.5,15.5,25.5,35.5))
  axis(2,labels=c("opt A:\n 5", "opt B:\n 5","0","2.5","-2.5"),at=c(5,-5,0,2.5,-2.5))
  #dev.off()
  mat_pheno_dist_Rwkm=mat_pheno_dist
}
```

Distribution of phenotypes for m=0.005
```{r dist pheno wkm}
if(hasPopFile){
  mat_pheno_dist=matrix(0,nrow=40,ncol=200)
  for (i in 1:10){
    load_pop=read.table(paste("output_wkm/pop_LC_0_LA0.1_MC1_DMI0.1_rep",i,".txt",sep=""),fill=NA,skip=1,colClasses = "factor")
    load_pop1=load_pop[1:which(load_pop$V1=="Female_pop2"),]
    n1f=as.numeric(as.character(load_pop1[1,2]))
    n1m=as.numeric(as.character(load_pop1[2+2*n1f,2]))
    load_pop1=load_pop1[load_pop1[,6]!="" ,c(2,4,6,8,10,12)]
    load_pop1=as.data.frame(lapply(lapply(load_pop1,as.character),as.numeric))
    load_pop1$pheno=rowSums(load_pop1[,-1])
    load_pop1=load_pop1[c(T,F),c(1,7)]+load_pop1[c(F,T),c(1,7)]
    
    mat_pheno_dist[i,]=hist(load_pop1[seq(1,n1f),2],breaks=seq(-10,10,0.1),plot=FALSE)$counts
    mat_pheno_dist[i+10,]=hist(load_pop1[seq(n1f+1,n1f+n1m),2],breaks=seq(-10,10,0.1),plot=FALSE)$counts
    
  }
  for (i in 1:10){
    load_pop=read.table(paste("output_wkm_LC1/pop_LC_1_LA0.1_MC1_DMI0.1_rep",i,".txt",sep=""),fill=NA,skip=1,colClasses = "factor")
    load_pop1=load_pop[1:which(load_pop$V1=="Female_pop2"),]
    n1f=as.numeric(as.character(load_pop1[1,2]))
    n1m=as.numeric(as.character(load_pop1[2+2*n1f,2]))
    load_pop1=load_pop1[load_pop1[,6]!="" ,c(2,4,6,8,10,12)]
    load_pop1=as.data.frame(lapply(lapply(load_pop1,as.character),as.numeric))
    load_pop1$pheno=rowSums(load_pop1[,-1])
    load_pop1=load_pop1[c(T,F),c(1,7)]+load_pop1[c(F,T),c(1,7)]
    
    mat_pheno_dist[i+20,]=hist(load_pop1[seq(1,n1f),2],breaks=seq(-10,10,0.1),plot=FALSE)$counts
    mat_pheno_dist[i+30,]=hist(load_pop1[seq(n1f+1,n1f+n1m),2],breaks=seq(-10,10,0.1),plot=FALSE)$counts
    
  }
  #pdf("Figure/Distribution_phenotype_wkm.pdf",width=8,height=6)
  image.plot(seq(40),seq(-10,10,.1),mat_pheno_dist,zlim=c(1,max(mat_pheno_dist)),col = c("grey",plasma(100)),ylab="Phenotype",xlab="",xaxt = "n",yaxt="n",ylim=c(-6,6))
  abline(v=c(10.5,30.5),lty=3)
  abline(v=20.5)
  axis(1,labels = c("sel-mig Female","sel-mig Male","mig-sel Female","mig-sel Male"),at = c(5.5,15.5,25.5,35.5))
  axis(2,labels=c("opt A:\n 5", "opt B:\n 5","0","2.5","-2.5"),at=c(5,-5,0,2.5,-2.5))
  #dev.off()
  mat_pheno_dist_wkm=mat_pheno_dist
}
```

Distribution of phenotypes for m=0; Figure S2A
```{r dist pheno iso}
if(hasPopFile){
  mat_pheno_dist=matrix(0,nrow=20,ncol=200)
  for (i in 1:20){
    k=20+i
    load_pop=read.table(paste("output_iso/pop_LC_0_LA0.1_MC1_DMI0.1_rep",k,".txt",sep=""),fill=NA,skip=1,colClasses = "factor")
    load_pop1=load_pop[1:which(load_pop$V1=="Female_pop2"),]
    n1f=as.numeric(as.character(load_pop1[1,2]))
    n1m=as.numeric(as.character(load_pop1[2+2*n1f,2]))
    load_pop1=load_pop1[load_pop1[,6]!="" ,c(2,4,6,8,10,12)]
    load_pop1=as.data.frame(lapply(lapply(load_pop1,as.character),as.numeric))
    load_pop1$pheno=rowSums(load_pop1[,-1])
    load_pop1=load_pop1[c(T,F),c(1,7)]+load_pop1[c(F,T),c(1,7)]
    
    mat_pheno_dist[i,]=hist(c(load_pop1[seq(1,n1f),2],load_pop1[seq(n1f+1,n1f+n1m),2]),breaks=seq(-10,10,0.1),plot=FALSE)$counts
    #mat_pheno_dist[i,]=hist(load_pop1[seq(1,n1f),2],breaks=seq(-10,10,0.1),plot=FALSE)$counts
    #mat_pheno_dist[i+10,]=hist(load_pop1[seq(n1f+1,n1f+n1m),2],breaks=seq(-10,10,0.1),plot=FALSE)$counts
    
  }

  #   load_pop1=load_pop1[c(T,F),c(1,7)]+load_pop1[c(F,T),c(1,7)]
  #   
  #   mat_pheno_dist[i+20,]=hist(load_pop1[seq(1,n1f),2],breaks=seq(-10,10,0.1),plot=FALSE)$counts
  #   mat_pheno_dist[i+30,]=hist(load_pop1[seq(n1f+1,n1f+n1m),2],breaks=seq(-10,10,0.1),plot=FALSE)$counts
  #   
  # }
  #pdf("Figure/Distribution_phenotype_iso.pdf",width=8,height=6)
  image.plot(seq(20),seq(-10,10,.1),mat_pheno_dist,zlim=c(1,max(mat_pheno_dist)),col = c("grey",plasma(100)),ylab="Phenotype",xlab="Replicate",xaxt = "n",yaxt="n",ylim=c(-6,6))
  #abline(v=c(10.5,30.5),lty=3)
  #abline(v=20.5)
  axis(1,labels = c("5","10","15"),at = c(5.5,10.5,15.5))
  axis(2,labels=c("opt A:\n 5", "opt B:\n 5","0","2.5","-2.5"),at=c(5,-5,0,2.5,-2.5))
  #dev.off()
  mat_pheno_dist_iso=mat_pheno_dist
}
```

Distribution of phenotypes for m=0.5 (a single population)
```{r dist pheno single pop }
if(hasPopFile){
  mat_pheno_dist=matrix(0,nrow=40,ncol=200)
  for (i in 1:10){
    load_pop=read.table(paste("output_onepop/pop_LC_0_LA0.1_MC1_DMI0.1_rep",i,".txt",sep=""),fill=NA,skip=1,colClasses = "factor")
    load_pop1=load_pop[1:which(load_pop$V1=="Female_pop2"),]
    n1f=as.numeric(as.character(load_pop1[1,2]))
    n1m=as.numeric(as.character(load_pop1[2+2*n1f,2]))
    load_pop1=load_pop1[load_pop1[,6]!="" ,c(2,4,6,8,10,12)]
    load_pop1=as.data.frame(lapply(lapply(load_pop1,as.character),as.numeric))
    load_pop1$pheno=rowSums(load_pop1[,-1])
    load_pop1=load_pop1[c(T,F),c(1,7)]+load_pop1[c(F,T),c(1,7)]
    
    mat_pheno_dist[i,]=hist(load_pop1[seq(1,n1f),2],breaks=seq(-10,10,0.1),plot=FALSE)$counts
    mat_pheno_dist[i+10,]=hist(load_pop1[seq(n1f+1,n1f+n1m),2],breaks=seq(-10,10,0.1),plot=FALSE)$counts
    
  }
  
  #pdf("Figure/Distribution_phenotype_onepop.pdf",width=8,height=6)
  image.plot(seq(40),seq(-10,10,.1),mat_pheno_dist,zlim=c(1,max(mat_pheno_dist)),col = c("grey",plasma(100)),ylab="Phenotype",xlab="",xaxt = "n",yaxt="n",ylim=c(-6,6))
  abline(v=c(10.5,30.5),lty=3)
  abline(v=20.5)
  axis(1,labels = c("sel-mig Female","sel-mig Male","mig-sel Female","mig-sel Male"),at = c(5.5,15.5,25.5,35.5))
  axis(2,labels=c("opt A:\n 5", "opt B:\n 5","0","2.5","-2.5"),at=c(5,-5,0,2.5,-2.5))
  #dev.off()
}
```

Proportion of "fully adapted" individuals, defined by having their phenotype within the 5th and 95th percentile of the distribution of phenotypes evolved in isolation computed over 10 replicates.
```{r load population and compute proportion of locally adpated individual - defined by the population in isolation}
if(hasPopFile){
  data_pheno_dist=NULL
  for (i in 1:10){
    load_pop=read.table(paste("output_iso/pop_LC_0_LA0.1_MC1_DMI0.1_rep",i,".txt",sep=""),fill=NA,skip=1,colClasses = "factor")
    load_pop1=load_pop[1:which(load_pop$V1=="Female_pop2"),]
    n1f=as.numeric(as.character(load_pop1[1,2]))
    n1m=as.numeric(as.character(load_pop1[2+2*n1f,2]))
    load_pop1=load_pop1[load_pop1[,6]!="" ,c(2,4,6,8,10,12)]
    load_pop1=as.data.frame(lapply(lapply(load_pop1,as.character),as.numeric))
    load_pop1$pheno=rowSums(load_pop1[,-1])
    load_pop1=load_pop1[c(T,F),c(1,7)]+load_pop1[c(F,T),c(1,7)]
    data_pheno_dist=rbind(data_pheno_dist, cbind(rep(i,10000),load_pop1$pheno))
  }
  bound=quantile(data_pheno_dist[,2],c(0.025,0.05,0.95,0.975))
  dist_match_iso=NULL
  for(i in 1:10){
    t=data_pheno_dist[((1+(i-1)*10000)):(i*10000),2]
    dist_match_iso=rbind(dist_match_iso,c(0,0,i,c(sum(t>bound[1]&t<bound[4]),sum(t>bound[2]&t<bound[3]))))
  }
  
  for (i in 1:10){
    load_pop=read.table(paste("output_RRwkm/pop_LC_0_LA0.1_MC1_DMI0.1_rep",i,".txt",sep=""),fill=NA,skip=1,colClasses = "factor")
    load_pop1=load_pop[1:which(load_pop$V1=="Female_pop2"),]
    n1f=as.numeric(as.character(load_pop1[1,2]))
    n1m=as.numeric(as.character(load_pop1[2+2*n1f,2]))
    load_pop1=load_pop1[load_pop1[,6]!="" ,c(2,4,6,8,10,12)]
    load_pop1=as.data.frame(lapply(lapply(load_pop1,as.character),as.numeric))
    load_pop1$pheno=rowSums(load_pop1[,-1])
    load_pop1=load_pop1[c(T,F),c(1,7)]+load_pop1[c(F,T),c(1,7)]
    
    dist_match_iso=rbind(dist_match_iso,c(0.00001,0,i,c(sum(load_pop1$pheno>bound[1]&load_pop1$pheno<bound[4]),sum(load_pop1$pheno>bound[2]&load_pop1$pheno<bound[3])))) 
  }
  
  
  for (i in 1:10){
    load_pop=read.table(paste("output_Rwkm/pop_LC_0_LA0.1_MC1_DMI0.1_rep",i,".txt",sep=""),fill=NA,skip=1,colClasses = "factor")
    load_pop1=load_pop[1:which(load_pop$V1=="Female_pop2"),]
    n1f=as.numeric(as.character(load_pop1[1,2]))
    n1m=as.numeric(as.character(load_pop1[2+2*n1f,2]))
    load_pop1=load_pop1[load_pop1[,6]!="" ,c(2,4,6,8,10,12)]
    load_pop1=as.data.frame(lapply(lapply(load_pop1,as.character),as.numeric))
    load_pop1$pheno=rowSums(load_pop1[,-1])
    load_pop1=load_pop1[c(T,F),c(1,7)]+load_pop1[c(F,T),c(1,7)]
    
    dist_match_iso=rbind(dist_match_iso,c(0.0001,0,i,c(sum(load_pop1$pheno>bound[1]&load_pop1$pheno<bound[4]),sum(load_pop1$pheno>bound[2]&load_pop1$pheno<bound[3])))) 
  }
  
  
  for (i in 1:10){
    load_pop=read.table(paste("output_wkm/pop_LC_0_LA0.1_MC1_DMI0.1_rep",i,".txt",sep=""),fill=NA,skip=1,colClasses = "factor")
    load_pop1=load_pop[1:which(load_pop$V1=="Female_pop2"),]
    n1f=as.numeric(as.character(load_pop1[1,2]))
    n1m=as.numeric(as.character(load_pop1[2+2*n1f,2]))
    load_pop1=load_pop1[load_pop1[,6]!="" ,c(2,4,6,8,10,12)]
    load_pop1=as.data.frame(lapply(lapply(load_pop1,as.character),as.numeric))
    load_pop1$pheno=rowSums(load_pop1[,-1])
    load_pop1=load_pop1[c(T,F),c(1,7)]+load_pop1[c(F,T),c(1,7)]
    
    dist_match_iso=rbind(dist_match_iso,c(0.001,0,i,c(sum(load_pop1$pheno>bound[1]&load_pop1$pheno<bound[4]),sum(load_pop1$pheno>bound[2]&load_pop1$pheno<bound[3]))))

  }
  
  
  for (i in 1:10){
    load_pop=read.table(paste("output_strgm/pop_LC_0_LA0.1_MC1_DMI0.1_rep",i,".txt",sep=""),fill=NA,skip=1,colClasses = "factor")
    load_pop1=load_pop[1:which(load_pop$V1=="Female_pop2"),]
    n1f=as.numeric(as.character(load_pop1[1,2]))

    load_pop1=load_pop1[load_pop1[,6]!="" ,c(2,4,6,8,10,12)]
    load_pop1=as.data.frame(lapply(lapply(load_pop1,as.character),as.numeric))
    load_pop1$pheno=rowSums(load_pop1[,-1])
    load_pop1=load_pop1[c(T,F),c(1,7)]+load_pop1[c(F,T),c(1,7)]
    
    dist_match_iso=rbind(dist_match_iso,c(0.2,0,i,c(sum(load_pop1$pheno>bound[1]&load_pop1$pheno<bound[4]),sum(load_pop1$pheno>bound[2]&load_pop1$pheno<bound[3])))) 
  }
  
  
  for (i in 1:10){
    load_pop=read.table(paste("output_strgm_LC1/pop_LC_1_LA0.1_MC1_DMI0.1_rep",i,".txt",sep=""),fill=NA,skip=1,colClasses = "factor")
```

```{r plot proportion of individual -fully adapted to the environment -}
if(hasPopFile){
  #ggplot(dist_match_iso,aes(x=as.factor(mig),y=centile90/10000))+geom_jitter(height = 0,width = 0.2)+facet_wrap(~life_cycle)
  #pdf("Figure/quantile_pheno.pdf",width=6,height=4)
  ggplot(dist_match_iso,aes(x=as.factor(mig),y=centile95/10000))+geom_jitter(height = 0,width = 0.2)+facet_wrap(~life_cycle,)+labs(y="Proportion of \"adapted\" individuals",x="Migration rate")+theme_bw()
  #dev.off()

```

Distribution of phenotype per linkage block
```{r}
if(hasPopFile){
  for (i in 1:10){
    load_pop=read.table(paste("output_strgm/pop_LC_0_LA0.1_MC1_DMI0.1_rep",i,".txt",sep=""),fill=NA,skip=1,colClasses = "factor")
    load_pop1=load_pop[1:which(load_pop$V1=="Female_pop2"),]
    n1f=as.numeric(as.character(load_pop1[1,2]))
    n1m=as.numeric(as.character(load_pop1[2+2*n1f,2]))
    load_pop1=load_pop1[load_pop1[,6]!="" ,c(2,4,6,8,10,12)]
    load_pop2=load_pop[which(load_pop$V1=="Female_pop2"):dim(load_pop)[1],]
    n2f=as.numeric(as.character(load_pop2[1,2]))
    n2m=as.numeric(as.character(load_pop2[2+2*n2f,2]))
    load_pop2=load_pop2[load_pop2[,6]!="" ,c(2,4,6,8,10,12)]
    
    
  }
  mat_pheno=NULL
  load_pop1$pop="A"
  load_pop2$pop="B"
  mat_pheno=rbind(mat_pheno,cbind(rep(1,length(load_pop1$pop)),cbind(load_pop1$pop,as.character(load_pop1$V4))))
  mat_pheno=rbind(mat_pheno,cbind(rep(2,length(load_pop1$pop)),cbind(load_pop1$pop,as.character(load_pop1$V6))))
  mat_pheno=rbind(mat_pheno,cbind(rep(3,length(load_pop1$pop)),cbind(load_pop1$pop,as.character(load_pop1$V8))))
  mat_pheno=rbind(mat_pheno,cbind(rep(4,length(load_pop1$pop)),cbind(load_pop1$pop,as.character(load_pop1$V10))))
  mat_pheno=rbind(mat_pheno,cbind(rep(5,length(load_pop1$pop)),cbind(load_pop1$pop,as.character(load_pop1$V12))))
  
  mat_pheno=rbind(mat_pheno,cbind(rep(1,length(load_pop2$pop)),cbind(load_pop2$pop,as.character(load_pop2$V4))))
  mat_pheno=rbind(mat_pheno,cbind(rep(2,length(load_pop2$pop)),cbind(load_pop2$pop,as.character(load_pop2$V6))))
  mat_pheno=rbind(mat_pheno,cbind(rep(3,length(load_pop2$pop)),cbind(load_pop2$pop,as.character(load_pop2$V8))))
  mat_pheno=rbind(mat_pheno,cbind(rep(4,length(load_pop2$pop)),cbind(load_pop2$pop,as.character(load_pop2$V10))))
  mat_pheno=rbind(mat_pheno,cbind(rep(5,length(load_pop2$pop)),cbind(load_pop2$pop,as.character(load_pop2$V12))))
  mat_pheno=as.data.frame(mat_pheno)
  colnames(mat_pheno)=c("LB","Population","Phenotypic_value")
  mat_pheno$Phenotypic_value=as.numeric(mat_pheno$Phenotypic_value)
}
```

```{r}
if(hasPopFile){
  ggplot(mat_pheno,aes(x=Phenotypic_value,fill=Population))+geom_histogram()+facet_grid(Population~LB)+theme(legend.position ="none" )
}
```


# Distribution of DMI
Distribution of DMIs for 500 individuals randomly sampled in each population.

For m=0.2, we display the pairs of DMIs are ordered by how strongly they are expressed in fictional F1 individuals (i.e., assuming the incompatible pairs are called A and B, by pA*pB). Yellow indicates the ancestral state, orange the heterozygote one and purple the homozygote derived one.

In addition we display the alleles states at these DMIs locus per combination of linkage block, with rows indicating where the 1 locus is found and the column the second. Yellow indicates the ancestral state, orange the heterozygote one and purple the homozygote derived one. First we displayed this for population A, then population B and finally the two population together.
Figure S6A
```{r dist dmi}
if(hasPopFile){
  folder="output_iso"
  dmi_pos=read.table("save_mutations_file/mutations_500L_1D_var0d05_50DMI.txt")
  dmi_pos=dmi_pos[506:605]
  temp_dmi=trunc(unlist(dmi_pos)/100)+1
  pair_dmi=temp_dmi[c(T,F)]*10+temp_dmi[c(F,T)]
  #for (k in 1:10){
  for (k in 1:1){  
    load_pop=read.table(paste(folder,"/pop_LC_0_LA0.1_MC1_DMI0.1_rep",k,".txt",sep=""),fill=NA,skip=1,colClasses = "factor")
    load_pop1=load_pop[1:which(load_pop$V1=="Female_pop2"),]
    n1f=as.numeric(as.character(load_pop1[1,2]))
    n1m=as.numeric(as.character(load_pop1[2+2*n1f,2]))
    load_pop1=load_pop1[load_pop1[,6]!="" ,c(5,7,9,11,13)]
    
    mat_genf1=matrix(0,nrow = 2*(n1f+n1m),ncol = 500)
    
    mat_genf1=sapply(seq(2*(n1f+n1m)),function(x){read_genome(load_pop1,x)})
    
    mat_genf1=mat_genf1[,c(T,F)]+mat_genf1[,c(F,T)]
    
    samp=t(mat_genf1[,sample(seq((n1f+n1m)),500,replace = FALSE)])
    test_d=hclust(dist(samp,"manhattan"))
    
    load_pop2=load_pop[which(load_pop$V1=="Female_pop2"):dim(load_pop)[1],]
    n2f=as.numeric(as.character(load_pop2[1,2]))
    n2m=as.numeric(as.character(load_pop2[2+2*n2f,2]))
    load_pop2=load_pop2[load_pop2[,6]!="" ,c(5,7,9,11,13)]
    
    mat_genf2=matrix(0,nrow = 2*(n2f+n2m),ncol = 500)
    
    mat_genf2=sapply(seq(2*(n2f+n2m)),function(x){read_genome(load_pop2,x)})
    
    mat_genf2=mat_genf2[,c(T,F)]+mat_genf2[,c(F,T)]
    
    samp2=t(mat_genf2[,sample(seq(n2f+n2m),500,replace = FALSE)])
    test_d2=hclust(dist(samp2,"manhattan"))
    
    
    #pdf(paste("Figure/only_DMI",folder,"rep",k,".pdf",sep=""),width=8,height=4)
    layout(matrix(seq(1),nrow=1))
    par(mar=c(1,1,1,1))
    c1=colSums(samp[,(unlist(dmi_pos)+1)])/1000
    c2=colSums(samp2[,(unlist(dmi_pos)+1)])/1000
    o1=order(c1[c(T,F)]*c2[c(F,T)]+c1[c(F,T)]*c2[c(T,F)],c1[c(T,F)]+c1[c(F,T)],c2[c(F,T)]+c2[c(T,F)],decreasing = TRUE)
    o2=c(rbind(2*o1-1,2*o1))
    dmi_loci=(unlist(dmi_pos)+1)[o2]
    
    
    image(seq(length(seq(100)))-0.5,seq(dim(samp)[1]+dim(samp)[2]),cbind(t(samp[test_d$order,dmi_loci]),t(samp2[test_d2$order,dmi_loci])),xaxt="n",yaxt="n",xlab="",ylab="",breaks=c(-0.5,0.5,1.5,2.5),col=viridis::inferno(4)[c(4:2)])
    abline(v=seq(2,length(seq(100)),2),lwd=3,lty=2)
    abline(h=500,col="black",lwd=3,lty=3)
    layout(matrix(seq(25),nrow=5,byrow = TRUE))
    par(mar=c(1,1,1,1))
    for(i in c(11:15,21:25,31:35,41:45,51:55)){
      if (any(pair_dmi==i)){
        image(seq(length(seq(100)[rep(pair_dmi,each=2)==i]))-0.5,seq(dim(samp)[1]),t(samp[test_d$order,(unlist(dmi_pos)+1)[ which(rep(pair_dmi,each=2)==i)]]),xaxt="n",yaxt="n",xlab="",ylab="",breaks=c(-0.5,0.5,1.5,2.5),col=viridis::inferno(4)[c(4:2)])
        abline(v=seq(2,length(seq(100)[rep(pair_dmi,each=2)==i]),2),lwd=3,lty=2)
      } else {
        image(1,1,as.matrix(-1),col="gray",xaxt="n",yaxt="n",xlab="",ylab="")
      }
    }
    
    for(i in c(11:15,21:25,31:35,41:45,51:55)){
      if (any(pair_dmi==i)){
        image(seq(length(seq(100)[rep(pair_dmi,each=2)==i]))-0.5,seq(dim(samp2)[1]),t(samp2[test_d2$order,(unlist(dmi_pos)+1)[ which(rep(pair_dmi,each=2)==i)]]),xaxt="n",yaxt="n",xlab="",ylab="",breaks=c(-0.5,0.5,1.5,2.5),col=viridis::inferno(4)[c(4:2)])
        abline(v=seq(2,length(seq(100)[rep(pair_dmi,each=2)==i]),2),lwd=3,lty=2)
      } else {
        image(1,1,as.matrix(-1),col="gray",xaxt="n",yaxt="n",xlab="",ylab="")
      }
    }
    
    for(i in c(11:15,21:25,31:35,41:45,51:55)){
      if (any(pair_dmi==i)){
        image(seq(length(seq(100)[rep(pair_dmi,each=2)==i]))-0.5,seq(dim(samp)[1]+dim(samp)[2]),cbind(t(samp[test_d$order,(unlist(dmi_pos)+1)[ which(rep(pair_dmi,each=2)==i)]]),t(samp2[test_d2$order,(unlist(dmi_pos)+1)[ which(rep(pair_dmi,each=2)==i)]])),xaxt="n",yaxt="n",xlab="",ylab="",breaks=c(-0.5,0.5,1.5,2.5),col=viridis::inferno(4)[c(4:2)])
        abline(v=seq(2,length(seq(100)[rep(pair_dmi,each=2)==i]),2),lwd=3,lty=2)
        abline(h=500,col="black",lwd=3,lty=3)
      } else {
        image(1,1,as.matrix(-1),col="gray",xaxt="n",yaxt="n",xlab="",ylab="")
      }
    }
    
    #  dev.off()
  }
}
```

Figure S6B-D - the variable folder needs to be edited accordingly.
```{r check frequency of the DMI loci in isolated populations}
if(hasPopFile){
  folder="output_Rwkm"
  dmi_pos=read.table("save_mutations_file/mutations_500L_1D_var0d05_50DMI.txt")
  dmi_pos=dmi_pos[506:605]
  temp_dmi=trunc(unlist(dmi_pos)/100)+1
  pair_dmi=temp_dmi[c(T,F)]*10+temp_dmi[c(F,T)]
  dmi_count=NULL
  for (k in 21:50){
    load_pop=read.table(paste(folder,"/pop_LC_0_LA0.1_MC1_DMI0.1_rep",k,".txt",sep=""),fill=NA,skip=1,colClasses = "factor")
    load_pop1=load_pop[1:which(load_pop$V1=="Female_pop2"),]
    n1f=as.numeric(as.character(load_pop1[1,2]))
    n1m=as.numeric(as.character(load_pop1[2+2*n1f,2]))
    load_pop1=load_pop1[load_pop1[,6]!="" ,c(5,7,9,11,13)]
    
    mat_genf1=matrix(0,nrow = 2*(n1f+n1m),ncol = 500)
    
    mat_genf1=sapply(seq(2*(n1f+n1m)),function(x){read_genome(load_pop1,x)})
    
    mat_genf1=t(mat_genf1)
    
    cf1=colSums(mat_genf1[,dmi_loci])
    
    t1=t(sapply(seq(1,100,2),function(x) c(k,1,min(cf1[x:(x+1)]),max(cf1[x:(x+1)]))))
    
    load_pop2=load_pop[which(load_pop$V1=="Female_pop2"):dim(load_pop)[1],]
    n2f=as.numeric(as.character(load_pop2[1,2]))
    n2m=as.numeric(as.character(load_pop2[2+2*n2f,2]))
    load_pop2=load_pop2[load_pop2[,6]!="" ,c(5,7,9,11,13)]
    
    mat_genf2=matrix(0,nrow = 2*(n2f+n2m),ncol = 500)
    
    mat_genf2=sapply(seq(2*(n2f+n2m)),function(x){read_genome(load_pop2,x)})
    
    
    mat_genf2=t(mat_genf2)
    
    cf2=colSums(mat_genf2[,dmi_loci])
    
    t2=t(sapply(seq(1,100,2),function(x) c(k,2,min(cf2[x:(x+1)]),max(cf2[x:(x+1)]))))
    
    dmi_count=rbind(dmi_count,t1)
    dmi_count=rbind(dmi_count,t2)
  }
  
  dmi_count_bup=dmi_count
  dmi_count=as.data.frame(dmi_count)
  dmi_count$V5=ceiling(dmi_count$V3/100)/200
  dmi_count$v6=ceiling(dmi_count$V4/2000)/10
  
  table(dmi_count$V5[dmi_count$V2==1], dmi_count$v6[dmi_count$V2==1])
  table(dmi_count$V5[dmi_count$V2==2], dmi_count$v6[dmi_count$V2==2])
  sum(dmi_count$V5[dmi_count$V2==1]>0)/length(dmi_count$V5[dmi_count$V2==1])
}
```

Allele freqeuncy distribution for loci involved in DMI vs non-DMI
```{r mean allele freq for DMI vs non}
if(hasPopFile){
  folder="output_strgm"
  dmi_pos=read.table("save_mutations_file/mutations_500L_1D_var0d05_50DMI.txt")
  dmi_pos=dmi_pos[506:605]
  temp_dmi=trunc(unlist(dmi_pos)/100)+1
  pair_dmi=temp_dmi[c(T,F)]*10+temp_dmi[c(F,T)]
  all_freq=matrix(0,nrow=200,ncol=152)
  counter=0
  for (k in 1:100){
    #print(k)
    counter=counter+1
    load_pop=read.table(paste(folder,"/pop_LC_0_LA0.1_MC1_DMI0.1_rep",k,".txt",sep=""),fill=NA,skip=1,colClasses = "factor")
    load_pop1=load_pop[1:which(load_pop$V1=="Female_pop2"),]
    n1f=as.numeric(as.character(load_pop1[1,2]))
    n1m=as.numeric(as.character(load_pop1[2+2*n1f,2]))
    load_pop1=load_pop1[load_pop1[,6]!="" ,c(5,7,9,11,13)]
    
    mat_genf1=matrix(0,nrow = 2*(n1f+n1m),ncol = 500)
    
    mat_genf1=sapply(seq(2*(n1f+n1m)),function(x){read_genome(load_pop1,x)})
    
    
    n1=rowSums(mat_genf1)[sample(seq(500)[-unlist(dmi_pos)],50,replace = F)]/20000
    dA1=rowSums(mat_genf1)[unlist(dmi_pos[c(T,F)])]/20000
    dB1=rowSums(mat_genf1)[unlist(dmi_pos[c(F,T)])]/20000
    
    load_pop2=load_pop[which(load_pop$V1=="Female_pop2"):dim(load_pop)[1],]
    n2f=as.numeric(as.character(load_pop2[1,2]))
    n2m=as.numeric(as.character(load_pop2[2+2*n2f,2]))
    load_pop2=load_pop2[load_pop2[,6]!="" ,c(5,7,9,11,13)]
    
    mat_genf2=matrix(0,nrow = 2*(n2f+n2m),ncol = 500)
    
    mat_genf2=sapply(seq(2*(n2f+n2m)),function(x){read_genome(load_pop2,x)})
    
    
    n2=rowSums(mat_genf2)[sample(seq(500)[-unlist(dmi_pos)],50,replace = F)]/20000
    dA2=rowSums(mat_genf2)[unlist(dmi_pos[c(T,F)])]/20000
    dB2=rowSums(mat_genf2)[unlist(dmi_pos[c(F,T)])]/20000
    
    all_freq[counter,]=c(k,1,dA1,dB1,n1)
    counter=counter+1
    all_freq[counter,]=c(k,2,dA2,dB2,n2)
  }
}
```

```{r}
if(hasPopFile){
  hist(all_freq[all_freq[,2]==1,3:52],breaks=seq(0,1,0.05),main="Derived frequency A")
  hist(rowMeans(all_freq[all_freq[,2]==1,3:52]),breaks=seq(0,1,0.05),main="Mean derived frequency A")
  hist(unlist(sapply(seq(100),function(x) var(all_freq[all_freq[,2]==1,3:52][x,]-mean(all_freq[all_freq[,2]==1,3:52][x,])))),breaks=seq(0,1,0.05),mean="Mean centered variance A")
  hist(rowMeans(all_freq[all_freq[,2]==1,3:52]<0.05),breaks=seq(0,1,0.05),main="Proportion of rare alleles (<0.05) A")
  
  hist(all_freq[all_freq[,2]==1,53:102],breaks=seq(0,1,0.05),main="Derived frequency B")
  hist(rowMeans(all_freq[all_freq[,2]==1,53:102]),breaks=seq(0,1,0.05),main="Mean derived frequency B")
  hist(unlist(sapply(seq(100),function(x) var(all_freq[all_freq[,2]==1,53:102][x,]-mean(all_freq[all_freq[,2]==1,53:102][x,])))),breaks=seq(0,1,0.05),mean="Mean centered variance B")
  hist(rowMeans(all_freq[all_freq[,2]==1,53:102]<0.05),breaks=seq(0,1,0.05),main="Proportion of rare alleles (<0.05) B")
  
  hist(all_freq[all_freq[,2]==1,103:152],breaks=seq(0,1,0.05),main="Derived frequency ND")
  hist(rowMeans(all_freq[all_freq[,2]==1,103:152]),breaks=seq(0,1,0.05),main="Mean derived frequency ND")
  hist(unlist(sapply(seq(100),function(x) var(all_freq[all_freq[,2]==1,103:152][x,]-mean(all_freq[all_freq[,2]==1,103:152][x,])))),breaks=seq(0,1,0.05),mean="Mean centered variance ND")
  hist(rowMeans(all_freq[all_freq[,2]==1,103:152]<0.05),breaks=seq(0,1,0.05),main="Proportion of rare alleles (<0.05) ND")
}

```

Compute and display the frequency of each DMI pair
```{r compute and display frequency DMI }
if(hasPopFile){
  folder="output_Rwkm"
  dmi_pos=read.table("save_mutations_file/mutations_500L_1D_var0d05_50DMI.txt")
  dmi_pos=dmi_pos[506:605]
  temp_dmi=trunc(unlist(dmi_pos)/100)+1
  pair_dmi=temp_dmi[c(T,F)]*10+temp_dmi[c(F,T)]
  
  store_c1=NULL
  store_c2=NULL
  
  for (k in 1:10){
    load_pop=read.table(paste(folder,"/pop_LC_0_LA0.1_MC1_DMI0.1_rep",k,".txt",sep=""),fill=NA,skip=1,colClasses = "factor")
    load_pop1=load_pop[1:which(load_pop$V1=="Female_pop2"),]
    n1f=as.numeric(as.character(load_pop1[1,2]))
    n1m=as.numeric(as.character(load_pop1[2+2*n1f,2]))
    load_pop1=load_pop1[load_pop1[,6]!="" ,c(5,7,9,11,13)]
    
    mat_genf1=matrix(0,nrow = 2*(n1f+n1m),ncol = 500)
    
    mat_genf1=sapply(seq(2*(n1f+n1m)),function(x){read_genome(load_pop1,x)})
    
    mat_genf1=mat_genf1[,c(T,F)]+mat_genf1[,c(F,T)]
    
    samp=t(mat_genf1[,sample(seq((n1f+n1m)),500,replace = FALSE)])
    test_d=hclust(dist(samp,"manhattan"))
    
    load_pop2=load_pop[which(load_pop$V1=="Female_pop2"):dim(load_pop)[1],]
    n2f=as.numeric(as.character(load_pop2[1,2]))
    n2m=as.numeric(as.character(load_pop2[2+2*n2f,2]))
    load_pop2=load_pop2[load_pop2[,6]!="" ,c(5,7,9,11,13)]
    
    mat_genf2=matrix(0,nrow = 2*(n2f+n2m),ncol = 500)
    
    mat_genf2=sapply(seq(2*(n2f+n2m)),function(x){read_genome(load_pop2,x)})
    
    mat_genf2=mat_genf2[,c(T,F)]+mat_genf2[,c(F,T)]
    
    samp2=t(mat_genf2[,sample(seq(n2f+n2m),500,replace = FALSE)])
    test_d2=hclust(dist(samp2,"manhattan"))
    
    
    
    c1=colSums(samp[,(unlist(dmi_pos)+1)])/1000
    c2=colSums(samp2[,(unlist(dmi_pos)+1)])/1000
    
    store_c1=rbind(store_c1,c1)
    store_c2=rbind(store_c2,c2)
  }
  data_dmi=NULL
  for(i in 1:10){
    data_dmi=rbind(data_dmi, cbind(rep(i,50),rep(2,50),store_c1[i,c(F,T)],store_c2[i,c(T,F)],store_c1[i,c(F,T)]*store_c2[i,c(T,F)]))
    data_dmi=rbind(data_dmi, cbind(rep(i,50),rep(1,50),store_c1[i,c(T,F)],store_c2[i,c(F,T)],store_c1[i,c(T,F)]*store_c2[i,c(F,T)]))
  }
  
  data_dmi=data_dmi[data_dmi[,5]>0,]
  data_dmi=as.data.frame(data_dmi)
  
  data_dmi$V1=paste("rep ",data_dmi$V1)
  #pdf(paste("Figure/paired_DMI",folder,"rep",k,".pdf",sep=""),width=8,height=4)
  
  ggplot(data_dmi ,aes(x=V3,y=V4,col=as.factor(V2)))+geom_point(alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~V1,ncol=5)+xlab("Frequency of allele Xk in population 1")+ylab("Frequency of allele Yk in population 2")+theme_bw()+theme(legend.position = "none")+scale_color_manual(values  =c("blue","red"))
  
  #dev.off()
}
```



# Loading metrics for the simulations
"load_from_raw_file" is a Boolean that control whether to pool the metrics from its original files or to skip it and use the summary file.
Load metrics for the simulations - from the main version
```{r loading data default}
load_from_raw_file=FALSE
if (load_from_raw_file&hasPopFile){
  data_all=rbind(rep(NA,length(colnames_metrics)),rep(NA,length(colnames_metrics)))
  colnames(data_all)=colnames_metrics
  
  
  for (i in list.files(pattern="metric_pop",recursive = TRUE)){
    data_all=load_metrics(i,data_all)
    
  }
  
  data_all=data_all[-c(1,2),]
  data_all$scenario=as.factor(list_scenario[data_all$scenario])
  
  
  data_all$origin=as.factor(list_origin[(data_all$origin+1)])
  data_all$life_cycle=as.factor(list_life_cycle[(data_all$life_cycle+1)])
  data_all$dmi_scheme=as.factor(list_dmi_scenario[(data_all$dmi_scheme)])
}

```

  Load metrics for the simulations - from the "independent_MC" version
```{r load data separate mate choice}
if(load_from_raw_file&hasPopFile){
  setwd("./../miltiloci_IndMC/")
  data_mc=rbind(rep(NA,length(colnames_metrics)),rep(NA,length(colnames_metrics)))
  colnames(data_mc)=colnames_metrics
  
  
  for (i in list.files(pattern="metric_pop",recursive = TRUE)){
    
    data_mc=load_metrics_mc(i,data_mc)
    
  }
  
  data_mc=data_mc[-c(1,2),]
  data_mc$scenario=as.factor(list_scenario[data_mc$scenario])
  
  
  data_mc$origin=as.factor(list_origin[(data_mc$origin+1)])
  data_mc$life_cycle=as.factor(list_life_cycle[(data_mc$life_cycle+1)])
  data_mc$dmi_scheme=as.factor(list_dmi_scenario[(data_mc$dmi_scheme)])
  
  data_all=rbind(data_all,data_mc)
}
```

Load metrics for the simulations - from the "asymmetric_mutation_rate" version
```{r loading back mutation data}
if(load_from_raw_file&hasPopFile){
  setwd("./../multiloci_backmu/")
  data_bm=rbind(rep(NA,length(colnames_metrics_bm)),rep(NA,length(colnames_metrics_bm)))
  colnames(data_bm)=colnames_metrics_bm
  
  
  for (i in list.files(pattern="metric_pop",recursive = TRUE)){
    
    data_bm=load_metrics_bm(i,data_bm)
    
  }
  
  data_bm=data_bm[-c(1,2),]
  data_bm$scenario=as.factor(list_scenario[data_bm$scenario])
  
  
  data_bm$origin=as.factor(list_origin[(data_bm$origin+1)])
  data_bm$life_cycle=as.factor(list_life_cycle[(data_bm$life_cycle+1)])
  data_bm$dmi_scheme=as.factor(list_dmi_scenario[(data_bm$dmi_scheme)])
  
  data_all$mu_back=1
  data_all=rbind(data_all,data_bm)
  
  data_all$life_cycle2=as.character(data_all$life_cycle)
  data_all$life_cycle2[data_all$mig_rate==0]="isolated"
  data_all$life_cycle2=as.factor(data_all$life_cycle2)
  data_all$rep2=data_all$rep
  data_all$rep2[data_all$life_cycle=="mig-sel"&data_all$mig_rate==0]=100+data_all$rep2[data_all$life_cycle=="mig-sel"&data_all$mig_rate==0]
}
```

Save into a single file and load the summary file
```{r save data and load from summary file}
if (load_from_raw_file&hasPopFile){
  write.table(x=data_all,file = "all_data_summary.csv",row.names = FALSE)
}


data_all=read.table(file = "all_data_summary.csv",header = TRUE)
data_all$origin=factor(data_all$origin)
data_all$life_cycle=factor(data_all$life_cycle)
data_all$scenario=factor(data_all$scenario)
data_all$dmi_scheme=factor(data_all$dmi_scheme)


```


Check for duplicates
```{r check duplicate}
to_checkk=data_all$seed[data_all$generations==500000][duplicated(data_all$seed[data_all$generations==500000])]
print(to_checkk)
#View(data_all[data_all$generations==500000&data_all$seed%in%to_checkk,])
#data_all=data_all[order(data_all$seed),]
```

# Analysis of the simulations
## Analysis of the isolated case

Subset the data to select only the isolated case, and check which parameters are variable
```{r select data isolated case no ini pref, paged.print=FALSE}
data_temp=data_all[data_all$mig_rate==0&data_all$nb_ind==10000&data_all$nb_dim==1&data_all$generations%in% seq(100000,500000,100000)&data_all$fit_alt==0.1&data_all$initial_pref==1,]
display_constant(data_temp )
```

Distribution of preference every 100k generations
```{r distribution preference no ini pref}

hist(data_temp$pref_f1[data_temp$generations==100000],freq = TRUE,breaks = seq(0,1,.05))
hist(data_temp$pref_f1[data_temp$generations==200000],freq = TRUE,breaks = seq(0,1,.05))
hist(data_temp$pref_f1[data_temp$generations==300000],freq = TRUE,breaks = seq(0,1,.05))
hist(data_temp$pref_f1[data_temp$generations==400000],freq = TRUE,breaks = seq(0,1,.05))
hist(data_temp$pref_f1[data_temp$generations==500000],freq = TRUE,breaks = seq(0,1,.05))

```

Subset the data to select only the neutral case, starting with strong initial preference, and check which parameters are variable
```{r select data isolated case ini strg pref, paged.print=FALSE}
data_temp=data_all[data_all$mig_rate==0&data_all$nb_ind==10000&data_all$nb_dim==1&data_all$generations%in% seq(100000,500000,100000)&data_all$fit_alt==0.1&data_all$initial_pref==0.0001,]
display_constant(data_temp )

```

Distribution of preference every 100k generations
```{r distribution preference isolated case ini strg pref}
hist(data_temp$pref_f1[data_temp$generations==100000],freq = TRUE,breaks = seq(0,1,.05))
hist(data_temp$pref_f1[data_temp$generations==200000],freq = TRUE,breaks = seq(0,1,.05))
hist(data_temp$pref_f1[data_temp$generations==300000],freq = TRUE,breaks = seq(0,1,.05))
hist(data_temp$pref_f1[data_temp$generations==400000],freq = TRUE,breaks = seq(0,1,.05))
hist(data_temp$pref_f1[data_temp$generations==500000],freq = TRUE,breaks = seq(0,1,.05))
```



## Effect of migration rate

Subset the data to select only the default case, and check which parameters are variable
```{r select data default, paged.print=FALSE}
data_temp0=data_all[data_all$nb_ind==10000&data_all$fit_alt==0.1&data_all$ep_dmi==0.1&data_all$var_cost==0&data_all$scenario=="all"&data_all$initial_cost==100&data_all$origin=="Ancestral"&data_all$rec_rate==0.001&data_all$nb_dim==1&data_all$nb_dmi==50&data_all$nb_loci==500&data_all$mut_rate==10^(-6)&data_all$ep_FL==2&data_all$mu_back==1&data_all$mig_rate %in% c(0,0.00005,0.0005,0.005,0.005,0.05,0.2)&data_all$generations<500001,]
display_constant(data_temp0)
data_temp=data_temp0[data_temp0$rep<31,]
data_temp$mig_rate=factor(paste("m =",data_temp$mig_rate),levels = c("m = 0", "m = 5e-05","m = 5e-04", "m = 0.005", "m = 0.05", "m = 0.2"))
```

Display different metrics for different migration rates; Figure S4 Figure S12
```{r effect migration}
#pdf("Figure/effect_of_migration.pdf",width=10,height=6)
ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pref_m1,symbol=as.factor(rep2),col=as.factor(life_cycle2)))+geom_line(alpha=0.2)+theme_bw()+facet_wrap(~mig_rate,ncol = 3,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean choosiness")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pref_m1,group=life_cycle2),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("black","orange","purple"))+coord_trans(y="log10")+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")+scale_y_continuous(labels=c(1,0.1,0.01,0.001),breaks=c(1,0.1,0.01,0.001))

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m1_DI,symbol=as.factor(rep2),col=as.factor(life_cycle2)))+geom_line(alpha=0.2)+theme_bw()+facet_wrap(~as.factor(mig_rate),ncol = 3,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean phenotype")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m1_DI,group=life_cycle2),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("black","orange","purple"))+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")+geom_hline(aes(yintercept = opt_one_DI*(1-mig_rate)+opt_two_DI*(mig_rate)),linetype="dashed",col="black")

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-F1_m1f2,symbol=as.factor(rep2),col=as.factor(life_cycle2)))+geom_line(alpha=0.2)+theme_bw()+facet_wrap(~as.factor(mig_rate),ncol = 3,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean hybrid load")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-F1_m1f2,group=life_cycle2),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("black","orange","purple"))+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=fit_eco_m1,symbol=as.factor(rep2),col=as.factor(life_cycle2)))+geom_line(alpha=0.2)+theme_bw()+facet_wrap(~as.factor(mig_rate),ncol = 3,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean ecological fitness")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=fit_eco_m1,group=life_cycle2),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("black","orange","purple"))+coord_trans(y="log10")+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")+scale_y_continuous(labels=c(1,0.75,0.1,0.01,0.001),breaks=c(1,0.75,0.1,0.01,0.001))

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2),symbol=as.factor(rep2),col=as.factor(life_cycle2)))+theme_bw()+geom_line(alpha=0.2)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(mig_rate),ncol = 3,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean corrected hybrid load")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2),group=life_cycle2),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("black","orange","purple"))+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")


ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=log((F1_m1f2))/log(1-ep_dmi)/nb_dmi,symbol=as.factor(rep2),col=as.factor(life_cycle2)))+theme_bw()+geom_line(alpha=0.2)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(mig_rate),ncol = 3,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean proportion of fixed effective DMI")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=log((F1_m1f2))/log(1-ep_dmi)/nb_dmi,group=life_cycle2),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("black","orange","purple"))+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")

#ggplot(data_temp[data_temp$life_cycle=="sel-mig",],aes(x=1-(2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2),y=pref_m1,symbol=as.factor(rep2),col=as.factor(rep2)))+theme_bw()+geom_path(alpha=1)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(mig_rate),ncol = 3,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean choosiness")+xlab("Mean corrected hybrid load")+coord_trans(y="log10")+scale_x_continuous(name="Mean corrected hybrid load")+scale_y_continuous(labels=c(1,0.1,0.01,0.001),breaks=c(1,0.1,0.01,0.001))+labs(title = "Adult dispersal")

#ggplot(data_temp[data_temp$life_cycle=="mig-sel",],aes(x=1-(2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2),y=pref_m1,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(rep)))+geom_path(alpha=1)+theme_bw()+facet_wrap(~as.factor(mig_rate),ncol = 3,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean choosiness")+xlab("Mean corrected hybrid load")+coord_trans(y="log10")+scale_x_continuous(name="Mean corrected hybrid load")+scale_y_continuous(labels=c(1,0.1,0.01,0.001),breaks=c(1,0.1,0.01,0.001))+labs(title="Juvenile dispersal")


#dev.off()
```





Select data for Figure 2
```{r select data for figure 2, paged.print=FALSE}
data_temp2=data_temp0[data_temp0$mig_rate %in% c(0,0.0005,0.05,0.2),]
data_temp2$m=factor(paste("m =",data_temp2$mig_rate),levels = c("m = 0", "m = 5e-04", "m = 0.05", "m = 0.2"))
```


Count number of case for M00.1, where srict mate choice and dmi accumulation happened
```{r count number of case for m 0.2 with strict mate choice and dmi accumulation}
k1=(data_temp2$pref_f1[data_temp2$generations==500000&data_temp2$mig_rate==0.2]+data_temp2$pref_m1[data_temp2$generations==500000&data_temp2$mig_rate==0.2])/2
k2=(1-(2*data_temp2$F1_m1f2+2*data_temp2$F1_m2f1)/(data_temp2$fit_dmi_m1+data_temp2$fit_dmi_m2+data_temp2$fit_dmi_f1+data_temp2$fit_dmi_f2))[data_temp2$generations==500000&data_temp2$mig_rate==0.2]
print(c(sum(k1<10^-3),sum(k2[k1<10^-3]>0.097)))
```

```{r data underlying figure 2}
ggplot(data_temp2,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m1_DI,symbol=as.factor(rep2),col=as.factor(life_cycle2)))+geom_line(alpha=0.1)+facet_wrap(~m,ncol = 4)+theme_bw()+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean phenotype")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m1_DI,group=life_cycle2),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("black","orange","purple"))+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")+geom_hline(aes(yintercept = opt_one_DI*(1-mig_rate)+opt_two_DI*(mig_rate)),linetype="dashed",col="black")+theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = -.04, vjust = -7))+labs(title="A/")

ggplot(data_temp2,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-F1_m1f2,symbol=as.factor(rep2),col=as.factor(life_cycle2)))+geom_line(alpha=0.1)+facet_wrap(~m,ncol = 4)+theme_bw()+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean hybrid load")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-F1_m1f2,group=life_cycle2),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("black","orange","purple"))+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")

ggplot(data_temp2,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=fit_eco_m1,symbol=as.factor(rep2),col=as.factor(life_cycle2)))+geom_line(alpha=0.1)+facet_wrap(~m,ncol = 4)+theme_bw()+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean ecological fitness")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=fit_eco_m1,group=life_cycle2),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("black","orange","purple"))+coord_trans(y="log10")+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")+scale_y_continuous(labels=c(1,0.75,0.1,0.01,0.001),breaks=c(1,0.75,0.1,0.01,0.001))

ggplot(data_temp2,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2),symbol=as.factor(rep2),col=as.factor(life_cycle2)))+geom_line(alpha=0.1)+facet_wrap(~m,ncol = 4)+theme_bw()+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean corrected hybrid load")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2),group=life_cycle2),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("black","orange","purple"))+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")+theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = -.04, vjust = -7))+labs(title="C/")
```

Make legend figure 2
```{r make legend figure 2}
#pdf("Figure/effect_of_migration_lgd.pdf",width=7,height=3.5)

data_temp2$life_cycle2=as.character(data_temp2$life_cycle2)
data_temp2$life_cycle2[data_temp2$life_cycle2=="mig-sel"]="Juvenile dispersal"
data_temp2$life_cycle2[data_temp2$life_cycle2=="sel-mig"]="Adult dispersal"
data_temp2$life_cycle2[data_temp2$life_cycle2=="isolated"]="Isolated"
data_temp2$life_cycle2=factor(data_temp2$life_cycle2,levels = c("Isolated","Juvenile dispersal","Adult dispersal"))

ggplot(data_temp2,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=log((F1_m1f2))/log(1-ep_dmi)/nb_dmi,symbol=as.factor(rep2),col=as.factor(life_cycle2)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(mig_rate),ncol = 3,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme(legend.position = "bottom")+ylab("Mean proportion of fixed effective DMI")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=log((F1_m1f2))/log(1-ep_dmi)/nb_dmi,group=life_cycle2),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("black","orange","purple"))+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")+labs(col="Life cycle")
#dev.off()
```

Compute the mean and quantile for the 100 replicates 
```{r compute mean and quantile for fig2}
data_temp2$iterator=paste(data_temp2$life_cycle2, data_temp2$mig_rate,data_temp2$generations)
data_temp5=NULL
for (i in unique(data_temp2$iterator)){
  data_temp4=data_temp2[data_temp2$iterator==i,]
  data_temp5=rbind(data_temp5,c(data_temp4$generations[1]/data_temp4$nb_ind[1],data_temp4$mig_rate[1],data_temp4$life_cycle2[1], mean(data_temp4$pref_m1), mean(data_temp4$pheno_m1_DI),mean(1-(2*data_temp4$F1_m1f2)/(data_temp4$fit_dmi_m1+data_temp4$fit_dmi_f2)),
                                quantile(data_temp4$pref_m1,0.1), quantile(data_temp4$pheno_m1_DI,0.1),quantile(1-(2*data_temp4$F1_m1f2)/(data_temp4$fit_dmi_m1+data_temp4$fit_dmi_f2),0.1),quantile(data_temp4$pref_m1,0.9), quantile(data_temp4$pheno_m1_DI,0.9),quantile(1-(2*data_temp4$F1_m1f2)/(data_temp4$fit_dmi_m1+data_temp4$fit_dmi_f2),0.9)))
}
data_temp5=as.data.frame(data_temp5)
colnames(data_temp5)=c("generations","mig_rate","life_cycle","m_pref","m_pheno","m_hyb","lq_pref","lq_pheno","lq_hyb","hq_pref","hq_pheno","hq_hyb")

data_temp5$mig_rate=factor(paste("m =",data_temp5$mig_rate),levels = c("m = 0", "m = 5e-04", "m = 0.05", "m = 0.2"))

data_temp3=data_temp2[data_temp2$generations==500000,]
data_temp5$life_cycle=factor(c("Isolated","Juvenile","Adult")[data_temp5$life_cycle],levels=c("Isolated","Juvenile","Adult"))
```



Figure 2
```{r figure 2 with quantile instead}
#pdf("Figure/new_figure2.pdf",width=7,height=3.5)
ggplot(data_temp5,aes(x=generations,y=m_pref,col=as.factor(life_cycle)))+geom_line()+facet_wrap(~as.factor(mig_rate),ncol = 4,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+theme_bw()+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean choosiness")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+scale_color_manual(values=c("black","orange","purple"))+coord_trans(y="log10")+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")+scale_y_continuous(labels=c(1,0.1,0.01,0.001),breaks=c(1,0.1,0.01,0.001))+theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = -.04, vjust = -7))+labs(title="B/")+geom_line(aes(x=generations,y=lq_pref),linetype="dashed")+geom_line(aes(x=generations,y=hq_pref),linetype="dashed")

ggplot(data_temp5,aes(x=generations,y=m_pheno,col=as.factor(life_cycle)))+geom_line()+facet_wrap(~as.factor(mig_rate),ncol = 4,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme_bw()+theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean phenotype")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+scale_color_manual(values=c("black","orange","purple"))+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")+geom_hline(aes(yintercept = 5*(1-mig_rate)-5*(mig_rate)),linetype="dashed",col="gray")+theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = -.04, vjust = -7))+labs(title="A/")+geom_line(aes(x=generations,y=lq_pheno),linetype="dashed")+geom_line(aes(x=generations,y=hq_pheno),linetype="dashed")+theme(legend.position = c(0.13,0.25))+labs(col="Dispersal stage")

ggplot(data_temp5,aes(x=generations,y=m_hyb,col=as.factor(life_cycle)))+geom_line()+facet_wrap(~as.factor(mig_rate),ncol = 4,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+theme_bw()+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean corrected hybrid load")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+scale_color_manual(values=c("black","orange","purple"))+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")+theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = -.04, vjust = -7))+labs(title="C/")+geom_line(aes(x=generations,y=lq_hyb),linetype="dashed")+geom_line(aes(x=generations,y=hq_hyb),linetype="dashed")

#ggplot(data_temp3,aes(x=pheno_m1_DI))+geom_histogram(aes(y = ..density..))+facet_grid(life_cycle~as.factor(mig_rate),labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))

#ggplot(data_temp3,aes(x=pref_m1))+geom_histogram(aes(y = ..density..))+facet_grid(life_cycle~as.factor(mig_rate),labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))

#ggplot(data_temp3,aes(x=log10(pref_m1)))+geom_histogram(aes(y = ..density..))+facet_grid(life_cycle~as.factor(mig_rate),labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))

#ggplot(data_temp3,aes(x=1-(2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2)))+geom_histogram(aes(y = ..density..))+facet_grid(life_cycle~as.factor(mig_rate),labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))

#dev.off()
```

Compute time for local adaptation to establish 
```{r compute time delay between different barrier for LA, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# the threshold here is defined as 25 of the extremum value

data_time=rep(NULL,7)
data_temp0=data_all[data_all$nb_ind==10000&data_all$fit_alt==0.1&data_all$ep_dmi==0.1&data_all$var_cost==0&data_all$scenario=="all"&data_all$initial_cost==100&data_all$origin=="Ancestral"&data_all$rec_rate==0.001&data_all$nb_dim==1&data_all$nb_dmi==50&data_all$nb_loci==500&data_all$mut_rate==10^(-6)&data_all$ep_FL==2&data_all$mu_back==1&data_all$generations<=500000&data_all$mig_rate<0.5,]
data_temp00=data_temp0[data_temp0$generations==500000,]
for (i in unique(paste(data_temp0$mig_rate,data_temp0$life_cycle2))){
  threshold=0.9
  mig=as.numeric(unlist(strsplit(i," "))[1])
  lc=unlist(strsplit(i," "))[2]
  
  data_temp_m=data_temp00[data_temp00$mig_rate==mig&data_temp00$life_cycle2==lc,]
  data_temp_n=data_temp0[data_temp0$mig_rate==mig&data_temp0$life_cycle2==lc,]
  
  mean_pheno=mean(data_temp_m$pheno_m1_DI)

  test_pheno=sapply(unique(data_temp_m$rep2), function(x) min(which(data_temp_n$pheno_m1_DI[data_temp_n$rep2==x]>threshold*mean_pheno)))
  
  data_time=rbind(data_time,cbind(cbind(rep(mig,length(test_pheno)),rep(lc,length(test_pheno))),unique(data_temp_n$generations)[test_pheno]))
  
}
data_time=as.data.frame(data_time)
colnames(data_time)=c("mig","lc","time_la")

data_time$time_la=as.numeric(data_time$time_la)

data_time$mig=as.numeric(data_time$mig)
```

```{r}
ggplot(data_time[data_time$mig %in% c(0,0.0005,0.05,0.2),],aes(x=log10(time_la)))+geom_histogram()+theme_bw()+labs(x="Mean time to reach 90% of the mean final phenotypic value", y="Counts")+facet_grid(mig~lc)
```
```{r}
table(data_time$time_la,data_time$mig)
```

Compute time delay between different barriers
```{r compute time delay between different barrier, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# the threshold her is defined as 25 of the extremum value
data_time=rep(NULL,7)
data_temp0=data_all[data_all$nb_ind==10000&data_all$fit_alt==0.1&data_all$ep_dmi==0.1&data_all$var_cost==0&data_all$scenario=="all"&data_all$initial_cost==100&data_all$origin=="Ancestral"&data_all$rec_rate==0.001&data_all$nb_dim==1&data_all$nb_dmi==50&data_all$nb_loci==500&data_all$mut_rate==10^(-6)&data_all$ep_FL==2&data_all$mu_back==1&data_all$generations<=500000,]

for (i in unique(paste(data_temp0$mig_rate,data_temp0$life_cycle2))){
  threshold=0.75
  mig=as.numeric(unlist(strsplit(i," "))[1])
  lc=unlist(strsplit(i," "))[2]
  data_temp00=data_temp0[data_temp0$generations==500000,]
  data_temp00$hyb_load=(1-(data_temp00$F1_m1f2+data_temp00$F1_m2f1)/(data_temp00$fit_dmi_m1/2+data_temp00$fit_dmi_f2/2+data_temp00$fit_dmi_m2/2+data_temp00$fit_dmi_f1/2))
  data_temp00$pref=(data_temp00$pref_f1+data_temp00$pref_m1)/2
  
  
  data_temp_m=data_temp0[data_temp0$mig_rate==mig&data_temp0$life_cycle2==lc,]
  
  data_temp_m$hyb_load=(1-(data_temp_m$F1_m1f2+data_temp_m$F1_m2f1)/(data_temp_m$fit_dmi_m1/2+data_temp_m$fit_dmi_f2/2+data_temp_m$fit_dmi_m2/2+data_temp_m$fit_dmi_f1/2))
  data_temp_m$pref=(data_temp_m$pref_f1+data_temp_m$pref_m1)/2
  mean_pref=mean(data_temp_m$pref)
  mean_pheno=mean(data_temp_m$pheno_m1_DI)
  mean_hyb=mean(data_temp_m$hyb_load)
  
  
  test_pref=sapply(unique(data_temp_m$rep2), function(x) min(which(data_temp_m$pref[data_temp_m$rep2==x]<exp(threshold*log(mean_pref)))))
  test_pheno=sapply(unique(data_temp_m$rep2), function(x) min(which(data_temp_m$pheno_m1_DI[data_temp_m$rep2==x]>threshold*mean_pheno)))
  test_hyb=sapply(unique(data_temp_m$rep2), function(x) min(which(1-(2*data_temp_m$F1_m1f2[data_temp_m$rep2==x])/(data_temp_m$fit_dmi_m1[data_temp_m$rep==x]+data_temp_m$fit_dmi_f2[data_temp_m$rep2==x])>threshold*mean_hyb)))
  
  test_pref2=sapply(unique(data_temp_m$rep2), function(x) min(which(data_temp_m$pref[data_temp_m$rep2==x]<exp(min(log(data_temp00$pref))*0.25))))
  test_hyb2=sapply(unique(data_temp_m$rep2), function(x) min(which(1-(2*data_temp_m$F1_m1f2[data_temp_m$rep2==x])/(data_temp_m$fit_dmi_m1[data_temp_m$rep==x]+data_temp_m$fit_dmi_f2[data_temp_m$rep2==x])>(max(data_temp00$hyb_load)*0.25))))
  
  data_temp_n=data_temp_m[data_temp_m$generations==500000,]
  col_pref=data_temp_n$pref<exp(min(log(data_temp00$pref))*0.25)
  col_ada=data_temp_n$pheno_m1_DI>(max(data_temp00$pheno_m1_DI)*0.25)
  col_hyb=data_temp_n$hyb_load>(max(data_temp00$hyb_load)*0.25)
  
  
  data_time=rbind(data_time,cbind(cbind(rep(mig,length(col_ada)),rep(lc,length(col_ada))),cbind(cbind(cbind(cbind(cbind(cbind(cbind(unique(data_temp_m$generations)[test_pheno] ,cbind(unique(data_temp_m$generations)[test_pref],unique(data_temp_m$generations)[test_hyb])),col_ada),col_pref),col_hyb)),data_temp_n$pref),data_temp_n$hyb_load),cbind(unique(data_temp_m$generations)[test_pref2]),cbind(unique(data_temp_m$generations)[test_hyb2])))
  
}
data_time=as.data.frame(data_time)
colnames(data_time)=c("mig","lc","time_la","time_mc","time_hyb","col_la","col_mc","col_hyb","pref","hyb_load","time_mc2","time_hyb2")

data_time$pref=as.numeric(data_time$pref)
data_time$hyb_load=as.numeric(data_time$hyb_load)
data_time$time_la=as.numeric(data_time$time_la)
data_time$time_mc=as.numeric(data_time$time_mc)
data_time$time_hyb=as.numeric(data_time$time_hyb)

data_time$mig=as.numeric(data_time$mig)

data_time$time_mc[is.na(data_time$time_mc)]=500001
data_time$time_hyb[is.na(data_time$time_hyb)]=500001
```

Display delay between formation of the different barriers Figure S8
```{r display delay between apparition of different barrier}
#pdf("Figure/time_delay.pdf",width=6,height=4.5)
ggplot(data_time,aes(x=-log10(pref),y=hyb_load,col=time_mc-time_la,shape=time_mc-time_la>0))+geom_point()+facet_grid(col_mc~col_la,labeller = "label_both")+  scale_colour_gradient2(low = "yellow",mid = "gray",high = "blue")+theme_bw()+labs(col="Time difference",shape="MC after LA",x="-Log mean choosiness", y="Mean corrected hybrid load")
ggplot(data_time,aes(x=-log10(pref),y=hyb_load,col=time_hyb-time_la,shape=time_hyb-time_la>0))+geom_point()+facet_grid(col_hyb~col_la,labeller = "label_both")+  scale_colour_gradient2(low = "yellow",mid = "gray",high = "blue")+theme_bw()+labs(col="Time difference",shape="DMI after LA",x="-Log mean choosiness", y="Mean corrected hybrid load")
ggplot(data_time,aes(x=-log10(pref),y=hyb_load,col=time_hyb-time_mc,shape=time_hyb-time_mc>0))+geom_point()+facet_grid(col_hyb~col_mc,labeller = "label_both")+  scale_colour_gradient2(low = "yellow",mid = "gray",high = "blue")+theme_bw()+labs(col="Time difference",shape="DMI after MC",x="-Log mean choosiness", y="Mean corrected hybrid load")
ggplot(data_time[data_time$col_hyb==1&data_time$col_mc==1,],aes(x=-log10(pref),y=hyb_load,col=time_hyb-time_mc,shape=time_hyb-time_mc>0))+geom_point()+facet_wrap(~mig,labeller = "label_both")+  scale_colour_gradient2(low = "yellow",mid = "gray",high = "blue")+theme_bw()+labs(col="Time difference",shape="DMI after MC",x="-Log mean choosiness", y="Mean corrected hybrid load")

#ggplot(data_time,aes(x=-log(pref),y=hyb_load,col=time_hyb2-time_mc2,shape=time_hyb2-time_mc2>0))+geom_point()+facet_grid(col_hyb~col_mc,labeller = "label_both")+  scale_colour_gradient2(low = "yellow",mid = "gray",high = "blue")+theme_bw()+labs(col="Time difference",shape="DMI after MC",x="-Log mean choosiness", y="Mean corrected hybrid load")
#ggplot(data_time[data_time$col_hyb==1&data_time$col_mc==1,],aes(x=-log(pref),y=hyb_load,col=time_hyb2-time_mc2,shape=time_hyb2-time_mc2>0))+geom_point()+facet_wrap(~mig,labeller = "label_both")+  scale_colour_gradient2(low = "yellow",mid = "gray",high = "blue")+theme_bw()+labs(col="Time difference",shape="DMI after MC",x="-Log mean choosiness", y="Mean corrected hybrid load")
ggplot(data_time,aes(x=-log10(pref),y=hyb_load,col=time_hyb-time_mc,shape=time_hyb-time_mc>0))+geom_point()+  scale_colour_gradient2(low = "yellow",mid = "gray",high = "blue")+theme_bw()+labs(col="Time difference",shape="DMI after MC",x="-Log mean choosiness", y="Mean corrected hybrid load",title ="A/")+geom_hline(yintercept = max(data_temp00$hyb_load)*0.25)+geom_vline(xintercept = -min(log10(data_temp00$pref))*0.25)

data_time$Accumulation_DMI =data_time$col_hyb
data_time$StrictMC =data_time$col_mc
data_time$Accumulation_DMI[data_time$Accumulation_DMI=="0"]="No DMI accumulation"
data_time$Accumulation_DMI[data_time$Accumulation_DMI=="1"]="DMI accumulation"
data_time$StrictMC[data_time$StrictMC=="0"]="No evolution strict mate choice"
data_time$StrictMC[data_time$StrictMC=="1"]="Evolution strict mate choice"
data_time$Accumulation_DMI=factor(data_time$Accumulation_DMI,levels = c("No DMI accumulation","DMI accumulation"))
data_time$StrictMC=factor(data_time$StrictMC,levels=c("No evolution strict mate choice","Evolution strict mate choice"))

ggplot(data_time,aes(x=time_mc-time_la,y=time_hyb-time_la))+geom_point()+facet_grid(Accumulation_DMI~StrictMC)+  scale_colour_gradient2(low = "yellow",mid = "gray",high = "blue")+theme_bw()+labs(col="Time difference",shape="MC after LA",x="Delay between formation of the LA and MC barrier", y="Delay between formation of the LA and DMI barrier",title="B/")
#dev.off()
```

Display the metrics for both populations - the population in the A environment is given on the left of each facet and the population in the B environment on the right
```{r display effect migration both pop}
#pdf("Figure/effect_of_migration_both_pop.pdf",width=10,height=6)
ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pref_m1,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(life_cycle)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+geom_line(aes(x=52+generations/nb_ind,y=pref_m2,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(life_cycle)),alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(mig_rate),ncol = 3,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean preference")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pref_m1,group=life_cycle),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+stat_summary(aes(x=52+generations/nb_ind,y=pref_m2,group=life_cycle),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple"))+coord_trans(y="log10")+geom_vline(xintercept = c(51),col="black")+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)",labels=c(0,25,"50|",0,25,50),breaks = c(0,25,50,52,77,102))+scale_y_continuous(labels=c(1,0.1,0.01,0.001),breaks=c(1,0.1,0.01,0.001))

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m1_DI,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(life_cycle)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+geom_line(aes(x=52+generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m2_DI,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(life_cycle)),alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(mig_rate),ncol = 3,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean phenotype")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m1_DI,group=life_cycle),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+stat_summary(aes(x=52+generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m2_DI,group=life_cycle),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple"))+geom_vline(xintercept = c(51),col="black")+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)",labels=c(0,25,"50|",0,25,50),breaks = c(0,25,50,52,77,102))+geom_hline(aes(yintercept = opt_one_DI*(1-mig_rate)+opt_two_DI*(mig_rate)),linetype="dashed",col="black")+geom_hline(aes(yintercept = opt_two_DI*(1-mig_rate)+opt_one_DI*(mig_rate)),linetype="dashed",col="black")

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-F1_m1f2,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(life_cycle)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+geom_line(aes(x=52+generations/nb_ind,y=1-F1_m2f1,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(life_cycle)),alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(mig_rate),ncol = 3,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean hybrid load")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-F1_m1f2,group=life_cycle),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+stat_summary(aes(x=52+generations/nb_ind,y=1-F1_m2f1,group=life_cycle),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple"))+geom_vline(xintercept = c(51),col="black")+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)",labels=c(0,25,"50|",0,25,50),breaks = c(0,25,50,52,77,102))

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=fit_eco_m1,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(life_cycle)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+geom_line(aes(x=52+generations/nb_ind,y=fit_eco_m2,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(life_cycle)),alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(mig_rate),ncol = 3,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean ecological fitness")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=fit_eco_m1,group=life_cycle),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+stat_summary(aes(x=52+generations/nb_ind,y=fit_eco_m2,group=life_cycle),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple"))+coord_trans(y="log10")+geom_vline(xintercept = c(51),col="black")+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)",labels=c(0,25,"50|",0,25,50),breaks = c(0,25,50,52,77,102))+scale_y_continuous(labels=c(1,0.75,0.1,0.01,0.001),breaks=c(1,0.75,0.1,0.01,0.001))

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2),symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(life_cycle)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+geom_line(aes(x=52+generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m2f1)/(fit_dmi_m2+fit_dmi_f1),symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(life_cycle)),alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(mig_rate),ncol = 3,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean corrected hybrid load")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2),group=life_cycle),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+stat_summary(aes(x=52+generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m2f1)/(fit_dmi_m2+fit_dmi_f1),group=life_cycle),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple"))+geom_vline(xintercept = c(51),col="black")+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)",labels=c(0,25,"50|",0,25,50),breaks = c(0,25,50,52,77,102))

#dev.off()
```


Subset the data for the adult dispersal case (rest is default), and check which parameters are variable
```{r select data adult dispersal, paged.print=FALSE}
data_temp=data_all[data_all$nb_ind==10000&data_all$fit_alt==0.1&data_all$ep_dmi==0.1&data_all$var_cost==0&data_all$scenario=="all"&data_all$initial_cost==100&data_all$origin=="Ancestral"&data_all$rec_rate==0.001&data_all$nb_dim==1&data_all$nb_dmi==50&data_all$nb_loci==500&data_all$mut_rate==10^(-6)&data_all$ep_FL==2&data_all$mu_back==1&data_all$mig_rate<0.5&data_all$life_cycle=="sel-mig",]
display_constant(data_temp )
```

Display the effect of migration only for the adult dispersal life cycle, each rep being a different color
```{r effect migration adult dis}
#pdf("Figure/effect_of_migration_only_adult_mig.pdf",width=8,height=5)
ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pref_m1,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(rep)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(mig_rate),ncol = 3,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean preference")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pref_m1,group=life_cycle),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+coord_trans(y="log10")+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")+scale_y_continuous(labels=c(1,0.1,0.01,0.001),breaks=c(1,0.1,0.01,0.001))


ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2),symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(rep)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(mig_rate),ncol = 3,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean hybrid load")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2),group=life_cycle),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")

#dev.off()
```

## Effect of back mutations
Subset the data to select case with normal and back migration, only for specific mutation rate
```{r getting data ancestral start, paged.print=FALSE}
data_temp=data_all[data_all$nb_ind==10000&data_all$fit_alt==0.1&data_all$ep_dmi==0.1&data_all$var_cost==0&data_all$scenario=="all"&data_all$initial_cost==100&data_all$origin %in% c("Ancestral","Extension")&data_all$rec_rate==0.001&data_all$nb_dim==1&data_all$nb_dmi==50&data_all$nb_loci==500&data_all$mut_rate==10^(-6)&data_all$ep_FL==2&(data_all$mig_rate %in% c(0.0005,0.005,0.2)|(data_all$mig_rate==0& data_all$life_cycle=="sel-mig")),]

display_constant(data_temp )

# rename life cycle to distinguish symmetric and asymmetric case
data_temp$life_cycle=as.character(data_temp$life_cycle)
data_temp$life_cycle[data_temp$mu_back==1&data_temp$life_cycle=="sel-mig"]="sel-mig sym_mu"
data_temp$life_cycle[data_temp$mu_back==1&data_temp$life_cycle=="mig-sel"]="mig-sel sym_mu"
data_temp$life_cycle[data_temp$mu_back==0.01&data_temp$life_cycle=="sel-mig"]="sel-mig asym_mu"
data_temp$life_cycle[data_temp$mu_back==0.01&data_temp$life_cycle=="mig-sel"]="mig-sel asym_mu"
data_temp$life_cycle=factor(data_temp$life_cycle,levels=c("sel-mig sym_mu","mig-sel sym_mu","sel-mig asym_mu","mig-sel asym_mu"))
```

Display effect of back mutation in both population - the population in the A environment is given on the left of each facet and the population in the B environment on the right
```{r figure back mutation both pop}
#pdf("Figure/effect_of_back_migration.pdf",width=10,height=6)
ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pref_m1,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(life_cycle)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+geom_line(aes(x=102+generations/nb_ind,y=pref_m2,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(life_cycle)),alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(mig_rate),ncol = 2,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme(legend.position = "bottom")+ylab("Mean preference")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pref_m1,group=life_cycle),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+stat_summary(aes(x=102+generations/nb_ind,y=pref_m2,group=life_cycle),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple","red","blue","yellow","cyan"))+coord_trans(y="log10")+geom_vline(xintercept = c(101),col="black")+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)",labels=c(0,50,"100|",0,50,100),breaks = c(0,50,100,102,152,202))+scale_y_continuous(labels=c(1,0.1,0.01,0.001),breaks=c(1,0.1,0.01,0.001))

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m1_DI,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(life_cycle)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+geom_line(aes(x=102+generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m2_DI,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(life_cycle)),alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(mig_rate),ncol = 2,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme(legend.position = "bottom")+ylab("Mean phenotype")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m1_DI,group=life_cycle),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+stat_summary(aes(x=102+generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m2_DI,group=life_cycle),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple","red","blue","yellow","cyan"))+geom_vline(xintercept = c(101),col="black")+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)",labels=c(0,50,"100|",0,50,100),breaks = c(0,50,100,102,152,202))+geom_hline(aes(yintercept = opt_one_DI*(1-mig_rate)+opt_two_DI*(mig_rate)),linetype="dashed",col="black")+geom_hline(aes(yintercept = opt_two_DI*(1-mig_rate)+opt_one_DI*(mig_rate)),linetype="dashed",col="black")
```
