```{r figure back mutation both pop}
ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-F1_m1f2,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(life_cycle)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+geom_line(aes(x=102+generations/nb_ind,y=1-F1_m2f1,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(life_cycle)),alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(mig_rate),ncol = 2,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme(legend.position = "bottom")+ylab("Mean hybrid load")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-F1_m1f2,group=life_cycle),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+stat_summary(aes(x=102+generations/nb_ind,y=1-F1_m2f1,group=life_cycle),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple","red","blue","yellow","cyan"))+geom_vline(xintercept = c(101),col="black")+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)",labels=c(0,50,"100|",0,50,100),breaks = c(0,50,100,102,152,202))

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=fit_eco_m1,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(life_cycle)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+geom_line(aes(x=102+generations/nb_ind,y=fit_eco_m2,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(life_cycle)),alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(mig_rate),ncol = 2,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme(legend.position = "bottom")+ylab("Mean ecological fitness")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=fit_eco_m1,group=life_cycle),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+stat_summary(aes(x=102+generations/nb_ind,y=fit_eco_m2,group=life_cycle),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple","red","blue","yellow","cyan"))+coord_trans(y="log10")+geom_vline(xintercept = c(101),col="black")+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)",labels=c(0,50,"100|",0,50,100),breaks = c(0,50,100,102,152,202))+scale_y_continuous(labels=c(1,0.75,0.1,0.01,0.001),breaks=c(1,0.75,0.1,0.01,0.001))

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2),symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(life_cycle)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+geom_line(aes(x=102+generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m2f1)/(fit_dmi_m2+fit_dmi_f1),symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(life_cycle)),alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(mig_rate),ncol = 2,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme(legend.position = "bottom")+ylab("Mean corrected hybrid load")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2),group=life_cycle),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+stat_summary(aes(x=102+generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m2f1)/(fit_dmi_m2+fit_dmi_f1),group=life_cycle),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple","red","blue","yellow","cyan"))+geom_vline(xintercept = c(101),col="black")+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)",labels=c(0,50,"100|",0,50,100),breaks = c(0,50,100,102,152,202))

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=log((2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2))/log(1-ep_dmi),symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(life_cycle)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+geom_line(aes(x=102+generations/nb_ind,y=log((2*F1_m2f1)/(fit_dmi_m2+fit_dmi_f1))/log(1-ep_dmi),symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(life_cycle)),alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(mig_rate),ncol = 2,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme(legend.position = "bottom")+ylab("Mean number of fixed DMI")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=log((2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2))/log(1-ep_dmi),group=life_cycle),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+stat_summary(aes(x=102+generations/nb_ind,y=log((2*F1_m2f1)/(fit_dmi_m2+fit_dmi_f1))/log(1-ep_dmi),group=life_cycle),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple","red","blue","yellow","cyan"))+geom_vline(xintercept = c(101),col="black")+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)",labels=c(0,50,"100|",0,50,100),breaks = c(0,50,100,102,152,202))+geom_hline(aes(yintercept = 2/9*nb_dmi),linetype="dashed",col="black")+geom_hline(aes(yintercept = 1/2*nb_dmi),linetype="dotted",col="black")

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=log((F1_m1f2))/log(1-ep_dmi),symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(life_cycle)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+geom_line(aes(x=102+generations/nb_ind,y=log((F1_m2f1))/log(1-ep_dmi),symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(life_cycle)),alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(mig_rate),ncol = 2,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme(legend.position = "bottom")+ylab("Mean number of fixed DMI")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=log((F1_m1f2))/log(1-ep_dmi),group=life_cycle),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+stat_summary(aes(x=102+generations/nb_ind,y=log((F1_m2f1))/log(1-ep_dmi),group=life_cycle),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple","red","blue","yellow","cyan"))+geom_vline(xintercept = c(101),col="black")+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)",labels=c(0,50,"100|",0,50,100),breaks = c(0,50,100,102,152,202))+geom_hline(aes(yintercept = 2/9*nb_dmi),linetype="dashed",col="black")+geom_hline(aes(yintercept = 1/2*nb_dmi),linetype="dotted",col="black")

#dev.off()
```

Getting data for asymetric migration rate
```{r getting data SC start, paged.print=FALSE}
data_temp=data_all[data_all$nb_ind==10000&data_all$fit_alt==0.1&data_all$ep_dmi==0.1&data_all$var_cost==0&data_all$scenario=="all"&data_all$initial_cost==100&data_all$origin %in% c("Ancestral","Diverged SC","Extension","ExtensionSC")&data_all$rec_rate==0.001&data_all$nb_dim==1&data_all$nb_dmi==50&data_all$nb_loci==500&data_all$mut_rate==10^(-6)&data_all$ep_FL==2&data_all$mig_rate %in% c(0.2),]



display_constant(data_temp )

data_temp$life_cycleD=as.character(data_temp$life_cycle)
data_temp$life_cycleD[data_temp$mu_back==1&data_temp$life_cycle=="sel-mig"&data_temp$origin %in% c("Ancestral","Extension")&data_temp$initial_pref==1]="sym_mu"
data_temp$life_cycleD[data_temp$mu_back==1&data_temp$life_cycle=="mig-sel"&data_temp$origin %in% c("Ancestral","Extension")&data_temp$initial_pref==1]="sym_mu"
data_temp$life_cycleD[data_temp$mu_back==1&data_temp$life_cycle=="sel-mig"&data_temp$origin%in% c("Diverged SC","ExtensionSC")&data_temp$initial_pref<1]="sym_mu DSC"
data_temp$life_cycleD[data_temp$mu_back==1&data_temp$life_cycle=="mig-sel"&data_temp$origin%in% c("Diverged SC","ExtensionSC")&data_temp$initial_pref<1]="sym_mu DSC"

data_temp$life_cycleD[data_temp$mu_back==0.01&data_temp$life_cycle=="sel-mig"&data_temp$origin %in% c("Ancestral","Extension")&data_temp$initial_pref==1]="asym_mu"
data_temp$life_cycleD[data_temp$mu_back==0.01&data_temp$life_cycle=="mig-sel"&data_temp$origin %in% c("Ancestral","Extension")&data_temp$initial_pref==1]="asym_mu"
data_temp$life_cycleD[data_temp$mu_back==0.01&data_temp$life_cycle=="mig-sel"&data_temp$origin%in% c("Diverged SC","ExtensionSC")&data_temp$initial_pref<1]="asym_mu DSC"
data_temp$life_cycleD[data_temp$mu_back==0.01&data_temp$life_cycle=="sel-mig"&data_temp$origin%in% c("Diverged SC","ExtensionSC")&data_temp$initial_pref<1]="asym_mu DSC"
data_temp=data_temp[data_temp$life_cycleD %in% c("sym_mu","asym_mu","sym_mu DSC","asym_mu DSC"),]
data_temp$life_cycleD=factor(data_temp$life_cycleD,levels=c("sym_mu","asym_mu","sym_mu DSC","asym_mu DSC"))
data_temp=data_temp[data_temp$generations %in% unique(data_temp$generations[data_temp$generations<20000|data_temp$generations%%20000==0]),]
```



Display effect of back mutation for m=0.2 and secondary contact with initial strong preference
```{r figure SC bm}
#pdf("Figure/effect_of_back_migration_SC.pdf",width=10,height=6)
ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pref_m1,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(life_cycleD)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+geom_line(aes(x=102+generations/nb_ind,y=pref_m2,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(life_cycleD)),alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(life_cycle),ncol = 2,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme(legend.position = "bottom")+ylab("Mean preference")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pref_m1,group=life_cycleD),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+stat_summary(aes(x=102+generations/nb_ind,y=pref_m2,group=life_cycleD),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple","red","blue","yellow","cyan"))+coord_trans(y="log10")+geom_vline(xintercept = c(101),col="black")+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)",labels=c(0,50,"100|",0,50,100),breaks = c(0,50,100,102,152,202))+scale_y_continuous(labels=c(1,0.1,0.01,0.001),breaks=c(1,0.1,0.01,0.001))


ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m1_DI,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(life_cycleD)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+geom_line(aes(x=102+generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m2_DI,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(life_cycleD)),alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(life_cycle),ncol = 2,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme(legend.position = "bottom")+ylab("Mean phenotype")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m1_DI,group=life_cycleD),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+stat_summary(aes(x=102+generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m2_DI,group=life_cycleD),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple","red","blue","yellow","cyan"))+geom_vline(xintercept = c(101),col="black")+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)",labels=c(0,50,"100|",0,50,100),breaks = c(0,50,100,102,152,202))+geom_hline(aes(yintercept = opt_one_DI*(1-mig_rate)+opt_two_DI*(mig_rate)),linetype="dashed",col="black")+geom_hline(aes(yintercept = opt_two_DI*(1-mig_rate)+opt_one_DI*(mig_rate)),linetype="dashed",col="black")

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-F1_m1f2,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(life_cycleD)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+geom_line(aes(x=102+generations/nb_ind,y=1-F1_m2f1,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(life_cycleD)),alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(life_cycle),ncol = 2,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme(legend.position = "bottom")+ylab("Mean hybrid load")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-F1_m1f2,group=life_cycleD),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+stat_summary(aes(x=102+generations/nb_ind,y=1-F1_m2f1,group=life_cycleD),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple","red","blue","yellow","cyan"))+geom_vline(xintercept = c(101),col="black")+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)",labels=c(0,50,"100|",0,50,100),breaks = c(0,50,100,102,152,202))

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=fit_eco_m1,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(life_cycleD)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+geom_line(aes(x=102+generations/nb_ind,y=fit_eco_m2,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(life_cycleD)),alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(life_cycle),ncol = 2,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme(legend.position = "bottom")+ylab("Mean ecological fitness")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=fit_eco_m1,group=life_cycleD),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+stat_summary(aes(x=102+generations/nb_ind,y=fit_eco_m2,group=life_cycle),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple","red","blue","yellow","cyan"))+coord_trans(y="log10")+geom_vline(xintercept = c(101),col="black")+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)",labels=c(0,50,"100|",0,50,100),breaks = c(0,50,100,102,152,202))+scale_y_continuous(labels=c(1,0.75,0.1,0.01,0.001),breaks=c(1,0.75,0.1,0.01,0.001))

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2),symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(life_cycleD)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+geom_line(aes(x=102+generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m2f1)/(fit_dmi_m2+fit_dmi_f1),symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(life_cycleD)),alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(life_cycle),ncol = 2,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme(legend.position = "bottom")+ylab("Mean corrected hybrid load")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2),group=life_cycleD),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+stat_summary(aes(x=102+generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m2f1)/(fit_dmi_m2+fit_dmi_f1),group=life_cycleD),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple","red","blue","yellow","cyan"))+geom_vline(xintercept = c(101),col="black")+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)",labels=c(0,50,"100|",0,50,100),breaks = c(0,50,100,102,152,202))

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=log((2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2))/log(1-ep_dmi),symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(life_cycleD)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+geom_line(aes(x=102+generations/nb_ind,y=log((2*F1_m2f1)/(fit_dmi_m2+fit_dmi_f1))/log(1-ep_dmi),symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(life_cycleD)),alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(life_cycle),ncol = 2,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme(legend.position = "bottom")+ylab("Mean number of fixed DMI")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=log((2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2))/log(1-ep_dmi),group=life_cycleD),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+stat_summary(aes(x=102+generations/nb_ind,y=log((2*F1_m2f1)/(fit_dmi_m2+fit_dmi_f1))/log(1-ep_dmi),group=life_cycleD),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple","red","blue","yellow","cyan"))+geom_vline(xintercept = c(101),col="black")+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)",labels=c(0,50,"100|",0,50,100),breaks = c(0,50,100,102,152,202))+geom_hline(aes(yintercept = 2/9*nb_dmi),linetype="dashed",col="black")+geom_hline(aes(yintercept = 1/2*nb_dmi),linetype="dotted",col="black")

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=log((F1_m1f2))/log(1-ep_dmi),symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(life_cycleD)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+geom_line(aes(x=102+generations/nb_ind,y=log((F1_m2f1))/log(1-ep_dmi),symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(life_cycleD)),alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(life_cycle),ncol = 2,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme(legend.position = "bottom")+ylab("Mean number of fixed DMI")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=log((F1_m1f2))/log(1-ep_dmi),group=life_cycleD),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+stat_summary(aes(x=102+generations/nb_ind,y=log((F1_m2f1))/log(1-ep_dmi),group=life_cycleD),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple","red","blue","yellow","cyan"))+geom_vline(xintercept = c(101),col="black")+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)",labels=c(0,50,"100|",0,50,100),breaks = c(0,50,100,102,152,202))+geom_hline(aes(yintercept = 2/9*nb_dmi),linetype="dashed",col="black")+geom_hline(aes(yintercept = 1/2*nb_dmi),linetype="dotted",col="black")

#dev.off()
```

## Transition between regimes
```{r select data transition, paged.print=FALSE}
data_temp=data_all[data_all$nb_ind==10000&data_all$fit_alt==0.1&data_all$var_cost==0&data_all$scenario=="all"&data_all$initial_cost==100&data_all$origin=="Ancestral"&data_all$rec_rate==0.001&data_all$nb_dim==1&data_all$nb_dmi==50&data_all$nb_loci==500&data_all$mut_rate==10^(-6)&data_all$ep_FL==2&data_all$mu_back==1&data_all$mig_rate<0.5&data_all$ep_dmi==0.1,]
display_constant(data_temp )
```


```{r plot transition}
ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pref_m1,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(life_cycle)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(mig_rate),ncol = 4,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean preference")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pref_m1,group=ep_dmi),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+coord_trans(y="log10")+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")+scale_y_continuous(labels=c(1,0.1,0.01,0.001),breaks=c(1,0.1,0.01,0.001))

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2),symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(life_cycle)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(mig_rate),ncol = 4,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean corrected hybrid load")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2),group=ep_dmi),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=log((F1_m1f2))/log(1-ep_dmi)/nb_dmi,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(life_cycle)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(mig_rate),ncol = 4,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean proportion of fixed effective DMI")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=log((F1_m1f2))/log(1-ep_dmi)/nb_dmi,group=ep_dmi),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=1-(2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2),y=log(pref_m1),symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(life_cycle)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(mig_rate),ncol = 4,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean preference")+xlab("Mean corrected hybrid load")+stat_summary(aes(x=1-(2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2),y=log((F1_m1f2))/log(1-ep_dmi)/nb_dmi,group=ep_dmi),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")
```


```{r select data and format for them for the gradient plot}
data_temp5=data_temp[data_temp$generations==500000,]
data_temp5$code_color=0
threshold=0.25
data_temp5$scale_mc=log10(data_temp5$pref_m1/2+data_temp5$pref_f1/2)/min(log10(data_temp5$pref_m1/2+data_temp5$pref_f1/2))
data_temp5$scale_hl=(1-(data_temp5$F1_m1f2+data_temp5$F1_m2f1)/(data_temp5$fit_dmi_m1/2+data_temp5$fit_dmi_f2/2+data_temp5$fit_dmi_m2/2+data_temp5$fit_dmi_f1/2))/max((1-(data_temp5$F1_m1f2+data_temp5$F1_m2f1)/(data_temp5$fit_dmi_m1/2+data_temp5$fit_dmi_f2/2+data_temp5$fit_dmi_m2/2+data_temp5$fit_dmi_f1/2)))

data_temp5$code_color[data_temp5$scale_mc<=threshold & data_temp5$scale_hl<=threshold]="No barrier"
data_temp5$code_color[data_temp5$scale_mc>threshold & data_temp5$scale_hl<=threshold]="Strict mate choice"
data_temp5$code_color[data_temp5$scale_mc<=threshold & data_temp5$scale_hl>threshold]="F1 low fitness"
data_temp5$code_color[data_temp5$scale_mc>threshold & data_temp5$scale_hl>threshold]="Strict mate choice \n & F1 low fitness"

data_temp5$code_color=factor(data_temp5$code_color,levels = c("No barrier","Strict mate choice","F1 low fitness","Strict mate choice \n & F1 low fitness"))

data_temp5$life_cycle2=as.character(data_temp5$life_cycle2)
data_temp5$life_cycle2[data_temp5$life_cycle2=="mig-sel"]="Juvenile dispersal"
data_temp5$life_cycle2[data_temp5$life_cycle2=="sel-mig"]="Adult dispersal"
data_temp5$life_cycle2[data_temp5$life_cycle2=="isolated"]="Isolated"
data_temp5$life_cycle2=factor(data_temp5$life_cycle2,levels = c("Isolated","Juvenile dispersal","Adult dispersal"))


data_temp6=data_temp5
data_temp6$life_cycle2[data_temp6$life_cycle2=="Isolated"]="Juvenile dispersal"
data_temp6=rbind(data_temp6,data_temp5[data_temp5$life_cycle2=="Isolated",])
data_temp6$life_cycle2[data_temp6$life_cycle2=="Isolated"]="Adult dispersal"

```

```{r}
min((1-(data_temp5$F1_m1f2+data_temp5$F1_m2f1)/(data_temp5$fit_dmi_m1+data_temp5$fit_dmi_f2+data_temp5$fit_dmi_m2+data_temp5$fit_dmi_f1))[data_temp5$mig_rate==0])
```

Select data for the gradient plot
```{r select data and format for them for the gradient plot and counting case of joint evolution}
data_temp5=data_temp[data_temp$generations==500000,]
boundary_mc=min(c(data_temp5$pref_f1[data_temp5$mig_rate==0]+data_temp5$pref_m1[data_temp5$mig_rate==0],data_temp5$pref_f2[data_temp5$mig_rate==0]+data_temp5$pref_m2[data_temp5$mig_rate==0]))/2

boundary_hl=min((1-(data_temp5$F1_m1f2+data_temp5$F1_m2f1)/(data_temp5$fit_dmi_m1/2+data_temp5$fit_dmi_f2/2+data_temp5$fit_dmi_m2/2+data_temp5$fit_dmi_f1/2))[data_temp5$mig_rate==0])
print(c("min mc",boundary_mc,"min hyb",boundary_hl))
print(c(sum((data_temp5$pref_f1+data_temp5$pref_m1)/2<boundary_mc&(1-(data_temp5$F1_m1f2+data_temp5$F1_m2f1)/(data_temp5$fit_dmi_m1/2+data_temp5$fit_dmi_f2/2+data_temp5$fit_dmi_m2/2+data_temp5$fit_dmi_f1/2))>boundary_hl), "out of",length(data_temp5$seed)))

data_temp5$code_color=0

data_temp5$scale_mc=(data_temp5$pref_m1+data_temp5$pref_f1)/2

data_temp5$scale_hl=(1-(data_temp5$F1_m1f2+data_temp5$F1_m2f1)/(data_temp5$fit_dmi_m1/2+data_temp5$fit_dmi_f2/2+data_temp5$fit_dmi_m2/2+data_temp5$fit_dmi_f1/2))

data_temp5$code_color[data_temp5$scale_mc>boundary_mc & data_temp5$scale_hl<=boundary_hl]="No barrier"
data_temp5$code_color[data_temp5$scale_mc<=boundary_mc & data_temp5$scale_hl<=boundary_hl]="Strict mate choice"
data_temp5$code_color[data_temp5$scale_mc>boundary_mc & data_temp5$scale_hl>boundary_hl]="F1 low fitness"
data_temp5$code_color[data_temp5$scale_mc<=boundary_mc & data_temp5$scale_hl>boundary_hl]="Strict mate choice \n & F1 low fitness"

data_temp5$code_color=factor(data_temp5$code_color,levels = c("No barrier","Strict mate choice","F1 low fitness","Strict mate choice \n & F1 low fitness"))

data_temp5$life_cycle2=as.character(data_temp5$life_cycle2)
data_temp5$life_cycle2[data_temp5$life_cycle2=="mig-sel"]="Juvenile dispersal"
data_temp5$life_cycle2[data_temp5$life_cycle2=="sel-mig"]="Adult dispersal"
data_temp5$life_cycle2[data_temp5$life_cycle2=="isolated"]="Isolated"
data_temp5$life_cycle2=factor(data_temp5$life_cycle2,levels = c("Isolated","Juvenile dispersal","Adult dispersal"))
data_temp5$scale_mc=log10(data_temp5$pref_m1/2+data_temp5$pref_f1/2)/min(log10(data_temp5$pref_m1/2+data_temp5$pref_f1/2))
data_temp5$scale_hl=(1-(data_temp5$F1_m1f2+data_temp5$F1_m2f1)/(data_temp5$fit_dmi_m1/2+data_temp5$fit_dmi_f2/2+data_temp5$fit_dmi_m2/2+data_temp5$fit_dmi_f1/2))/max((1-(data_temp5$F1_m1f2+data_temp5$F1_m2f1)/(data_temp5$fit_dmi_m1/2+data_temp5$fit_dmi_f2/2+data_temp5$fit_dmi_m2/2+data_temp5$fit_dmi_f1/2)))

data_temp6=data_temp5
data_temp6$life_cycle2[data_temp6$life_cycle2=="Isolated"]="Juvenile dispersal"
data_temp6=rbind(data_temp6,data_temp5[data_temp5$life_cycle2=="Isolated",])
data_temp6$life_cycle2[data_temp6$life_cycle2=="Isolated"]="Adult dispersal"
```

Correlation between relative strength of mate choice and hybrid load
Figure 3 - Figure S7
```{r figure correlation  between relative strength of mate choice and hybrid load, warning=FALSE}

#pdf("Figure/correlation_MC_HL.pdf",width=6,height=4.5)

ggplot(data_temp5,aes(x=(mig_rate+10^-6),y=scale_mc-scale_hl,col=as.factor(code_color)))+geom_point(alpha=1)+ theme(legend.position = "bottom")+ylab("Scaled log mate choice - scaled hybrid load")+xlab("Migration rate")+coord_trans(x="log10")+geom_abline(intercept = 0,slope = 0)+scale_x_continuous(labels=c(1,0.1,0.01,0.001,0.0001,0.00001),breaks=c(1,0.1,0.01,0.001,.0001,0.00001))+labs(color="Barriers:",title="B/")+scale_colour_manual(values=c("black","blue","red","purple"))+facet_wrap(~life_cycle)+theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = -.04, vjust = -7))

ggplot(data_temp5,aes(x=(mig_rate+10^-6),y=scale_mc-scale_hl,col=as.factor(code_color)))+geom_point(alpha=.4)+ theme(legend.position = "bottom")+ylab("Scaled log mate chocie - scaled hybrid load")+xlab("Migration rate")+coord_trans(x="log10")+geom_abline(intercept = 0,slope = 0)+scale_x_continuous(labels=c(1,0.1,0.01,0.001,0.0001,0.00001),breaks=c(1,0.1,0.01,0.001,.0001,0.00001))+labs(color="Barriers:",title="B/")+scale_colour_manual(values=c("black","blue","red","purple"))+facet_wrap(~life_cycle)+theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = -.04, vjust = -7))

ggplot(data_temp5,aes(y=(1-(data_temp5$F1_m1f2+data_temp5$F1_m2f1)/(data_temp5$fit_dmi_m1/2+data_temp5$fit_dmi_f2/2+data_temp5$fit_dmi_m2/2+data_temp5$fit_dmi_f1/2)),x=-log10(data_temp5$pref_m1/2+data_temp5$pref_f1/2),symbol=life_cycle))+xlab("- Log mean choosiness")+ylab("Mean corrected hybrid load")+scale_y_continuous(name="Mean corrected hybrid load")+labs(col="Migration\n rate", title="A/")+geom_point(aes(col=log10(mig_rate)),alpha=0.5)+theme_bw()+theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = -.04, vjust = -7))+scale_color_viridis_c(option = "magma",begin = 0,end = .85)+facet_wrap(~life_cycle2)


ggplot(data_temp5,aes(y=(1-(data_temp5$F1_m1f2+data_temp5$F1_m2f1)/(data_temp5$fit_dmi_m1/2+data_temp5$fit_dmi_f2/2+data_temp5$fit_dmi_m2/2+data_temp5$fit_dmi_f1/2)),x=-log10(data_temp5$pref_m1/2+data_temp5$pref_f1/2),symbol=life_cycle))+xlab("- Log mean choosiness")+ylab("Mean corrected hybrid load")+scale_y_continuous(name="Mean corrected hybrid load")+labs(col="Migration\n rate", title="A/")+geom_point(aes(col=log10(mig_rate)))+theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = -.04, vjust = -7))+scale_color_viridis_c(option = "magma",begin = 0,end = .85)+facet_wrap(~life_cycle)+ theme(
  legend.position = c(.99, .99),
  legend.justification = c("right", "top"),
  legend.box.just = "right",
  legend.margin = margin(6, 6, 6, 6)
)

data_temp5$m=data_temp5$mig_rate
ggplot(data_temp5,aes(y=(1-(data_temp5$F1_m1f2+data_temp5$F1_m2f1)/(data_temp5$fit_dmi_m1/2+data_temp5$fit_dmi_f2/2+data_temp5$fit_dmi_m2/2+data_temp5$fit_dmi_f1/2)),x=-log10(data_temp5$pref_m1/2+data_temp5$pref_f1/2),symbol=life_cycle2,col=life_cycle2))+xlab("- Log mean choosiness")+ylab("Mean corrected hybrid load")+geom_point(alpha=0.2)+theme_bw()+theme(legend.position = "bottom")+facet_wrap(~m,labeller = "label_both")+geom_smooth(method="lm",se=FALSE,alpha=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("black","orange","purple")) + labs(col="Dispersal stage")


ggplot(data_temp5,aes(y=(1-(data_temp5$F1_m1f2+data_temp5$F1_m2f1)/(data_temp5$fit_dmi_m1/2+data_temp5$fit_dmi_f2/2+data_temp5$fit_dmi_m2/2+data_temp5$fit_dmi_f1/2)),x=-log10(data_temp5$pref_m1/2+data_temp5$pref_f1/2),symbol=life_cycle,col=life_cycle))+xlab("- Log mean choosiness")+ylab("Mean corrected hybrid load")+geom_point(alpha=0.5)+theme(legend.position = "bottom")+geom_smooth(method="lm",se=FALSE,alpha=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple")) + labs(col="Dispersal stage")

data_temp7=data_temp6[data_temp6$mig_rate %in% c(0,0.00005,0.0005,0.005,0.05,0.2),]
data_temp7$mig_rate=data_temp7$mig_rate*runif(length(data_temp7$mig_rate),0.8,1.2)

ggplot(data_temp7,aes(x=(mig_rate+10^-6),y=scale_mc-scale_hl,col=as.factor(code_color)))+geom_point(alpha=0.5)+theme_bw()+ theme(legend.position = "bottom")+ylab("Scaled log choosiness - scaled hybrid load")+xlab("Migration rate")+coord_trans(x="log10")+geom_abline(intercept = 0,slope = 0)+scale_x_continuous(labels=c(1,0.1,0.01,0.001,0.0001,0.00001),breaks=c(1,0.1,0.01,0.001,.0001,0.00001))+labs(color="Barriers:",title="B/")+scale_colour_manual(values=c("gray","cadetblue1","darkgoldenrod1","darkorchid4"))+facet_wrap(~life_cycle2)+theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = -.04, vjust = -7))

data_temp7=data_temp5
data_temp7$mig_rate=data_temp7$mig_rate*runif(length(data_temp7$mig_rate),0.8,1.2)
ggplot(data_temp5,aes(x=(mig_rate+10^-6),y=scale_mc-scale_hl,col=as.factor(code_color)))+geom_point()+ theme(legend.position = "bottom")+ylab("Scaled log mate choice - scaled hybrid load")+xlab("Migration rate")+coord_trans(x="log10")+geom_abline(intercept = 0,slope = 0)+scale_x_continuous(labels=c(1,0.1,0.01,0.001,0.0001,0.00001),breaks=c(1,0.1,0.01,0.001,.0001,0.00001))+labs(color="Barriers:",title="B/")+scale_colour_manual(values=c("black","blue","red","purple"))+facet_wrap(~life_cycle)+theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = -.04, vjust = -7))

#dev.off()
```



Compute correlation accross time
```{r compute correlation accross time}
data_temp$me=paste(data_temp$mig_rate,data_temp$ep_dmi)
data_cor=NULL
for(i in unique(data_temp$me)){
  for(j in unique(data_temp$generations)){
    data_temp2=data_temp[data_temp$me==i&data_temp$generations==j,]
    data_cor=rbind(data_cor,c(j,data_temp2$mig_rate[1],data_temp2$ep_dmi[1],cor(log10(data_temp2$pref_m1),1-(2*data_temp2$F1_m1f2)/(data_temp2$fit_dmi_m1+data_temp2$fit_dmi_f2))))
  }
}

```

Display the dynamics of correlation
```{r dynamics correlation}
data_cor=as.data.frame(data_cor)
ggplot(data_cor,aes(x=V1/10000,y=V4))+ theme(legend.position = "right")+ylab("Correlation between log preference and hybrid load")+xlab("Generations")+labs(col="Epistasis")+geom_line(aes(col=as.factor(V3)))+labs(title = "Adult dispersal") +theme(legend.position = "right")+facet_wrap(~as.factor(V2))+geom_abline(intercept = 0,slope = 0)
```

Select data for for specific cases of migration and epistasis
```{r select data specific case of migration and epistasis}
data_temp=data_all[data_all$nb_ind==10000&data_all$fit_alt==0.1&data_all$var_cost==0&data_all$scenario=="all"&data_all$initial_cost==100&data_all$origin=="Ancestral"&data_all$rec_rate==0.001&data_all$nb_dim==1&data_all$nb_dmi==50&data_all$nb_loci==500&data_all$mut_rate==10^(-6)&data_all$ep_FL==2&data_all$mu_back==1&data_all$mig_rate %in% c(0.001,0.005)&data_all$life_cycle=="sel-mig",]
display_constant(data_temp )
```


```{r plot dynamics subset}
ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pref_m1,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(life_cycle)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+facet_grid(as.factor(mig_rate)~as.factor(ep_dmi),labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean preference")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pref_m1,group=life_cycle),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple"))+coord_trans(y="log10")+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")+scale_y_continuous(labels=c(1,0.1,0.01,0.001),breaks=c(1,0.1,0.01,0.001))

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2),symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(life_cycle)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+facet_grid(as.factor(mig_rate)~as.factor(ep_dmi),labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean corrected hybrid load")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2),group=life_cycle),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple"))+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=log((F1_m1f2))/log(1-ep_dmi)/nb_dmi,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(life_cycle)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+facet_grid(as.factor(mig_rate)~as.factor(ep_dmi),labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Proportion of DMIs")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=log((F1_m1f2))/log(1-ep_dmi)/nb_dmi,group=life_cycle),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple"))+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")
```



## Effect of the shape of landscape
Subset the data for the default value and different shapes of the landscape and check which parameters are variable
```{r select data landscape, paged.print=FALSE}
data_temp=data_all[data_all$nb_ind==10000&data_all$fit_alt==0.1&data_all$ep_dmi==0.1&data_all$var_cost==0&data_all$scenario=="all"&data_all$initial_cost==100&data_all$origin=="Ancestral"&data_all$rec_rate==0.001&data_all$nb_dim==1&data_all$nb_dmi==50&data_all$nb_loci==500&data_all$mut_rate==10^(-6)&data_all$mig_rate==0.05&data_all$rep<11,]
display_constant(data_temp )

data_temp$ep_FL=paste("Q =",data_temp$ep_FL)
```

Display the effect of the shape of the landscape Figure S24
```{r plot landscape}
#pdf("Figure/effect_of_Q.pdf",width=10,height=6)
ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pref_m1,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(life_cycle)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(ep_FL),ncol = 4)+ theme_bw()+theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean choosiness")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pref_m1,group=life_cycle),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple"))+coord_trans(y="log10")+scale_y_continuous(labels=c(1,0.1,0.01,0.001),breaks=c(1,0.1,0.01,0.001))

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m1_DI,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(life_cycle)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(ep_FL),ncol = 4)+ theme_bw()+theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean phenotype")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m1_DI,group=life_cycle),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple"))+geom_hline(aes(yintercept = opt_one_DI*(1-mig_rate)+opt_two_DI*(mig_rate)),linetype="dashed",col="black")

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-F1_m1f2,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(life_cycle)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(ep_FL),ncol = 4)+ theme_bw()+theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean hybrid load")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-F1_m1f2,group=life_cycle),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple"))

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=fit_eco_m1,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(life_cycle)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(ep_FL),ncol = 4)+ theme_bw()+theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean ecological fitness")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=fit_eco_m1,group=life_cycle),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple"))+coord_trans(y="log10")

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2),symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(life_cycle)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(ep_FL),ncol = 4)+ theme_bw()+theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean corrected hybrid load")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2),group=life_cycle),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple"))

#dev.off()
```

Display the effect of the shape of the landscape - the population in the A environment is given on the left of each facet and the population in the B environment on the right
```{r plot landscape both pop, warning=FALSE}
#pdf("Figure/effect_of_Q.pdf",width=10,height=6)
ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pref_m1,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(life_cycle)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+geom_line(aes(x=52+generations/nb_ind,y=pref_m2,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(life_cycle)),alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(ep_FL),ncol = 4)+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean preference")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pref_m1,group=life_cycle),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+stat_summary(aes(x=52+generations/nb_ind,y=pref_m2,group=life_cycle),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple"))+coord_trans(y="log10")+geom_vline(xintercept = c(51),col="black")+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)",labels=c(0,25,"50|",0,25,50),breaks = c(0,25,50,52,77,102))+scale_y_continuous(labels=c(1,0.1,0.01,0.001),breaks=c(1,0.1,0.01,0.001))

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m1_DI,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(life_cycle)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+geom_line(aes(x=52+generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m2_DI,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(life_cycle)),alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(ep_FL),ncol = 4)+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean phenotype")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m1_DI,group=life_cycle),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+stat_summary(aes(x=52+generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m2_DI,group=life_cycle),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple"))+geom_vline(xintercept = c(51),col="black")+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)",labels=c(0,25,"50|",0,25,50),breaks = c(0,25,50,52,77,102))+geom_hline(aes(yintercept = opt_one_DI*(1-mig_rate)+opt_two_DI*(mig_rate)),linetype="dashed",col="black")+geom_hline(aes(yintercept = opt_two_DI*(1-mig_rate)+opt_one_DI*(mig_rate)),linetype="dashed",col="black")

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-F1_m1f2,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(life_cycle)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+geom_line(aes(x=52+generations/nb_ind,y=1-F1_m2f1,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(life_cycle)),alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(ep_FL),ncol = 4)+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean hybrid load")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-F1_m1f2,group=life_cycle),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+stat_summary(aes(x=52+generations/nb_ind,y=1-F1_m2f1,group=life_cycle),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple"))+geom_vline(xintercept = c(51),col="black")+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)",labels=c(0,25,"50|",0,25,50),breaks = c(0,25,50,52,77,102))

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=fit_eco_m1,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(life_cycle)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+geom_line(aes(x=52+generations/nb_ind,y=fit_eco_m2,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(life_cycle)),alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(ep_FL),ncol = 4)+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean ecological fitness")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=fit_eco_m1,group=life_cycle),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+stat_summary(aes(x=52+generations/nb_ind,y=fit_eco_m2,group=life_cycle),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple"))+coord_trans(y="log10")+geom_vline(xintercept = c(51),col="black")+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)",labels=c(0,25,"50|",0,25,50),breaks = c(0,25,50,52,77,102))

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2),symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(life_cycle)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+geom_line(aes(x=52+generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m2f1)/(fit_dmi_m2+fit_dmi_f1),symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(life_cycle)),alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(ep_FL),ncol = 4)+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean corrected hybrid load")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2),group=life_cycle),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+stat_summary(aes(x=52+generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m2f1)/(fit_dmi_m2+fit_dmi_f1),group=life_cycle),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple"))+geom_vline(xintercept = c(51),col="black")+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)",labels=c(0,25,"50|",0,25,50),breaks = c(0,25,50,52,77,102))

#dev.off()
```

## Effect of the mutational bias
Subset the data for the default value to check the mutational bias (whether the two environments are symmetric around 0) and check which parameters are variable
```{r select data mutational bias}
data_temp=data_all[data_all$nb_dim==3&data_all$opt_one_DI %in% c(2.887,6.774)&data_all$origin=="Ancestral",]
display_constant(data_temp)
data_temp$mig_rate2=paste( "m =",data_temp$mig_rate)
```

Display the effect of the mutational bias (for the phenotype) Figure S25
```{r plot mutational bias, fig.height=6, fig.width=8.5}
#pdf("Figure/effect_mutational_bias.pdf",width=8.5,height=6)
ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=log10(pref_m1),symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(opt_one_DI)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~mig_rate2,ncol = 2)+theme_bw()+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean (log) choosiness")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=log10(pref_m1),group=as.factor(opt_one_DI)),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("blue","red"),labels=c("Symmetric optima","Asymmetric optima"))+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")+labs(col="Migration rate")

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m1_DI,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(opt_one_DI)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~mig_rate2,ncol = 2)+  theme_bw()+theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean phenotype")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m1_DI,group=opt_one_DI),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("blue","red"),labels=c("Symmetric optima","Asymmetric optima"))+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")+geom_hline(aes(yintercept = opt_one_DI*(1-mig_rate)+opt_two_DI*(mig_rate)),linetype="dashed",col="black")+labs(col="Migration rate")


ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-F1_m1f2,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(opt_one_DI)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~mig_rate2,ncol = 2)+ theme_bw()+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean hybrid load")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-F1_m1f2,group=opt_one_DI),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("blue","red"),labels=c("Symmetric optima","Asymmetric optima"))+labs(col="Migration rate")

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=fit_eco_m1,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(opt_one_DI)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~mig_rate2,ncol = 2)+ theme_bw()+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean ecological fitness")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=fit_eco_m1,group=opt_one_DI),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("blue","red"),labels=c("Symmetric optima","Asymmetric optima"))+coord_trans(y="log10")+labs(col="Migration rate")

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2),symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(opt_one_DI)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~mig_rate2,ncol = 2)+theme_bw()+  theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean corrected hybrid load")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2),group=opt_one_DI),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("blue","red"),labels=c("Symmetric optima","Asymmetric optima"))+labs(col="Migration rate")


ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=log((F1_m1f2))/log(1-ep_dmi)/nb_dmi,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(opt_one_DI)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~mig_rate2,ncol = 2)+ theme_bw()+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean proportion of fixed DMI")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=log((F1_m1f2))/log(1-ep_dmi)/nb_dmi,group=opt_one_DI),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("blue","red"),labels=c("Symmetric optima","Asymmetric optima"))+geom_hline(aes(yintercept = 2/9),linetype="dashed",col="black")+geom_hline(aes(yintercept = 1/2),linetype="dotted",col="black")+labs(col="Migration rate")

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m2_DI,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(opt_one_DI)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~mig_rate2,ncol = 2)+ theme_bw()+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean phenotype")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m2_DI,group=opt_one_DI),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("blue","red"),labels=c("Symmetric optima","Asymmetric optima"))+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")+geom_hline(aes(yintercept = opt_two_DI*(1-mig_rate)+opt_one_DI*(mig_rate)),linetype="dashed",col="black")+labs(col="Migration rate")

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m2_DI-(opt_two_DI*(1-mig_rate)+opt_one_DI*(mig_rate)),symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(opt_one_DI)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~mig_rate2,ncol = 2)+ theme_bw()+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean deviation from expected phenotype")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m2_DI-(opt_two_DI*(1-mig_rate)+opt_one_DI*(mig_rate)),group=opt_one_DI),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("blue","red"),labels=c("Symmetric optima","Asymmetric optima"))+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")+labs(col="Migration rate")+coord_cartesian(ylim=c(-0.25,0.25))+geom_abline(intercept = 0,slope=0,col="black")

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m2_DII-(opt_two_DII*(1-mig_rate)+opt_one_DII*(mig_rate)),symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(opt_one_DII)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~mig_rate2,ncol = 2)+ theme_bw()+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean deviation from expected phenotype")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m2_DII-(opt_two_DII*(1-mig_rate)+opt_one_DII*(mig_rate)),group=opt_one_DII),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("blue","red"),labels=c("Symmetric optima","Asymmetric optima"))+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")+labs(col="Migration rate")+coord_cartesian(ylim=c(-0.25,0.25))+geom_abline(intercept = 0,slope=0,col="black")

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m1_DI-(opt_one_DI*(1-mig_rate)+opt_two_DI*(mig_rate)),symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(opt_two_DI)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~mig_rate2,ncol = 2)+ theme_bw()+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean deviation from expected phenotype")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m1_DI-(opt_one_DI*(1-mig_rate)+opt_two_DI*(mig_rate)),group=opt_two_DI),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("blue","red"),labels=c("Symmetric optima","Asymmetric optima"))+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")+labs(col="Migration rate")+coord_cartesian(ylim=c(-0.25,0.25))+geom_abline(intercept = 0,slope=0,col="black")

#dev.off()
```


## Effect of cost of choosiness
Subset the data for the default value and different cost values and check which parameters are variable
```{r select data cost}
data_temp=data_all[data_all$nb_ind==10000&data_all$fit_alt==0.1&data_all$ep_dmi==0.1&data_all$var_cost==0&data_all$life_cycle=="sel-mig"&data_all$rec_rate==0.001&data_all$nb_dim==1&data_all$nb_dmi==50&data_all$nb_loci==500&data_all$mut_rate==10^(-6)&data_all$rec_rate_CL==0.1&data_all$ep_FL==2&data_all$initial_pref==1&data_all$origin=="Ancestral"&data_all$mig_rate==0.05&data_all$rec_rate_LB==0.01,]
display_constant(data_temp )
```

Display the effect of the cost of choosiness - the population in the A environment is given on the left of each facet and the population in the B environment on the right
```{r plot cost}
#pdf("Figure/effect_of_cost.pdf",width=10,height=6)
ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pref_m1,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(initial_cost)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+geom_line(aes(x=52+generations/nb_ind,y=pref_m2,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(initial_cost)),alpha=0.4)+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean preference")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pref_m1,group=initial_cost),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+stat_summary(aes(x=52+generations/nb_ind,y=pref_m2,group=initial_cost),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple","blue"))+coord_trans(y="log10")+geom_vline(xintercept = c(51),col="black")+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)",labels=c(0,25,"50|",0,25,50),breaks = c(0,25,50,52,77,102))

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m1_DI,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(initial_cost)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+geom_line(aes(x=52+generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m2_DI,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(initial_cost)),alpha=0.4)+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean phenotype")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m1_DI,group=initial_cost),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+stat_summary(aes(x=52+generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m2_DI,group=initial_cost),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple","blue"))+geom_vline(xintercept = c(51),col="black")+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)",labels=c(0,25,"50|",0,25,50),breaks = c(0,25,50,52,77,102))+geom_hline(aes(yintercept = opt_one_DI*(1-mig_rate)+opt_two_DI*(mig_rate)),linetype="dashed",col="black")+geom_hline(aes(yintercept = opt_two_DI*(1-mig_rate)+opt_one_DI*(mig_rate)),linetype="dashed",col="black")

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-F1_m1f2,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(initial_cost)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+geom_line(aes(x=52+generations/nb_ind,y=1-F1_m2f1,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(initial_cost)),alpha=0.4)+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean hybrid load")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-F1_m1f2,group=initial_cost),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+stat_summary(aes(x=52+generations/nb_ind,y=1-F1_m2f1,group=initial_cost),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple","blue"))+geom_vline(xintercept = c(51),col="black")+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)",labels=c(0,25,"50|",0,25,50),breaks = c(0,25,50,52,77,102))

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=fit_eco_m1,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(initial_cost)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+geom_line(aes(x=52+generations/nb_ind,y=fit_eco_m2,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(initial_cost)),alpha=0.4)+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean ecological fitness")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=fit_eco_m1,group=initial_cost),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+stat_summary(aes(x=52+generations/nb_ind,y=fit_eco_m2,group=initial_cost),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple","blue"))+coord_trans(y="log10")+geom_vline(xintercept = c(51),col="black")+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)",labels=c(0,25,"50|",0,25,50),breaks = c(0,25,50,52,77,102))

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2),symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(initial_cost)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+geom_line(aes(x=52+generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m2f1)/(fit_dmi_m2+fit_dmi_f1),symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(initial_cost)),alpha=0.4)+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean corrected hybrid load")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2),group=initial_cost),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+stat_summary(aes(x=52+generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m2f1)/(fit_dmi_m2+fit_dmi_f1),group=initial_cost),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple","blue"))+geom_vline(xintercept = c(51),col="black")+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)",labels=c(0,25,"50|",0,25,50),breaks = c(0,25,50,52,77,102))

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2),symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(initial_cost)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+geom_line(aes(x=52+generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m2f1)/(fit_dmi_m2+fit_dmi_f1),symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(initial_cost)),alpha=0.4)+ theme(legend.position = "bottom")+ylab("Mean corrected hybrid load")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2),group=initial_cost),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+stat_summary(aes(x=52+generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m2f1)/(fit_dmi_m2+fit_dmi_f1),group=initial_cost),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple","blue"))+geom_vline(xintercept = c(51),col="black")+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)",labels=c(0,25,"50|",0,25,50),breaks = c(0,25,50,52,77,102))

#dev.off()
```

Check the cost preference only when local adaptation
To measure the cost of choosiness and compare it to the cost of the mutational load, a population evolved in isolation without DMI or preference was load. The distribution of fitness of individuals (1 - mutational load was computed) as well as the probability of male rejecting chi mating.  

```{r compute chosiness cost}
if(hasPopFile){
  load_pop=read.table("output_iso_nodmi_nopref/pop_LC_1_LA0.1_MC0_DMI0_rep1.txt",fill=NA,skip=1,colClasses = "factor")
  
  pref_cost=matrix(0,nrow=16,ncol=11)
  pref_vec=10^(-seq(0.5,8,0.5))
  for (k in 1:16){
    pref=pref_vec[k]
    vec_pref_cost_c1=c()
    vec_pref_cost_c2=c()
    vec_pref_cost_c10=c()
    vec_pref_cost_c100=c()
    
    load_pop1=load_pop[1:which(load_pop$V1=="Female_pop2"),]
    n1f=as.numeric(as.character(load_pop1[1,2]))
    n1m=as.numeric(as.character(load_pop1[2+2*n1f,2]))
    load_pop1=load_pop1[load_pop1[,6]!="" ,c(2,4,6,8,10,12)]
    load_pop1=as.data.frame(lapply(lapply(load_pop1,as.character),as.numeric))
    load_pop1$pheno=rowSums(load_pop1[,-1])
    
    load_pop1=load_pop1[c(T,F),c(1,7)]+load_pop1[c(F,T),c(1,7)]
    load_pop1$fit=exp(log(0.1)*(load_pop1$pheno-5)^2/100)
    
    c2=sample(seq(n1f+1,n1f+n1m),1000,prob=load_pop1[seq(n1f+1,n1f+n1m),3])
    for (i in 1:1000){
      c1=sample(seq(n1f),size=1,prob=load_pop1[seq(n1f),3])
      c3=prod(1-exp(log(pref)*(load_pop1[c1,2]-load_pop1[c2[i],2])^2/100))
      vec_pref_cost_c1=c(vec_pref_cost_c1,c3)
      c1=sample(seq(n1f),size=2,prob=load_pop1[seq(n1f),3])
      c3=prod(1-exp(log(pref)*(load_pop1[c1,2]-load_pop1[c2[i],2])^2/100))
      vec_pref_cost_c2=c(vec_pref_cost_c2,c3)
      c1=sample(seq(n1f),size=10,prob=load_pop1[seq(n1f),3])
      c3=prod(1-exp(log(pref)*(load_pop1[c1,2]-load_pop1[c2[i],2])^2/100))
      vec_pref_cost_c10=c(vec_pref_cost_c10,c3)
      c1=sample(seq(n1f),size=100,prob=load_pop1[seq(n1f),3])
      c3=prod(1-exp(log(pref)*(load_pop1[c1,2]-load_pop1[c2[i],2])^2/100))
      vec_pref_cost_c100=c(vec_pref_cost_c100,c3)
    }
    vec=c(mean(1-load_pop1$fit),mean(vec_pref_cost_c1),mean(vec_pref_cost_c2),mean(vec_pref_cost_c10),mean(vec_pref_cost_c100))
    
    load_pop1=load_pop[-(1:(which(load_pop$V1=="Female_pop2")-1)),]
    n1f=as.numeric(as.character(load_pop1[1,2]))
    n1m=as.numeric(as.character(load_pop1[2+2*n1f,2]))
    load_pop1=load_pop1[load_pop1[,6]!="" ,c(2,4,6,8,10,12)]
    load_pop1=as.data.frame(lapply(lapply(load_pop1,as.character),as.numeric))
    load_pop1$pheno=rowSums(load_pop1[,-1])
    
    load_pop1=load_pop1[c(T,F),c(1,7)]+load_pop1[c(F,T),c(1,7)]
    load_pop1$fit=exp(log(0.1)*(load_pop1$pheno+5)^2/100)
    
    c2=sample(seq(n1f+1,n1f+n1m),1000,prob=load_pop1[seq(n1f+1,n1f+n1m),3])
    for (i in 1:1000){
      c1=sample(seq(n1f),size=1,prob=load_pop1[seq(n1f),3])
      c3=prod(1-exp(log(pref)*(load_pop1[c1,2]-load_pop1[c2[i],2])^2/100))
      vec_pref_cost_c1=c(vec_pref_cost_c1,c3)
      c1=sample(seq(n1f),size=2,prob=load_pop1[seq(n1f),3])
      c3=prod(1-exp(log(pref)*(load_pop1[c1,2]-load_pop1[c2[i],2])^2/100))
      vec_pref_cost_c2=c(vec_pref_cost_c2,c3)
      c1=sample(seq(n1f),size=10,prob=load_pop1[seq(n1f),3])
      c3=prod(1-exp(log(pref)*(load_pop1[c1,2]-load_pop1[c2[i],2])^2/100))
      vec_pref_cost_c10=c(vec_pref_cost_c10,c3)
      c1=sample(seq(n1f),size=100,prob=load_pop1[seq(n1f),3])
      c3=prod(1-exp(log(pref)*(load_pop1[c1,2]-load_pop1[c2[i],2])^2/100))
      vec_pref_cost_c100=c(vec_pref_cost_c100,c3)
    }
    vec=c(vec,mean(1-load_pop1$fit),mean(vec_pref_cost_c1),mean(vec_pref_cost_c2),mean(vec_pref_cost_c10),mean(vec_pref_cost_c100))
    
    pref_cost[k,]=c(pref,vec)
  }
  
}

```

Display and compare the effect of choosiness versus mutational load
```{r plot comparison choosiness cost versus mutaitonal load}
if(hasPopFile){
  #pdf("Figure/cost_of_preference.pdf",width=8,height=6)
  plot(-10,xlim=c(10^-8,1),ylim=c(10^-25,1),log='xy',xlab=expression('Preference strength, P'[C]),ylab="Reduction in fitness")
  points(pref_cost[,1],pref_cost[,3],col="cyan",pch=16)
  points(pref_cost[,1],pref_cost[,4],col="blue",pch=16)
  points(pref_cost[,1],pref_cost[,5],col="purple",pch=16)
  legend("bottomleft",c("1","2","10"),pch=16,col=c("cyan","blue","purple"),title = expression("Number of possible pairings, " ~chi))
  #points(pref_cost[,1],pref_cost[,6],col="black",pch=16)
  points(pref_cost[,1],pref_cost[,2],type='l')
  #dev.off()
}
```

Compute the mutational load and cost of choosiness
```{r}
if(hasPopFile){
  load_pop=read.table("output_iso_nodmi_nopref/pop_LC_1_LA0.1_MC0_DMI0_rep1.txt",fill=NA,skip=1,colClasses = "factor")
  
  pref_cost=matrix(0,nrow=16,ncol=13)
  pref_vec=10^(-seq(0.5,8,0.5))
  for (k in 1:16){
    pref=pref_vec[k]
    vec_pref_cost_c1=c()
    vec_pref_cost_c2=c()
    vec_pref_cost_c3=c()
    vec_pref_cost_c10=c()
    vec_pref_cost_c100=c()
    
    load_pop1=load_pop[1:which(load_pop$V1=="Female_pop2"),]
    n1f=as.numeric(as.character(load_pop1[1,2]))
    n1m=as.numeric(as.character(load_pop1[2+2*n1f,2]))
    load_pop1=load_pop1[load_pop1[,6]!="" ,c(2,4,6,8,10,12)]
    load_pop1=as.data.frame(lapply(lapply(load_pop1,as.character),as.numeric))
    load_pop1$pheno=rowSums(load_pop1[,-1])
    
    load_pop1=load_pop1[c(T,F),c(1,7)]+load_pop1[c(F,T),c(1,7)]
    load_pop1$fit=exp(log(0.1)*(load_pop1$pheno-5)^2/100)
    
    c2=sample(seq(n1f+1,n1f+n1m),1000,prob=load_pop1[seq(n1f+1,n1f+n1m),3])
    for (i in 1:1000){
      c1=sample(seq(n1f),size=1,prob=load_pop1[seq(n1f),3])
      c3=prod(1-exp(log(pref)*(load_pop1[c1,2]-load_pop1[c2[i],2])^2/100))
      vec_pref_cost_c1=c(vec_pref_cost_c1,c3)
      c1=sample(seq(n1f),size=2,prob=load_pop1[seq(n1f),3])
      c3=prod(1-exp(log(pref)*(load_pop1[c1,2]-load_pop1[c2[i],2])^2/100))
      vec_pref_cost_c2=c(vec_pref_cost_c2,c3)
      c1=sample(seq(n1f),size=3,prob=load_pop1[seq(n1f),3])
      c3=prod(1-exp(log(pref)*(load_pop1[c1,2]-load_pop1[c2[i],2])^2/100))
      vec_pref_cost_c3=c(vec_pref_cost_c3,c3)
      c1=sample(seq(n1f),size=10,prob=load_pop1[seq(n1f),3])
      c3=prod(1-exp(log(pref)*(load_pop1[c1,2]-load_pop1[c2[i],2])^2/100))
      vec_pref_cost_c10=c(vec_pref_cost_c10,c3)
      c1=sample(seq(n1f),size=100,prob=load_pop1[seq(n1f),3])
      c3=prod(1-exp(log(pref)*(load_pop1[c1,2]-load_pop1[c2[i],2])^2/100))
      vec_pref_cost_c100=c(vec_pref_cost_c100,c3)
    }
    vec=c(mean(1-load_pop1$fit),mean(vec_pref_cost_c1),mean(vec_pref_cost_c2),mean(vec_pref_cost_c10),mean(vec_pref_cost_c100),mean(vec_pref_cost_c3))
    
    load_pop1=load_pop[-(1:(which(load_pop$V1=="Female_pop2")-1)),]
    n1f=as.numeric(as.character(load_pop1[1,2]))
    n1m=as.numeric(as.character(load_pop1[2+2*n1f,2]))
    load_pop1=load_pop1[load_pop1[,6]!="" ,c(2,4,6,8,10,12)]
    load_pop1=as.data.frame(lapply(lapply(load_pop1,as.character),as.numeric))
    load_pop1$pheno=rowSums(load_pop1[,-1])
    
    load_pop1=load_pop1[c(T,F),c(1,7)]+load_pop1[c(F,T),c(1,7)]
    load_pop1$fit=exp(log(0.1)*(load_pop1$pheno+5)^2/100)
    
    c2=sample(seq(n1f+1,n1f+n1m),1000,prob=load_pop1[seq(n1f+1,n1f+n1m),3])
    for (i in 1:1000){
      c1=sample(seq(n1f),size=1,prob=load_pop1[seq(n1f),3])
      c3=prod(1-exp(log(pref)*(load_pop1[c1,2]-load_pop1[c2[i],2])^2/100))
      vec_pref_cost_c1=c(vec_pref_cost_c1,c3)
      c1=sample(seq(n1f),size=2,prob=load_pop1[seq(n1f),3])
      c3=prod(1-exp(log(pref)*(load_pop1[c1,2]-load_pop1[c2[i],2])^2/100))
      vec_pref_cost_c2=c(vec_pref_cost_c2,c3)
      c1=sample(seq(n1f),size=3,prob=load_pop1[seq(n1f),3])
      c3=prod(1-exp(log(pref)*(load_pop1[c1,2]-load_pop1[c2[i],2])^2/100))
      vec_pref_cost_c3=c(vec_pref_cost_c3,c3)
      c1=sample(seq(n1f),size=10,prob=load_pop1[seq(n1f),3])
      c3=prod(1-exp(log(pref)*(load_pop1[c1,2]-load_pop1[c2[i],2])^2/100))
      vec_pref_cost_c10=c(vec_pref_cost_c10,c3)
      c1=sample(seq(n1f),size=100,prob=load_pop1[seq(n1f),3])
      c3=prod(1-exp(log(pref)*(load_pop1[c1,2]-load_pop1[c2[i],2])^2/100))
      vec_pref_cost_c100=c(vec_pref_cost_c100,c3)
    }
    vec=c(vec,mean(1-load_pop1$fit),mean(vec_pref_cost_c1),mean(vec_pref_cost_c2),mean(vec_pref_cost_c10),mean(vec_pref_cost_c100),mean(vec_pref_cost_c3))
    
    pref_cost[k,]=c(pref,vec)
  }
}  
```

Figure S5
```{r}
if(hasPopFile){
  #pdf("Figure/cost_of_preference_alt.pdf",width=8,height=6)
  plot(-10,xlim=c(10^-8,1),ylim=c(10^-25,1),log='xy',xlab="Preference strength",ylab="Fitness cost")
  points(pref_cost[,1],pref_cost[,3],col="cyan",pch=16)
  points(pref_cost[,1],pref_cost[,4],col="deepskyblue2",pch=16)
  points(pref_cost[,1],pref_cost[,7],col="blue",pch=16)
  points(pref_cost[,1],pref_cost[,5],col="purple",pch=16)
  legend("bottomleft",c("1","2","3","10"),pch=16,col=c("cyan","deepskyblue2","blue","purple"),title = "Number of\n possible pairings")
  #points(pref_cost[,1],pref_cost[,6],col="black",pch=16)
  points(pref_cost[,1],pref_cost[,2],type='l')
  points(pref_cost[,1],1/20000+0*pref_cost[,1],type='l',lty=2)
  
  #plot(-10,xlim=c(10^-8,1),ylim=c(10^-25,1),log='xy',xlab="Preference strength",ylab="Fitness cost")
  #points(pref_cost[,1],pref_cost[,8],col="cyan",pch=16)
  #points(pref_cost[,1],pref_cost[,9],col="blue",pch=16)
  #points(pref_cost[,1],pref_cost[,10],col="purple",pch=16)
  #legend("bottomleft",c("1","2","10"),pch=16,col=c("cyan","blue","purple"),title = "Number of\n possible pairings")
  #points(pref_cost[,1],pref_cost[,6],col="black",pch=16)
  #points(pref_cost[,1],pref_cost[,7],type='l')
  #dev.off()
}
```

## Comparing starting conditions
Subset the data to select case for different starting conditions
Rename life cycle and origin to better distinguish between cases
```{r select data starting conditions}
data_temp=data_all[data_all$initial_cost==100&data_all$ep_FL==2&data_all$mig_rate %in% c(0,0.005,0.05,0.2)&data_all$ep_dmi==0.1&data_all$mu_back==1&data_all$nb_ind==10000&data_all$mut_rate==1e-06&data_all$nb_loci==500&data_all$nb_dmi==50&data_all$nb_dim==1&data_all$fit_alt %in% c(0,0.1),]
data_temp$origin=as.character(data_temp$origin)
data_temp$origin[data_temp$origin=="Extension"]="Ancestral"
data_temp$origin[data_temp$origin=="ExtensionSC"]="Diverged SC"
data_temp$origin[data_temp$origin=="Diverged SC"&data_temp$initial_pref==0.0001]="SC + initial mate choice"

data_temp$origin[data_temp$origin=="Ancestral"&data_temp$initial_pref<1]="Ancestral +MC"

data_temp$life_cycle2=as.character(data_temp$life_cycle2)
data_temp$life_cycle2[data_temp$life_cycle2=="sel-mig"]="Adult dispersal"
data_temp$life_cycle2[data_temp$life_cycle2=="mig-sel"]="Juvenile dispersal"
data_temp$life_cycle2[data_temp$life_cycle2=="isolated"]="Isolated"
data_temp$life_cycle2=factor(data_temp$life_cycle2,c("Isolated","Adult dispersal","Juvenile dispersal"))

data_temp=data_temp[data_temp$origin != "Ancestral +MC",]
data_temp$origin[data_temp$origin=="Diverged SC"]="SC"
data_temp$origin=as.factor(data_temp$origin)
#data_temp$life_cycle2=as.factor(data_temp$life_cycle2)
#data_temp$life_cycle=data_temp$life_cycle2

data_temp=data_temp[data_temp$generations %in% unique(data_temp$generations[data_temp$generations<20000|data_temp$generations%%20000==0]),]
display_constant(data_temp)

data_temp_temp=data_temp[(data_temp$mig_rate==0&data_temp$origin=="Ancestral"&data_temp$rep2 %in% c(seq(30),seq(101,110))) |(data_temp$mig_rate>0&data_temp$rep<31)|(data_temp$mig_rate==0&data_temp$origin!="Ancestral"&data_temp$life_cycle=="sel-mig"),]

data_temp_temp$life_cycle3=paste(data_temp_temp$life_cycle2,data_temp_temp$origin,sep="; ")
data_temp_temp$life_cycle3=factor(data_temp_temp$life_cycle3, levels = c("Isolated; Ancestral","Isolated; SC","Isolated; SC + initial mate choice","Adult dispersal; Ancestral","Adult dispersal; SC","Adult dispersal; SC + initial mate choice","Juvenile dispersal; Ancestral","Juvenile dispersal; SC","Juvenile dispersal; SC + initial mate choice"))

```

Figure 4 - Figure S9
```{r figure starting conditions, fig.height=6, fig.width=10}
#pdf("Figure/effect_of_starting_conditions_v3.pdf",width=8,height=4.8)

ggplot(data_temp_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=log10((pref_m1+pref_f1)/2),symbol=as.factor(rep2),col=as.factor(mig_rate)))+geom_line(alpha=0.2)+facet_wrap(~life_cycle3,ncol = 3)+ theme_bw()+theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean log choosiness")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=log10((pref_m1+pref_f1)/2),group=mig_rate),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=hcl.colors(5,"Plasma"))+labs(col="Migration rate")+theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = -.04, vjust = -7))+labs(title="A/")

ggplot(data_temp_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m1_DI,symbol=as.factor(rep2),col=as.factor(mig_rate)))+geom_line(alpha=0.2)+facet_wrap(~life_cycle3,ncol = 3)+ theme_bw()+ylab("Mean phenotype")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m1_DI,group=mig_rate),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=hcl.colors(5,"Plasma"))+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")+geom_hline(aes(yintercept = opt_one_DI*(1-mig_rate)+opt_two_DI*(mig_rate)),linetype="dashed",col="black")+labs(col="Migration rate")+theme(legend.position = c(0.24,0.05),legend.direction = "horizontal")


ggplot(data_temp_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-F1_m1f2,symbol=as.factor(rep2),col=as.factor(mig_rate)))+geom_line(alpha=0.2)+facet_wrap(~life_cycle3,ncol = 3)+theme_bw()+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean hybrid load")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-F1_m1f2,group=mig_rate),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=hcl.colors(5,"Plasma"))+labs(col="Migration rate")

ggplot(data_temp_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=fit_eco_m1,symbol=as.factor(rep2),col=as.factor(mig_rate)))+geom_line(alpha=0.2)+facet_wrap(~life_cycle3,ncol = 3)+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean ecological fitness")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=fit_eco_m1,group=mig_rate),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=hcl.colors(5,"Plasma"))+coord_trans(y="log10")+labs(col="Migration rate")

ggplot(data_temp_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2),symbol=as.factor(rep2),col=as.factor(mig_rate)))+geom_line(alpha=0.2)+facet_wrap(~life_cycle3,ncol = 3)+ theme_bw()+theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean corrected hybrid load")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2),group=mig_rate),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=hcl.colors(5,"Plasma"))+labs(col="Migration rate")+theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = -.04, vjust = -7))+labs(title="B/")


ggplot(data_temp_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=log((F1_m1f2))/log(1-ep_dmi)/nb_dmi,symbol=as.factor(rep2),col=as.factor(mig_rate)))+geom_line(alpha=0.2)+facet_wrap(~life_cycle3,ncol = 3,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme_bw()+theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean proportion of fixed DMI")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=log((F1_m1f2))/log(1-ep_dmi)/nb_dmi,group=mig_rate),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=hcl.colors(5,"Plasma"))+geom_hline(aes(yintercept = 2/9),linetype="dashed",col="black")+geom_hline(aes(yintercept = 1/2),linetype="dotted",col="black")+labs(col="Migration rate")


ggplot(data_temp_temp[data_temp_temp$generations==500000,],aes(y=1-(F1_m1f2+F1_m2f1)/(fit_dmi_m1/2+fit_dmi_f2/2+fit_dmi_f1/2+fit_dmi_m2/2),x=-log10(pref_m1/2+pref_f1/2),symbol=as.factor(rep2),col=as.factor(mig_rate)))+geom_point(alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~life_cycle3,ncol = 3)+ theme_bw()+theme(legend.position = "bottom")+xlab("- Log mean choosiness")+ylab("Mean corrected hybrid load")+labs(title = "After 50N generations")+labs(col="Migration rate")+scale_color_manual(values=hcl.colors(5,"Plasma"))+geom_hline(yintercept = max(data_temp00$hyb_load)*0.25)+geom_vline(xintercept = -min(log10(data_temp00$pref))*0.25)

ggplot(data_temp_temp[data_temp_temp$generations==1000000,],aes(y=1-(F1_m1f2+F1_m2f1)/(fit_dmi_m1/2+fit_dmi_f2/2+fit_dmi_f1/2+fit_dmi_m2/2),x=-log10(pref_m1/2+pref_f1/2),symbol=as.factor(rep2),col=as.factor(mig_rate)))+geom_point(alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~life_cycle3,ncol = 3)+ theme_bw()+theme(legend.position = "bottom")+xlab("- Log mean choosiness")+ylab("Mean corrected hybrid load")+labs(title = "After 100N generations")+labs(col="Migration rate")+scale_color_manual(values=hcl.colors(5,"Plasma"))+geom_hline(yintercept = 0.097)+geom_vline(xintercept = -min(log10(0.034)))
#dev.off()
```

## Effect of the DMI network
Subset the data for the effect of the network of DMIs
```{r select data map}
data_temp=data_all[data_all$origin=="Ancestral"&data_all$initial_cost==100&data_all$ep_FL==2&data_all$life_cycle2!="mig-sel"&data_all$mig_rate %in% c(0,0.005,0.05,0.2)&data_all$mu_back==1&data_all$ep_dmi==0.1&data_all$nb_ind==10000&data_all$mut_rate==1e-06&data_all$initial_pref==1&data_all$generations<500001&data_all$nb_dim!=2,]
display_constant(data_temp)
data_temp$dmi_scheme=as.character(data_temp$dmi_scheme)

data_temp$dmi_scheme[data_temp$nb_loci==800&data_temp$dmi_scheme=="default"]="network"
#data_temp$dmi_scheme[data_temp$nb_dmi==50]="default"
#data_temp$dmi_scheme[data_temp$nb_dmi==200]="neutral"

data_temp$dmi_scheme[data_temp$nb_dmi==250]="optimized"
data_temp$dmi_scheme=factor(data_temp$dmi_scheme,levels = c("neutral","network","default","optimized"))
data_temp=data_temp[data_temp$rep<31,]
data_temp=data_temp[!(data_temp$mig_rate==0&data_temp$dmi_scheme=="default"&data_temp$nb_dim==3),]

```

Display the effect of the network of DMIs; Figure S14
```{r figure DMI maps, fig.height=3.5, fig.width=7}
#pdf("Figure/effect_of_DMIs_map.pdf",width=7,height=3.5)
ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=log10((pref_m1+pref_f1)/2),symbol=as.factor(rep2),col=as.factor(mig_rate)))+geom_line(alpha=0.2)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(dmi_scheme),ncol = 4)+ theme_bw()+theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean log choosiness")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=log10((pref_m1+pref_f1)/2),group=as.factor(mig_rate)),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=hcl.colors(5,"Plasma"))+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")+labs(col="Migration rate")

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m1_DI,symbol=as.factor(rep2),col=as.factor(mig_rate)))+geom_line(alpha=0.2)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(dmi_scheme),ncol = 4)+ theme_bw()+theme(legend.position = c(0.3,0.08),legend.direction = "horizontal")+ylab("Mean phenotype")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m1_DI,group=mig_rate),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=hcl.colors(5,"Plasma"))+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")+labs(col="Migration rate")+theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = -.04, vjust = -7))+labs(title="A/")#+geom_hline(aes(yintercept = opt_one_DI*(1-mig_rate)+opt_two_DI*(mig_rate)),linetype="dashed",col="black")

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-F1_m1f2,symbol=as.factor(rep2),col=as.factor(mig_rate)))+geom_line(alpha=0.2)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(dmi_scheme),ncol = 4)+ theme_bw()+theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean hybrid load")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-F1_m1f2,group=mig_rate),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=hcl.colors(5,"Plasma"))+labs(col="Migration rate")

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=fit_eco_m1,symbol=as.factor(rep2),col=as.factor(mig_rate)))+geom_line(alpha=0.2)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(dmi_scheme),ncol = 4)+theme_bw()+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean ecological fitness")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=fit_eco_m1,group=mig_rate),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=hcl.colors(5,"Plasma"))+coord_trans(y="log10")+labs(col="Migration rate")

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2),symbol=as.factor(rep2),col=as.factor(mig_rate)))+geom_line(alpha=0.2)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(dmi_scheme),ncol = 4)+theme_bw()+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean corrected hybrid load")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2),group=mig_rate),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=hcl.colors(5,"Plasma"))+labs(col="Migration rate")

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=log((F1_m1f2))/log(1-ep_dmi)/nb_dmi,symbol=as.factor(rep2),col=as.factor(mig_rate)))+geom_line(alpha=0.2)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(dmi_scheme),ncol = 4,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+theme_bw()+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean proportion of fixed DMI")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=log((F1_m1f2))/log(1-ep_dmi)/nb_dmi,group=mig_rate),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=hcl.colors(5,"Plasma"))+geom_hline(aes(yintercept = 2/9),linetype="dashed",col="black")+labs(col="Migration rate")+theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = -.04, vjust = -7))+labs(title="B/")
#dev.off()
```

Figure 5
```{r}
#pdf("Figure/effect_of_DMIs_map_v2.pdf",width=7,height=3.5)
data_temp=data_temp[data_temp$dmi_scheme %in%  c("neutral","default"),]
ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m1_DI,symbol=as.factor(rep2),col=as.factor(mig_rate)))+geom_line(alpha=0.2)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(dmi_scheme),ncol = 4)+ theme_bw()+theme(legend.position = c(0.3,0.08),legend.direction = "horizontal")+ylab("Mean phenotype")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m1_DI,group=mig_rate),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=hcl.colors(5,"Plasma"))+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")+labs(col="Migration rate")+theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = -.04, vjust = -7))+labs(title="A/")
ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=log((F1_m1f2))/log(1-ep_dmi)/nb_dmi,symbol=as.factor(rep2),col=as.factor(mig_rate)))+geom_line(alpha=0.2)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(dmi_scheme),ncol = 4,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+theme_bw()+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean proportion of fixed DMI")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=log((F1_m1f2))/log(1-ep_dmi)/nb_dmi,group=mig_rate),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=hcl.colors(5,"Plasma"))+geom_hline(aes(yintercept = 2/9),linetype="dashed",col="black")+labs(col="Migration rate")+theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = -.04, vjust = -7))+labs(title="B/")
ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=log10((pref_m1+pref_f1)/2),symbol=as.factor(rep2),col=as.factor(mig_rate)))+geom_line(alpha=0.2)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(dmi_scheme),ncol = 4)+ theme_bw()+theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean log choosiness")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=log10((pref_m1+pref_f1)/2),group=as.factor(mig_rate)),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=hcl.colors(5,"Plasma"))+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")+labs(col="Migration rate")+theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = -.04, vjust = -7))+labs(title="C/")
#dev.off()
```


Display the effect of the DMI map - the population in the A environment is given on the left of each facet and the population in the B environment on the right
```{r figure DMI maps both pop}
#pdf("Figure/effect_of_DMIs_map_both_pop.pdf",width=10,height=6)
ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pref_m1,symbol=as.factor(rep2),col=as.factor(mig_rate)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+geom_line(aes(x=52+generations/nb_ind,y=pref_m2,symbol=as.factor(rep2),col=as.factor(mig_rate)),alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(dmi_scheme),ncol = 4)+ theme(legend.position = "bottom")+ylab("Mean preference")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pref_m1,group=as.factor(mig_rate)),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+stat_summary(aes(x=52+generations/nb_ind,y=pref_m2,group=as.factor(mig_rate)),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple","blue","red"))+coord_trans(y="log10")+geom_vline(xintercept = c(51),col="black")+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)",labels=c(0,25,"50|",0,25,50),breaks = c(0,25,50,52,77,102))+xlim(0,102)

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m1_DI,symbol=as.factor(rep2),col=as.factor(mig_rate)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+geom_line(aes(x=52+generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m2_DI,symbol=as.factor(rep2),col=as.factor(mig_rate)),alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(dmi_scheme),ncol = 4)+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean phenotype")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m1_DI,group=mig_rate),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+stat_summary(aes(x=52+generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m2_DI,group=mig_rate),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple","blue","red"))+geom_vline(xintercept = c(51),col="black")+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)",labels=c(0,25,"50|",0,25,50),breaks = c(0,25,50,52,77,102))+geom_hline(aes(yintercept = opt_one_DI*(1-mig_rate)+opt_two_DI*(mig_rate)),linetype="dashed",col="black")+geom_hline(aes(yintercept = opt_two_DI*(1-mig_rate)+opt_one_DI*(mig_rate)),linetype="dashed",col="black")

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-F1_m1f2,symbol=as.factor(rep2),col=as.factor(mig_rate)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+geom_line(aes(x=52+generations/nb_ind,y=1-F1_m2f1,symbol=as.factor(rep2),col=as.factor(mig_rate)),alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(dmi_scheme),ncol = 4)+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean hybrid load")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-F1_m1f2,group=mig_rate),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+stat_summary(aes(x=52+generations/nb_ind,y=1-F1_m2f1,group=mig_rate),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple","blue","red"))+geom_vline(xintercept = c(51),col="black")+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)",labels=c(0,25,"50|",0,25,50),breaks = c(0,25,50,52,77,102))

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=fit_eco_m1,symbol=as.factor(rep2),col=as.factor(mig_rate)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+geom_line(aes(x=52+generations/nb_ind,y=fit_eco_m2,symbol=as.factor(rep2),col=as.factor(mig_rate)),alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(dmi_scheme),ncol = 4)+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean ecological fitness")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=fit_eco_m1,group=mig_rate),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+stat_summary(aes(x=52+generations/nb_ind,y=fit_eco_m2,group=mig_rate),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple","blue","red"))+coord_trans(y="log10")+geom_vline(xintercept = c(51),col="black")+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)",labels=c(0,25,"50|",0,25,50),breaks = c(0,25,50,52,77,102))
```
