```{r figure DMI maps both pop}
ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2),symbol=as.factor(rep2),col=as.factor(mig_rate)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+geom_line(aes(x=52+generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m2f1)/(fit_dmi_m2+fit_dmi_f1),symbol=as.factor(rep2),col=as.factor(mig_rate)),alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(dmi_scheme),ncol = 4)+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean corrected hybrid load")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2),group=mig_rate),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+stat_summary(aes(x=52+generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m2f1)/(fit_dmi_m2+fit_dmi_f1),group=mig_rate),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple","blue","red"))+geom_vline(xintercept = c(51),col="black")+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)",labels=c(0,25,"50|",0,25,50),breaks = c(0,25,50,52,77,102))

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=log((F1_m1f2))/log(1-ep_dmi)/nb_dmi,symbol=as.factor(rep2),col=as.factor(mig_rate)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+geom_line(aes(x=52+generations/nb_ind,y=log((F1_m2f1))/log(1-ep_dmi)/nb_dmi,symbol=as.factor(rep2),col=as.factor(mig_rate)),alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(dmi_scheme),ncol = 2,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme(legend.position = "bottom")+ylab("Mean proportion of fixed DMI")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=log((F1_m1f2))/log(1-ep_dmi)/nb_dmi,group=mig_rate),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+stat_summary(aes(x=52+generations/nb_ind,y=log((F1_m2f1))/log(1-ep_dmi)/nb_dmi,group=mig_rate),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple","red","blue"))+geom_vline(xintercept = c(51),col="black")+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)",labels=c(0,25,"50|",0,25,50),breaks = c(0,25,50,52,77,102))+geom_hline(aes(yintercept = 2/9),linetype="dashed",col="black")+geom_hline(aes(yintercept = 1/2),linetype="dotted",col="black")
#dev.off()
```

Effect of DMIs map, both with symmetric and asymmetric mutation rate
```{r select data map DMI different back mutation}
data_temp=data_all[data_all$mig_rate==0&data_all$nb_dim==1&data_all$ep_dmi==0.1&data_all$ep_FL==2&data_all$initial_pref==1&data_all$rep<11&data_all$dmi_scheme=="default",]

display_constant(data_temp)
data_temp$dmi_scheme=as.character(data_temp$dmi_scheme)
data_temp$rep[data_temp$life_cycle=="sel-mig"]=data_temp$rep[data_temp$life_cycle=="sel-mig"]+20
data_temp$dmi_scheme=as.character(data_temp$dmi_scheme)
data_temp$dmi_scheme[data_temp$nb_dmi==50&data_temp$dmi_scheme=="default"]="Default"
data_temp$dmi_scheme[data_temp$nb_dmi==200&data_temp$dmi_scheme=="default"]="Neutral DMIs"
data_temp$dmi_scheme[data_temp$origin=="Diverged SC"]="Diverged SC"
data_temp$dmi_scheme[data_temp$origin=="ExtensionSC"]="Diverged SC"
#data_temp$dmi_scheme[data_temp$origin=="Diverged SC"&data_temp$initial_pref<1]="Diverged SC + IMC"
data_temp$dmi_scheme[data_temp$nb_dmi==250&data_temp$dmi_scheme=="default"]="Optimized"
data_temp$dmi_scheme[data_temp$nb_dmi==250&data_temp$origin=="Diverged SC"]="Optimized DSC"
#data_temp$dmi_scheme[data_temp$nb_dmi==200&data_temp$nb_loci==500&data_temp$dmi_scheme=="default"]="default 200DMIs"
#data_temp$dmi_scheme[data_temp$nb_dmi==200&data_temp$nb_loci==800&data_temp$dmi_scheme=="neutral"]="phenotype free"
#data_temp$dmi_scheme[data_temp$mut_rate*data_temp$nb_ind==0.01&data_temp$nb_dmi==200&data_temp$nb_loci==800&data_temp$dmi_scheme=="200 neutral DMIs"&data_temp$ep_dmi==0.1]="200 neutral DMIs; theta cst"
#data_temp$dmi_scheme[data_temp$mut_rate*data_temp$nb_ind==0.01&data_temp$nb_dmi==50&data_temp$nb_loci==500&data_temp$dmi_scheme=="default"]="default - theta cst"
data_temp$dmi_scheme[data_temp$rec_rate<10^(-4)]="Low rec"
data_temp$dmi_scheme[data_temp$mu_back==0.01]="Asym mut rate"

#data_temp2=data_temp[data_temp$dmi_scheme=="default - theta cst" & data_temp$nb_ind==10000,]
#data_temp2$dmi_scheme="default"

#data_temp=rbind(data_temp, data_temp2)
data_temp=data_temp[data_temp$dmi_scheme!="Neutral DMIs",]
data_temp$dmi_scheme=factor(data_temp$dmi_scheme,levels=c("Neutral DMIs","Default","Asym mut rate","Diverged SC","Optimized"))
data_temp$Ntheta=data_temp$nb_ind*(1+data_temp$mut_rate)


#data_temp$dmi_scheme=paste(data_temp$dmi_scheme,"ep", data_temp$ep_dmi)
#data_temp$dmi_scheme=paste(data_temp$dmi_scheme)
```



Display the effect of map of DMI and asymmetric back mutation - the population in the A environment is given on the left of each facet and the population in the B environment on the right Figure S15.
```{r proportion of DMI, fig.height=8, fig.width=10}
#pdf("Figure/proportion_of_DMI.pdf",width=8,height=6)

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations,y=log(F1_m1f2/(fit_dmi_f1+fit_dmi_f2)*2)/log(1-ep_dmi)/nb_dmi,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(Ntheta)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(dmi_scheme),ncol = 2)+theme_bw()+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Proportion of DMIs differently fixed")+xlab("Time (in  generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations,y=log(F1_m1f2/(fit_dmi_f1+fit_dmi_f2)*2)/log(1-ep_dmi)/nb_dmi,group=Ntheta),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("blue","purple","red"),labels=c("N=1000, theta=0.001","N=1000, theta=0.01","N=10000, theta=0.01"))+labs(color="Population size and theta")+geom_abline(intercept = c(2/9,0.5),slope = 0,col="black",linetype=2)

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=log(F1_m1f2/(fit_dmi_f1+fit_dmi_f2)*2)/log(1-ep_dmi)/nb_dmi,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(Ntheta)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(dmi_scheme),ncol = 2)+theme_bw()+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Proportion of DMIs differently fixed")+xlab("Time (in N  generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=log(F1_m1f2/(fit_dmi_f1+fit_dmi_f2)*2)/log(1-ep_dmi)/nb_dmi,group=Ntheta),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("blue","purple","red"),labels=c("N=1000, theta=0.001","N=1000, theta=0.01","N=10000, theta=0.01"))+labs(color="Population size and theta")+geom_abline(intercept = c(2/9,0.5),slope = 0,col="black",linetype=2)+xlim(0,500)

#dev.off()

#ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=log(F1_m1f2/(fit_dmi_f1+fit_dmi_f2)*2)/log(1-ep_dmi)/nb_dmi,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(nb_ind)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(dmi_scheme),ncol = 3,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme(legend.position = "bottom")+ylab("Proportion of DMIs differently fixed")+xlab("Time (in  generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=log(F1_m1f2/(fit_dmi_f1+fit_dmi_f2)*2)/log(1-ep_dmi)/nb_dmi,group=nb_ind),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("blue","red","purple","orange","cyan","magenta","green","black"))+labs(color="Population size")+scale_x_log10()
```

Display proportion of DMIs
```{r figure proportion of DMIs}
# pdf("Figure/expected_proportion_dmi.pdf",width=8,height=6)
case1_10k=simulate_dyn_Ab(nb_pairs=1000,pop=10000)
table(case1_10k)
table(case1_10k[c(T,F)]+10*case1_10k[c(F,T)])
mat_dmi=matrix(abs(case1_10k[c(T,F)]+10*case1_10k[c(F,T)])==9,nrow=50)
h50_10k=hist(colSums(mat_dmi)/50,breaks=seq(0,1,0.025),plot = FALSE)
plot(h50_10k,xlim=c(0,.4),col = alpha("blue",0.3),main="Distribution of expected proportion of DMI in F1 individuals",ylim=c(0,35),xlab="Proportion")
abline(v=c(mean(colSums(mat_dmi)/50)),col=c("blue"))
case2_10k=simulate_dyn_Ab(nb_pairs=4000,pop=10000)
table(case2_10k)
table(case2_10k[c(T,F)]+10*case2_10k[c(F,T)])
mat_dmi=matrix(abs(case2_10k[c(T,F)]+10*case2_10k[c(F,T)])==9,nrow=200)
h200_10k=hist(colSums(mat_dmi)/200,breaks=seq(0,1,0.025),plot = FALSE)
plot(h200_10k,add=TRUE,col=alpha("red",0.3))
abline(v=c(mean(colSums(mat_dmi)/200)),col=c("red"))
abline(v=2/9,col=c("black"),lty=2)
legend("topright",c("50 DMIs","200 DMIs"),col=c("blue","red"),pch=15)
# dev.off()
```

Distribution of F1 hybrid load for population in isolation or with migration (m=0.2) starting from ancestral origin or secondary contact
```{r distribution of F1 hybrid load}
#pdf("Figure/distribution_f1.pdf",width=8,height=6)
data_temp=data_all[(data_all$mig_rate==0.2&(data_all$origin=="ExtensionSC"|data_all$origin=="Diverged SC")&data_all$initial_pref<1&data_all$generations>300000&data_all$fit_alt==0.1&data_all$ep_dmi==0.1&data_all$mu_back==1)|(data_all$mig_rate==0&data_all$nb_dim==1&data_all$fit_alt==0.1&data_all$nb_dmi==50&data_all$rec_rate==0.001&data_all$nb_loci==500&data_all$nb_ind==10000&data_all$initial_pref==1&data_all$origin=="Ancestral"&data_all$generations>300000&data_all$ep_dmi==0.1),]
display_constant(data_temp)
data_temp$cat="Isolated"
data_temp$cat[data_temp$life_cycle=="sel-mig"&data_temp$mig_rate==0.2]="Sec. contact - sel-mig"
data_temp$cat[data_temp$life_cycle=="mig-sel"&data_temp$mig_rate==0.2]="Sec. contact - mig-sel"

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=1-(F1_m1f2+F1_m2f1)/2))+geom_histogram(aes(x=1-(F1_m1f2+F1_m2f1)/2,y=after_stat(density)))+facet_wrap(~cat)+xlab("Hybrid load")+xlim(0,1)
#dev.off()
```


## Effect of the number of phenotypic traits and distance between environmental optimums
Subset the data for the effect of the number of phenotypic trait
```{r select data dimension}
data_temp=data_all[data_all$nb_ind==10000&data_all$origin=="Ancestral"&data_all$fit_alt==0.1&data_all$ep_dmi>0 & data_all$ep_FL==2&data_all$nb_dmi==50&data_all$nb_loci==500&data_all$ep_dmi==0.1&data_all$initial_cost==100&data_all$life_cycle=="mig-sel"&data_all$generations<=500000&data_all$mig_rate %in% c(0,0.005,0.05,0.2)&data_all$mu_back==1&data_all$initial_pref==1&data_all$opt_two_DI!=0&data_all$opt_one_DI!=6.774&data_all$rep<11,]
display_constant(data_temp )
data_temp$categ="dim=1; dist=10"
data_temp$categ[data_temp$nb_dim==3&data_temp$opt_one_DI==5]="dim=3; dist=17"
data_temp$categ[data_temp$nb_dim==3&data_temp$opt_one_DI==2.887]="dim=3; dist=10"
#data_temp$categ[data_temp$nb_dim==3&data_temp$opt_one_DI==6.774]="dim=3; dist=10;asym"
data_temp$categ=as.factor(data_temp$categ)
data_temp$mig_rate=factor(paste("m =",data_temp$mig_rate),levels = c("m = 0", "m = 5e-05","m = 5e-04", "m = 0.005", "m = 0.05", "m = 0.2"))
```




Display effect of the number of dimensions Figure S23
```{r figure number of dimension}
#pdf("Figure/effect_of_migration_and_3D.pdf",width=10,height=6)
ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pref_m1,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(categ)))+geom_line(alpha=0.2)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(mig_rate),labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme_bw()+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean choosiness")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pref_m1,group=categ),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple","blue","red"))+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")+coord_trans(y="log10")

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pref_m1,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(categ)))+geom_line(alpha=0.2)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(mig_rate),ncol = 2,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+theme_bw()+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean preference")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pref_m1,group=categ),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple","blue","red"))+coord_trans(y="log10")+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")+scale_y_continuous(labels=c(1,0.1,0.01,0.001),breaks=c(1,0.1,0.01,0.001))

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m1_DI,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(categ)))+geom_line(alpha=0.2)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(mig_rate),ncol = 2,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme_bw()+theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean phenotype")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m1_DI,group=categ),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple","blue","red"))+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")+geom_hline(aes(yintercept = opt_one_DI*(1-mig_rate)+opt_two_DI*(mig_rate)),linetype="dashed",col="black")

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-F1_m1f2,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(categ)))+geom_line(alpha=0.2)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(mig_rate),ncol = 2,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme_bw()+theme(legend.position = c(0.1,0.25))+ylab("Mean hybrid load")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-F1_m1f2,group=categ),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple","blue","red"))+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")+labs(col="")

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=fit_eco_m1,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(categ)))+geom_line(alpha=0.2)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(mig_rate),ncol = 2,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+theme_bw()+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean ecological fitness")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=fit_eco_m1,group=categ),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple","blue","red"))+coord_trans(y="log10")+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")+scale_y_continuous(labels=c(1,0.75,0.1,0.01,0.001),breaks=c(1,0.75,0.1,0.01,0.001))

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2),symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(categ)))+geom_line(alpha=0.2)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(mig_rate),ncol = 2,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme_bw()+theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean corrected hybrid load")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2),group=categ),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple","blue","red"))+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2),symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(categ)))+geom_line(alpha=0.2)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(mig_rate),ncol = 2,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+theme_bw()+ylab("Mean corrected hybrid load")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2),group=categ),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple","blue","red"))+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")

#dev.off()
```

## Effect of epistasis in isolation 
Subset the data for the default value and different shapes of the landscape and check which parameters are variable
```{r select data epistasis DMI, paged.print=FALSE}
data_temp=data_all[data_all$nb_ind==10000&data_all$fit_alt==0.1&data_all$var_cost==0&data_all$scenario=="all"&data_all$initial_cost==100&data_all$origin=="Ancestral"&data_all$rec_rate==0.001&data_all$nb_dim==1&data_all$nb_dmi==50&data_all$nb_loci==500&data_all$mut_rate==10^(-6)&data_all$mig_rate==0&data_all$life_cycle=="sel-mig"&data_all$mu_back==1&data_all$rep<=10,]
display_constant(data_temp )
```

Display the effect of epistasis of the DMI; Figure S13
```{r plot epistasis DMI}
#pdf("Figure/effect_of_ep_iso.pdf",width=8,height=6)
ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-F1_m1f2,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(ep_dmi)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+theme_bw()+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean hybrid load")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-F1_m1f2,group=ep_dmi),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("cyan","steelblue2","blue"))


ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2),symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(ep_dmi)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+theme_bw()+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean corrected hybrid load")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2),group=ep_dmi),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("cyan","steelblue2","blue"))

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=log(F1_m1f2/(fit_dmi_f1+fit_dmi_f2)*2)/log(1-ep_dmi)/nb_dmi,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(ep_dmi)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+theme_bw()+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Proportion of DMIs differently fixed")+xlab("Time (in N  generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=log(F1_m1f2/(fit_dmi_f1+fit_dmi_f2)*2)/log(1-ep_dmi)/nb_dmi,group=ep_dmi),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("cyan","steelblue2","blue"))
#dev.off()
```

## Effect of population size and mutation rate
```{r select data pop size}
data_temp=data_all[data_all$origin=="Ancestral"&data_all$fit_alt==0.1 & data_all$ep_FL==2&data_all$nb_dmi==50&data_all$nb_loci==500&data_all$ep_dmi==0.1&data_all$initial_cost==100&data_all$life_cycle=="sel-mig"&data_all$generations<=500000&data_all$mig_rate %in% c(0,0.05,0.2)&data_all$mu_back==1&data_all$nb_dim==1&data_all$initial_pref==1,]
display_constant(data_temp )
data_temp$categ="N=10k"
data_temp$categ[data_temp$nb_ind==1000&data_temp$mut_rate==0.00001]="N=1k, theta cst"
data_temp$categ[data_temp$nb_ind==1000&data_temp$mut_rate==0.000001]="N=1k"
data_temp$categ=as.factor(data_temp$categ)
```

```{r figure pop size}
#---- unscaled
ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations,y=pref_m1,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(categ)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+geom_line(aes(x=520000+generations,y=pref_m2,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(categ)),alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(mig_rate),ncol = 3,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean preference")+xlab("Time (in generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations,y=pref_m1,group=categ),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+stat_summary(aes(x=520000+generations,y=pref_m2,group=categ),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple","blue"))+coord_trans(y="log10")+geom_vline(xintercept = c(510000),col="black")+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)",labels=c(0,"250k","500k|",0,"250k","500k"),breaks = c(0,250000,500000,520000,770000,1020000))

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations,y=pheno_m1_DI,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(categ)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+geom_line(aes(x=520000+generations,y=pheno_m2_DI,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(categ)),alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(mig_rate),ncol = 3,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean phenotype")+xlab("Time (in generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations,y=pheno_m1_DI,group=categ),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+stat_summary(aes(x=520000+generations,y=pheno_m2_DI,group=categ),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple","blue"))+geom_vline(xintercept = c(510000),col="black")+scale_x_continuous(name="Time",labels=c(0,"250k","500k|",0,"250k","500k"),breaks = c(0,250000,500000,520000,770000,1020000))

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations,y=1-F1_m1f2,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(categ)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+geom_line(aes(x=520000+generations,y=1-F1_m2f1,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(categ)),alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(mig_rate),ncol = 2,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean hybrid load")+xlab("Time (in generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations,y=1-F1_m1f2,group=categ),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+stat_summary(aes(x=520000+generations,y=1-F1_m2f1,group=categ),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple","blue"))+geom_vline(xintercept = c(510000),col="black")+scale_x_continuous(name="Time",labels=c(0,"250k","500k|",0,"250k","500k"),breaks = c(0,250000,500000,520000,770000,1020000))

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations,y=fit_eco_m1,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(categ)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+geom_line(aes(x=520000+generations,y=fit_eco_m2,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(categ)),alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(mig_rate),ncol = 2,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean ecological fitness")+xlab("Time (in generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations,y=fit_eco_m1,group=categ),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+stat_summary(aes(x=520000+generations,y=fit_eco_m2,group=categ),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple","blue"))+geom_vline(xintercept = c(510000),col="black")+scale_x_continuous(name="Time",labels=c(0,"250k","500k|",0,"250k","500k"),breaks = c(0,250000,500000,520000,770000,1020000))

#---- scaled

ggplot(data_temp[data_temp$generations/data_temp$nb_ind<51,],aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m1_DI,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(categ)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+geom_line(aes(x=52+generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m2_DI,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(categ)),alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(mig_rate),ncol = 2,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean phenotype")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m1_DI,group=categ),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+stat_summary(aes(x=52+generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m2_DI,group=categ),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple","blue"))+geom_vline(xintercept = c(51),col="black")+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)",labels=c(0,25,"50|",0,25,50),breaks = c(0,25,50,52,77,102))+geom_hline(aes(yintercept = opt_one_DI*(1-mig_rate)+opt_two_DI*(mig_rate)),linetype="dashed",col="black")+geom_hline(aes(yintercept = opt_two_DI*(1-mig_rate)+opt_one_DI*(mig_rate)),linetype="dashed",col="black")

ggplot(data_temp[data_temp$generations/data_temp$nb_ind<51,],aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-F1_m1f2,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(categ)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+geom_line(aes(x=52+generations/nb_ind,y=1-F1_m2f1,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(categ)),alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(mig_rate),ncol = 2,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean hybrid load")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-F1_m1f2,group=categ),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+stat_summary(aes(x=52+generations/nb_ind,y=1-F1_m2f1,group=categ),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple","blue"))+geom_vline(xintercept = c(51),col="black")+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)",labels=c(0,25,"50|",0,25,50),breaks = c(0,25,50,52,77,102))

ggplot(data_temp[data_temp$generations/data_temp$nb_ind<51,],aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=fit_eco_m1,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(categ)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+geom_line(aes(x=52+generations/nb_ind,y=fit_eco_m2,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(categ)),alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(mig_rate),ncol = 2,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean ecological fitness")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=fit_eco_m1,group=categ),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+stat_summary(aes(x=52+generations/nb_ind,y=fit_eco_m2,group=categ),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple","blue"))+coord_trans(y="log10")+geom_vline(xintercept = c(51),col="black")+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)",labels=c(0,25,"50|",0,25,50),breaks = c(0,25,50,52,77,102))

ggplot(data_temp[data_temp$generations/data_temp$nb_ind<51,],aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2),symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(categ)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+geom_line(aes(x=52+generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m2f1)/(fit_dmi_m2+fit_dmi_f1),symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(categ)),alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(mig_rate),ncol = 2,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme(legend.position = "bottom")+ylab("Mean corrected hybrid load")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2),group=categ),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+stat_summary(aes(x=52+generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m2f1)/(fit_dmi_m2+fit_dmi_f1),group=categ),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple","blue"))+geom_vline(xintercept = c(51),col="black")+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)",labels=c(0,25,"50|",0,25,50),breaks = c(0,25,50,52,77,102))
```

### checking bm 1/10 percent
```{r select data with lower back mutation rate}
data_temp=data_all[data_all$mu_back==0.00001,]



display_constant(data_temp )
```

```{r display data with asymmetric backmutation}
ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pref_m1,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(fit_alt)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+geom_line(aes(x=22+generations/nb_ind,y=pref_m2,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(fit_alt)),alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(mig_rate),ncol = 3,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean preference")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pref_m1,group=fit_alt),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+stat_summary(aes(x=22+generations/nb_ind,y=pref_m2,group=fit_alt),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple"))+coord_trans(y="log10")+geom_vline(xintercept = c(21),col="black")+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)",labels=c(0,10,"20|",0,10,20),breaks = c(0,10,20,22,37,42))+scale_y_continuous(labels=c(1,0.1,0.01,0.001),breaks=c(1,0.1,0.01,0.001))

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m1_DI,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(fit_alt)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+geom_line(aes(x=22+generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m2_DI,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(fit_alt)),alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(mig_rate),ncol = 3,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean phenotype")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m1_DI,group=fit_alt),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+stat_summary(aes(x=22+generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m2_DI,group=fit_alt),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple"))+geom_vline(xintercept = c(21),col="black")+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)",labels=c(0,10,"20|",0,10,20),breaks = c(0,10,20,22,37,42))+geom_hline(aes(yintercept = opt_one_DI*(1-mig_rate)+opt_two_DI*(mig_rate)),linetype="dashed",col="black")+geom_hline(aes(yintercept = opt_two_DI*(1-mig_rate)+opt_one_DI*(mig_rate)),linetype="dashed",col="black")

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-F1_m1f2,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(fit_alt)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+geom_line(aes(x=22+generations/nb_ind,y=1-F1_m2f1,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(fit_alt)),alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(mig_rate),ncol = 3,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean hybrid load")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-F1_m1f2,group=fit_alt),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+stat_summary(aes(x=22+generations/nb_ind,y=1-F1_m2f1,group=fit_alt),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple"))+geom_vline(xintercept = c(21),col="black")+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)",labels=c(0,10,"20|",0,10,20),breaks = c(0,10,20,22,37,42))

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=fit_eco_m1,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(fit_alt)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+geom_line(aes(x=22+generations/nb_ind,y=fit_eco_m2,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(fit_alt)),alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(mig_rate),ncol = 3,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean ecological fitness")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=fit_eco_m1,group=fit_alt),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+stat_summary(aes(x=22+generations/nb_ind,y=fit_eco_m2,group=fit_alt),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple"))+coord_trans(y="log10")+geom_vline(xintercept = c(21),col="black")+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)",labels=c(0,10,"20|",0,10,20),breaks = c(0,10,20,22,37,42))+scale_y_continuous(labels=c(1,0.75,0.1,0.01,0.001),breaks=c(1,0.75,0.1,0.01,0.001))

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2),symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(fit_alt)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+geom_line(aes(x=22+generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m2f1)/(fit_dmi_m2+fit_dmi_f1),symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(fit_alt)),alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(mig_rate),ncol = 3,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean corrected hybrid load")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2),group=fit_alt),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+stat_summary(aes(x=52+generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m2f1)/(fit_dmi_m2+fit_dmi_f1),group=fit_alt),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple"))+geom_vline(xintercept = c(51),col="black")+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)",labels=c(0,10,"20|",0,10,20),breaks = c(0,10,20,22,37,42))
```


## Relative Selection vs migration?
### The phenotype of the F1 individuals matches the ancestral one 
Subset the data for the effect of the ecological selection
```{r select data ecological gradient, paged.print=FALSE}
data_temp=data_all[data_all$nb_ind==10000&data_all$ep_dmi==0.1&data_all$var_cost==0&data_all$scenario=="all"&data_all$initial_cost==100&data_all$origin=="Ancestral"&data_all$rec_rate==0.001&data_all$nb_dim==1&data_all$nb_dmi==50&data_all$nb_loci==500&data_all$mut_rate==10^(-6)&data_all$mig_rate==0.2&data_all$generations<=500000&data_all$life_cycle=="mig-sel"&data_all$mu_back==1&data_all$rep<10,]
display_constant(data_temp)
```

Display the effect of the strength of ecological selection; Figure S3
```{r plot effect strength of ecological selection}
#pdf("Figure/effect_of_LA.pdf",width=10,height=6)
ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pref_m1,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(fit_alt)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+ theme_bw()+theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean preference")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pref_m1,group=fit_alt),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("purple","blue","cyan","orange","red"))+coord_trans(y="log10")+scale_y_continuous(labels=c(1,0.1,0.01,0.001),breaks=c(1,0.1,0.01,0.001))

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m1_DI,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(fit_alt)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+ theme_bw()+theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean phenotype")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m1_DI,group=fit_alt),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("purple","blue","cyan","orange","red"))+geom_hline(aes(yintercept = opt_one_DI*(1-mig_rate)+opt_two_DI*(mig_rate)),linetype="dashed",col="black")

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-F1_m1f2,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(life_cycle)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(fit_alt),ncol = 3)+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean hybrid load")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-F1_m1f2,group=fit_alt),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("purple","blue","cyan","orange","red"))

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=fit_eco_m1,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(life_cycle)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(fit_alt),ncol = 3)+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean ecological fitness")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=fit_eco_m1,group=fit_alt),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("purple","blue","cyan","orange","red"))+coord_trans(y="log10")

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2),symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(life_cycle)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(fit_alt),ncol = 3)+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean corrected hybrid load")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2),group=fit_alt),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("purple","blue","cyan","orange","red"))

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m1_DI-pheno_m2_DI,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(fit_alt)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+ theme_bw()+theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean phenotypic distance between 2 populations")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m1_DI-pheno_m2_DI,group=fit_alt),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("purple","blue","cyan","orange","red"))+geom_hline(aes(yintercept = opt_one_DI*(1-mig_rate)+opt_two_DI*(mig_rate)-(opt_two_DI*(1-mig_rate)+opt_one_DI*(mig_rate))),linetype="dashed",col="black")

#dev.off()
```

Load full population to check the phenotype distribution for the case of m=0.2 and different strengths of ecological selection
```{r distribution phenotype strong migration, fig.height=4, fig.width=6}
if(hasPopFile){
  mat_pheno_dist_pop1=matrix(0,nrow=50,ncol=200)
  
  folder_name=c("output_strgm_LC1","output_strgm_LC1_EF0d2","output_strgm_LC1_EF0d3","output_strgm_LC1_EF0d4","output_strgm_LC1_EF0d5")
  sel=seq(0.1,0.5,0.1)
  for( j in 1:5){
    for (i in 1:10){
      load_pop=read.table(paste(folder_name[j],"/pop_LC_1_LA",sel[j],"_MC1_DMI0.1_rep",i,".txt",sep=""),fill=NA,skip=1,colClasses = "factor")
      load_pop1=load_pop[1:which(load_pop$V1=="Female_pop2"),]
      n1f=as.numeric(as.character(load_pop1[1,2]))
      n1m=as.numeric(as.character(load_pop1[2+2*n1f,2]))
      load_pop1=load_pop1[load_pop1[,6]!="" ,c(2,4,6,8,10,12)]
      load_pop1=as.data.frame(lapply(lapply(load_pop1,as.character),as.numeric))
      load_pop1$pheno=rowSums(load_pop1[,-1])
      load_pop1=load_pop1[c(T,F),c(1,7)]+load_pop1[c(F,T),c(1,7)]
      
      mat_pheno_dist_pop1[i+10*(j-1),]=hist(load_pop1[seq(1,n1f),2],breaks=seq(-10,10,0.1),plot=FALSE)$counts
      +hist(load_pop1[seq(n1f+1,n1f+n1m),2],breaks=seq(-10,10,0.1),plot=FALSE)$counts
      
    }
  }
  
}
```

Display the distribution of phenotypes for strong migration and different strengths of ecological selection
```{r distribution phenotype gradient ecological selection}
if(hasPopFile){
  #pdf("Figure/Distribution_phenotype_strgm_function_sel.pdf",width=8,height=6)
  image.plot(seq(50),seq(-10,10,.1),mat_pheno_dist_pop1,zlim=c(1,max(mat_pheno_dist_pop1)),col = c("grey",plasma(100)),ylab="Phenotype",xlab="",xaxt = "n",yaxt="n",ylim=c(-6,6))
  abline(v=seq(10.5,50.5,10))
  axis(1,labels = c("w_alt=0.1 \n w_0=0.562","w_alt=0.2 \n w_0=0.669","w_alt=0.3 \n w_0=0.740","w_alt=0.4 \n w_0=0.795","w_alt=0.5 \n w_0=0.841"),at = c(5.5,15.5,25.5,35.5,45.5))
  axis(2,labels=c("opt A:\n 5", "opt B:\n 5","0","2.5","-2.5"),at=c(5,-5,0,2.5,-2.5))
  
  
  list_col=viridis::inferno(11)
  for (k in seq(0,40,10)){
    plot(-10000,xlim=c(-6,6),ylim=c(0,max(mat_pheno_dist_pop1[i,])),ylab="Counts",xlab="Phenotype")
    for(i in 1:10){
      points(seq(-9.95,9.95,.1),mat_pheno_dist_pop1[k+i,],type = 'l',col=list_col[i])
    }
    abline(h=0,v=c(-5,5))
  }
  #dev.off()
}
```

### The phenotype of the F1 individuals matches the ancestral one
```{r calculate fitness of F1 individuals}
exp(log(seq(0.1,0.4,0.1))*(25+0+4)/(25+25+81))
exp(log(seq(0.1,0.4,0.1))*(25+0+49)/(25+25+81))
exp(log(seq(0.1,0.4,0.1))*(2.5^2+2.5^2+4.5^2)/(25+25+81))
```

Select data for ecological selection gradient, with the F1 phenotype not matching the ancestral one
```{r select data ecological selection gradient, paged.print=FALSE}
data_temp=data_all[data_all$nb_ind==10000&data_all$ep_dmi==0.1&data_all$var_cost==0&data_all$scenario=="all"&data_all$initial_cost==100&data_all$origin=="Ancestral"&data_all$rec_rate==0.001&data_all$nb_dim==3&data_all$nb_dmi==50&data_all$nb_loci==500&data_all$mut_rate==10^(-6)&data_all$mig_rate==0.2&data_all$generations<=500000&data_all$life_cycle=="mig-sel"&data_all$mu_back==1&data_all$opt_two_DI ==0,]
display_constant(data_temp )
```

Display contrast between selection and migration
```{r plot gradient ecological selection}
#pdf("Figure/effect_of_LA.pdf",width=10,height=6)
ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pref_m1,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(fit_alt)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean preference")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pref_m1,group=fit_alt),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("black","purple","blue","cyan","green","orange","red","magenta"))+coord_trans(y="log10")+scale_y_continuous(labels=c(1,0.1,0.01,0.001),breaks=c(1,0.1,0.01,0.001))


ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-F1_m1f2,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(life_cycle)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(fit_alt),ncol = 3)+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean hybrid load")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-F1_m1f2,group=fit_alt),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("purple","blue","cyan","orange","red"))

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=fit_eco_m1,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(life_cycle)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(fit_alt),ncol = 3)+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean ecological fitness")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=fit_eco_m1,group=fit_alt),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("purple","blue","cyan","orange","red"))+coord_trans(y="log10")

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2),symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(life_cycle)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(fit_alt),ncol = 3)+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean corrected hybrid load")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2),group=fit_alt),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("purple","blue","cyan","orange","red"))

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m1_DI,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(fit_alt)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean phenotype trait 1")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m1_DI,group=fit_alt),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("black","purple","blue","cyan","green","orange","red","magenta"))+geom_hline(aes(yintercept = opt_one_DI*(1-mig_rate)+opt_two_DI*(mig_rate)),linetype="dashed",col="black")

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m1_DII,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(fit_alt)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean phenotype trait 2")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m1_DII,group=fit_alt),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("black","purple","blue","cyan","green","orange","red","magenta"))+geom_hline(aes(yintercept = opt_one_DII*(1-mig_rate)+opt_two_DII*(mig_rate)),linetype="dashed",col="black")

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m1_DIII,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(fit_alt)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean phenotype trait 3")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m1_DIII,group=fit_alt),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("black","purple","blue","cyan","green","orange","red","magenta"))+geom_hline(aes(yintercept = opt_one_DIII*(1-mig_rate)+opt_two_DIII*(mig_rate)),linetype="dashed",col="black")

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=sqrt((pheno_m1_DI-pheno_m2_DI)^2+(pheno_m1_DII-pheno_m2_DII)^2+(pheno_m1_DIII-pheno_m2_DIII)^2),symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(fit_alt)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Distance between mean phenotypes")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=sqrt((pheno_m1_DI-pheno_m2_DI)^2+(pheno_m1_DII-pheno_m2_DII)^2+(pheno_m1_DIII-pheno_m2_DIII)^2),group=fit_alt),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("black","purple","blue","cyan","green","orange","red","magenta"))

#dev.off()
```

Load full population to check phenotype distribution for the case with m=0.2 and different strength of ecological selection
```{r compute distribution phenotype strong migration F1 different from ancestral phenotype, fig.height=4, fig.width=6}
if(hasPopFile){
  mat_pheno_dist_pop1_dI=matrix(0,nrow=80,ncol=200)
  mat_pheno_dist_pop1_dII=matrix(0,nrow=80,ncol=200)
  mat_pheno_dist_pop1_dIII=matrix(0,nrow=80,ncol=200)
  
  folder_name=c("output_3D_strgm_F1_not_anc","output_3D_strgm_F1_not_anc_EF0d2","output_3D_strgm_F1_not_anc_EF0d25","output_3D_strgm_F1_not_anc_EF0d3","output_3D_strgm_F1_not_anc_EF0d35","output_3D_strgm_F1_not_anc_EF0d4","output_3D_strgm_F1_not_anc_EF0d45","output_3D_strgm_F1_not_anc_EF0d5")
  sel=c(0.1,0.2,.25,.3,.35,.4,.45,.5)
  for( j in 1:8){
    for (i in 1:10){
      load_pop=read.table(paste(folder_name[j],"/pop_LC_1_LA",sel[j],"_MC1_DMI0.1_rep",i,".txt",sep=""),fill=NA,skip=1,colClasses = "factor")
      load_pop1=load_pop[1:which(load_pop$V1=="Female_pop2"),]
      n1f=as.numeric(as.character(load_pop1[1,2]))
      n1m=as.numeric(as.character(load_pop1[2+2*n1f,2]))
      load_pop1=load_pop1[load_pop1[,6]!="" ,c(2,4,5,6,8,9,10,12,13,14,16,17,18,20,21,22)]
      load_pop1=as.data.frame(lapply(lapply(load_pop1,as.character),as.numeric))
      load_pop1$phenoI=rowSums(load_pop1[,seq(2,16,3)])
      load_pop1$phenoII=rowSums(load_pop1[,seq(3,16,3)])
      load_pop1$phenoIII=rowSums(load_pop1[,seq(4,16,3)])
      load_pop1=load_pop1[c(T,F),c(1,17,18,19)]+load_pop1[c(F,T),c(1,17,18,19)]
      
      mat_pheno_dist_pop1_dI[i+10*(j-1),]=hist(load_pop1[seq(1,n1f),2],breaks=seq(-10,10,0.1),plot=FALSE)$counts
      +hist(load_pop1[seq(n1f+1,n1f+n1m),2],breaks=seq(-10,10,0.1),plot=FALSE)$counts
      mat_pheno_dist_pop1_dII[i+10*(j-1),]=hist(load_pop1[seq(1,n1f),3],breaks=seq(-10,10,0.1),plot=FALSE)$counts
      +hist(load_pop1[seq(n1f+1,n1f+n1m),3],breaks=seq(-10,10,0.1),plot=FALSE)$counts
      mat_pheno_dist_pop1_dIII[i+10*(j-1),]=hist(load_pop1[seq(1,n1f),4],breaks=seq(-10,10,0.1),plot=FALSE)$counts
      +hist(load_pop1[seq(n1f+1,n1f+n1m),4],breaks=seq(-10,10,0.1),plot=FALSE)$counts
      
    }
  }
}
```

Display distribution of phenotype for ecological gradient, with the F1 being different from the ancestral phenotype
```{r distribution phenotype strong migration F1 different from ancestral phenotype}
if(hasPopFile){
  #pdf("Figure/Distribution_phenotype_strgm_function_sel.pdf",width=8,height=6)
  image.plot(seq(80),seq(-10,10,.1),mat_pheno_dist_pop1_dI,zlim=c(1,max(mat_pheno_dist_pop1)),col = c("grey",plasma(100)),ylab="Phenotype",xlab="",xaxt = "n",yaxt="n",ylim=c(-1,7))
  abline(v=seq(10.5,80.5,10))
  axis(1,labels = c("w_alt=0.1","w_alt=0.2","w_alt=0.25","w_alt=0.3","w_alt=0.35","w_alt=0.4","w_alt=0.45","w_alt=0.5"),at = c(5.5,15.5,25.5,35.5,45.5,55.5,65.5,75.5))
  axis(2,labels=c("opt A:\n 5", "opt B/anc:\n 0","F1","F2","F2"),at=c(5,0,2.5,3.75,1.25))
  
  image.plot(seq(80),seq(-10,10,.1),mat_pheno_dist_pop1_dII,zlim=c(1,max(mat_pheno_dist_pop1)),col = c("grey",plasma(100)),ylab="Phenotype",xlab="",xaxt = "n",yaxt="n",ylim=c(-7,1))
  abline(v=seq(10.5,80.5,10))
  axis(1,labels = c("w_alt=0.1","w_alt=0.2","w_alt=0.25","w_alt=0.3","w_alt=0.35","w_alt=0.4","w_alt=0.45","w_alt=0.5"),at = c(5.5,15.5,25.5,35.5,45.5,55.5,65.5,75.5))
  axis(2,labels=c("opt A/anc:\n 0", "opt B:\n -5","F1","F2","F2"),at=c(0,-5,-2.5,-3.75,-1.25))
  
  image.plot(seq(80),seq(-10,10,.1),mat_pheno_dist_pop1_dIII,zlim=c(1,max(mat_pheno_dist_pop1)),col = c("grey",plasma(100)),ylab="Phenotype",xlab="",xaxt = "n",yaxt="n",ylim=c(-9,4))
  abline(v=seq(10.5,80.5,10))
  axis(1,labels = c("w_alt=0.1","w_alt=0.2","w_alt=0.25","w_alt=0.3","w_alt=0.35","w_alt=0.4","w_alt=0.45","w_alt=0.5"),at = c(5.5,15.5,25.5,35.5,45.5,55.5,65.5,75.5))
  axis(2,labels=c("anc","opt A:\n 2", "opt B:\n -7","F1","F2","F2"),at=c(0,2,-7,-2.5,-0.5,-4.75))
  
  
  list_col=viridis::inferno(11)
  for (k in seq(0,40,10)){
    plot(-10000,xlim=c(-6,6),ylim=c(0,max(mat_pheno_dist_pop1[i,])),ylab="Counts",xlab="Phenotype")
    for(i in 1:10){
      points(seq(-9.95,9.95,.1),mat_pheno_dist_pop1[k+i,],type = 'l',col=list_col[i])
    }
    abline(h=0,v=c(-5,5))
  }
  # dev.off()
}
```

## Mate choice in the absence of ecological differentiation and secondary contact
Subset the data in the absence of ecological differentiation
```{r select data when ecological differentiation is absent}
data_temp=data_all[data_all$origin=="Diverged SC"&data_all$fit_alt==1&data_all$nb_ind==10000&data_all$ep_dmi==0.1 ,]
display_constant(data_temp )
data_temp$mig_rate=factor(paste("m =",data_temp$mig_rate),levels = c("m = 0", "m = 5e-05","m = 5e-04", "m = 0.005", "m = 0.05", "m = 0.2"))
```

Display effect of migration in the absence of ecological differentiation and for secondary contact; Figure S10
```{r effect migration in the absence of ecological differentiation}
#pdf("Figure/DSC_noLA.pdf",width=8,height=6)
ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pref_m1,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(life_cycle)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(mig_rate),ncol = 3,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme_bw() + theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean choosiness")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pref_m1,group=life_cycle),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple"))+coord_trans(y="log10")+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")+scale_y_continuous(labels=c(1,0.1,0.01,0.001),breaks=c(1,0.1,0.01,0.001))

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m1_DI,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(life_cycle)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(mig_rate),ncol = 3,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+theme_bw() + theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean phenotype")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m1_DI,group=life_cycle),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple"))+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")+geom_hline(aes(yintercept = opt_one_DI*(1-mig_rate)+opt_two_DI*(mig_rate)),linetype="dashed",col="black")

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-F1_m1f2,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(life_cycle)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(mig_rate),ncol = 3,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+theme_bw() + theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean hybrid load")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-F1_m1f2,group=life_cycle),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple"))+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2),symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(life_cycle)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(mig_rate),ncol = 3,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+theme_bw() + theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean corrected hybrid load")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2),group=life_cycle),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple"))+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=log(F1_m1f2/(fit_dmi_f1+fit_dmi_f2)*2)/log(1-ep_dmi)/nb_dmi,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(life_cycle)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(mig_rate),ncol = 3,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+theme_bw() + theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Proportion of DMIs differently fixed")+xlab("Time (in N  generations)")+facet_wrap(~as.factor(mig_rate),ncol = 3)+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple"))+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=log(F1_m1f2/(fit_dmi_f1+fit_dmi_f2)*2)/log(1-ep_dmi)/nb_dmi,group=life_cycle),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)#+geom_abline(intercept = c(2/9,0.5),slope = 0,col="black",linetype=2)
#dev.off()
```


Subset the data in the absence of ecological differentiation zoomed on the first 2N generations
```{r select data when ecological differentiation is absent and early generations}
data_temp=data_all[data_all$origin=="Diverged SC"&data_all$fit_alt==1&data_all$nb_ind==10000&data_all$ep_dmi==0.105&data_all$generations<20001&data_all$mig_rate==0.005,]
display_constant(data_temp )
```

Subset the data in the absence of ecological differentiation zoomed on the first 2N generations. Figure S21
```{r effect migration in the absence of ecological differentiation for early generations}
data_temp$rep=paste("rep",data_temp$rep)
#pdf("Figure/DSC_noLA_details.pdf",width=8,height=6)
ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m1_DI))+geom_line(col="orange")+geom_point(col="orange")+facet_wrap(~as.factor(rep),ncol = 5,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme_bw()+theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean phenotype")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")+geom_line(data=data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m2_DI),col="purple")

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pref_m1))+geom_point(col="orange")+geom_line(col="orange")+facet_wrap(~as.factor(rep),ncol = 5,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme_bw()+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean choosiness")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")+geom_line(data=data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pref_m2),col="purple")+coord_trans(y="log10")

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2)))+geom_point(col="orange")+geom_line(col="orange")+facet_wrap(~as.factor(rep),ncol = 5,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+  theme_bw()+theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean hybrid load")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")+geom_line(data=data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m2f1)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2)),col="purple")

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=log(F1_m1f2/(fit_dmi_f1+fit_dmi_f2)*2)/log(1-ep_dmi)/nb_dmi))+geom_line(col="orange")+facet_wrap(~as.factor(rep),ncol = 5)+ theme_bw()+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Proportion of DMIs differently fixed")+xlab("Time (in N  generations)")+geom_abline(intercept = c(2/9,0.5),slope = 0,col="black",linetype=2)

#dev.off()
```

## Gradient of ecological differentiation
### Symetric back mutation
Subset effect of weak and strong migration with a an ecological selection gradient
```{r select data with weak and strong migration with a an ecological selection gradient}
data_temp=data_all[data_all$origin=="Diverged SC"&data_all$mig_rate %in% c(0.0005,0.2)&data_all$ep_dmi==0.1&data_all$opt_two_DI==-5&data_all$fit_alt>0.2&data_all$fit_alt != 0.98&data_all$fit_alt!=0.95&data_all$mu_back==1 ,]
display_constant(data_temp )
```


Display effect of weak and strong migration with a an ecological selection gradient
```{r display effect of migration with weak ecological differentiation}
#pdf("Figure/DSC_noLA.pdf",width=8,height=6)
ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pref_m1,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(mig_rate)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(fit_alt),ncol = 4,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean preference")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pref_m1,group=mig_rate),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=inferno(3))+coord_trans(y="log10")+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")+scale_y_continuous(labels=c(1,0.1,0.01,0.001),breaks=c(1,0.1,0.01,0.001))

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m1_DI,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(mig_rate)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(fit_alt),ncol = 4,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean phenotype")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m1_DI,group=mig_rate),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=inferno(3))+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")+geom_hline(aes(yintercept = opt_one_DI*(1-mig_rate)+opt_two_DI*(mig_rate)),linetype="dashed",col="black")

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m2_DI,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(mig_rate)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(fit_alt),ncol = 4,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean phenotype")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m2_DI,group=mig_rate),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=inferno(3))+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")+geom_hline(aes(yintercept = opt_two_DI*(1-mig_rate)+opt_one_DI*(mig_rate)),linetype="dashed",col="black")

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-F1_m1f2,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(mig_rate)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(fit_alt),ncol = 4,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean hybrid load")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-F1_m1f2,group=mig_rate),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=inferno(3))+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=fit_eco_m1,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(mig_rate)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(fit_alt),ncol = 4,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean ecological fitness")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=fit_eco_m1,group=mig_rate),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=inferno(3))+coord_trans(y="log10")+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")+scale_y_continuous(labels=c(1,0.75,0.1,0.01,0.001),breaks=c(1,0.75,0.1,0.01,0.001))

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2),symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(mig_rate)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(fit_alt),ncol = 4,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean corrected hybrid load")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2),group=mig_rate),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=inferno(3))+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=log(F1_m1f2/(fit_dmi_f1+fit_dmi_f2)*2)/log(1-ep_dmi)/nb_dmi,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(mig_rate)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(fit_alt),ncol = 4)+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Proportion of DMIs differently fixed")+xlab("Time (in N  generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=log(F1_m1f2/(fit_dmi_f1+fit_dmi_f2)*2)/log(1-ep_dmi)/nb_dmi,group=mig_rate),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=inferno(3))+labs(color="Population size and theta")+geom_abline(intercept = c(2/9,0.5),slope = 0,col="black",linetype=2)+xlim(0,50)

#dev.off()
```

### Asymetric backmutation
Subset effect of weak and strong migration with a an ecological selection gradient
```{r select data with weak and strong migration with a an ecological selection gradient and weak back mutation rate}
data_temp=data_all[data_all$origin=="Diverged SC"&data_all$mig_rate %in% c(0.0005,0.2)&data_all$ep_dmi==0.1&data_all$opt_two_DI==-5&data_all$mu_back<1&data_all$initial_pref<1 &data_all$life_cycle=="mig-sel"&data_all$generations<500001,]
display_constant(data_temp)
```

Display effect of migration with a an ecological selection gradient and weak back mutation rate
```{r display effect of migration with a an ecological selection gradient and weak back mutation rate}
#pdf("Figure/DSC_noLA.pdf",width=8,height=6)
ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pref_m1,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(mig_rate)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(fit_alt),ncol = 3,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean preference")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pref_m1,group=mig_rate),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=inferno(3))+coord_trans(y="log10")+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")+scale_y_continuous(labels=c(1,0.1,0.01,0.001),breaks=c(1,0.1,0.01,0.001))

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m1_DI,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(mig_rate)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(fit_alt),ncol = 3,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean phenotype")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m1_DI,group=mig_rate),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=inferno(3))+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")+geom_hline(aes(yintercept = opt_one_DI*(1-mig_rate)+opt_two_DI*(mig_rate)),linetype="dashed",col="black")

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-F1_m1f2,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(mig_rate)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(fit_alt),ncol = 3,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean hybrid load")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-F1_m1f2,group=mig_rate),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=inferno(3))+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=fit_eco_m1,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(mig_rate)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(fit_alt),ncol = 3,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean ecological fitness")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=fit_eco_m1,group=mig_rate),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=inferno(3))+coord_trans(y="log10")+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")+scale_y_continuous(labels=c(1,0.75,0.1,0.01,0.001),breaks=c(1,0.75,0.1,0.01,0.001))

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2),symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(mig_rate)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(fit_alt),ncol = 3,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean corrected hybrid load")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2),group=mig_rate),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=inferno(3))+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=log(F1_m1f2/(fit_dmi_f1+fit_dmi_f2)*2)/log(1-ep_dmi)/nb_dmi,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(mig_rate)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(fit_alt),ncol = 3)+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Proportion of DMIs differently fixed")+xlab("Time (in N  generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=log(F1_m1f2/(fit_dmi_f1+fit_dmi_f2)*2)/log(1-ep_dmi)/nb_dmi,group=mig_rate),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=inferno(3))+labs(color="Population size and theta")+geom_abline(intercept = c(2/9,0.5),slope = 0,col="black",linetype=2)+xlim(0,50)

#dev.off()
```

# Analysis of the reproductive isolation

## Analysis of the default dataset for different migration rates and 1000 replicates
Load the data for the default case and different migration rates
We also define the "type" of focal individual (for pop 1, but it is symmetric for the other):
a "resident" individual when the focal individual has a phenotypic value above 4
a "resident_backcross" individual when the focal individual has a phenotypic value between 1 and 4
a "hybrid" individual when the focal individual has a phenotypic value between -1 and 1
a "migrant_backcross" individual when the focal individual has a phenotypic value between -4 and -1
a "migrant" individual when the focal individual has a phenotypic value below -4 



```{r load raw data for default case}
if(hasRawAssayFile){
  assay_raw=rbind(rep(NA,60),rep(NA,60))
  colnames(assay_raw)=colnames_assay_raw
  
  setwd("output_iso")
  for (i in list.files(pattern="assays_")){
    
    assay_raw=load_RI_measure_raw(i,assay_raw)
    
  }
  setwd("./../output_strgm")
  for (i in list.files(pattern="assays_")){
    
    assay_raw=load_RI_measure_raw(i,assay_raw)
    
  }
  
  setwd("./../output_wkm")
  for (i in list.files(pattern="assays_")){
    
    assay_raw=load_RI_measure_raw(i,assay_raw)
    
  }
  
  setwd("./../output_Rwkm")
  for (i in list.files(pattern="assays_")){
    
    assay_raw=load_RI_measure_raw(i,assay_raw)
    
  }
  
  setwd("./../output_RRwkm")
  for (i in list.files(pattern="assays_")){
    
    assay_raw=load_RI_measure_raw(i,assay_raw)
    
  }
  
  setwd("./../output_default")
  for (i in list.files(pattern="assays_")){
    
    assay_raw=load_RI_measure_raw(i,assay_raw)
    
  }
  
  
  
  assay_raw=assay_raw[-c(1,2),]
  assay_raw=as.data.frame(assay_raw)
  
  assay_raw$scenario=as.factor(list_scenario[assay_raw$scenario])
  
  
  assay_raw$origin=as.factor(list_origin[(assay_raw$origin+1)])
  assay_raw$barriers=as.factor(list_scenario[assay_raw$barriers])
  assay_raw$life_cycle=as.factor(list_life_cycle[(assay_raw$life_cycle+1)])
  
  assay_raw$prop_success1=assay_raw$nb_offspring1/(assay_raw$nb_mating1+100*(1000-assay_raw$nb_offspring1))
  assay_raw$prop_success2=assay_raw$nb_offspring2/(assay_raw$nb_mating2+100*(1000-assay_raw$nb_offspring2))
  
  
  assay_raw$class_m1="mig"
  assay_raw$class_m1[assay_raw$pheno_m1>-4]="mig_backcross"
  assay_raw$class_m1[assay_raw$pheno_m1>-1]="hybrid"
  assay_raw$class_m1[assay_raw$pheno_m1>1]="res_backcross"
  assay_raw$class_m1[assay_raw$pheno_m1>4]="res"
  
  assay_raw$class_m2="res"
  assay_raw$class_m2[assay_raw$pheno_m2>-4]="res_backcross"
  assay_raw$class_m2[assay_raw$pheno_m2>-1]="hybrid"
  assay_raw$class_m2[assay_raw$pheno_m2>1]="mig_backcross"
  assay_raw$class_m2[assay_raw$pheno_m2>4]="mig"
}
```

### Checking F1 properties
Distribution of parental metrics
```{r distribution of parents metrics}
if(hasRawAssayFile){
  ggplot(assay_raw[assay_raw$barriers=="all",],aes(x=pheno_m1  ))+geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.01)+facet_wrap(~mig_rate)+ggtitle("parental phenotype")+geom_vline(xintercept = c(-4,-1,1,4))
  
  ggplot(assay_raw[assay_raw$barriers=="all",],aes(x=eco_fit_m1 ))+geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.01)+facet_wrap(~mig_rate)+ggtitle("parental ecological fitness")+geom_vline(xintercept = c(0.1,exp(log(.1)*25/100)))
  
  ggplot(assay_raw[assay_raw$barriers=="all",],aes(x=dmi_fit_m1  ))+geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.01)+facet_wrap(~mig_rate)+ggtitle("parental intrinsic fitness")
  
  ggplot(assay_raw[assay_raw$barriers=="all",],aes(x=pref_m1 ))+geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.01)+facet_wrap(~mig_rate)+ggtitle("parental preference")+geom_vline(xintercept = c(0.1))
}
```

Distribution of F1 metrics
```{r distribution of F1 metrics}
if(hasRawAssayFile){
  ggplot(assay_raw[assay_raw$barriers=="all",],aes(x=eco_fi1))+geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.01)+facet_wrap(~mig_rate)+ggtitle("mean F1 ecological fitness")+geom_vline(xintercept = c(0.1,exp(log(.1)*25/100)))
  
  ggplot(assay_raw[assay_raw$barriers=="all",],aes(x=hyb_fit1))+geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.01)+facet_wrap(~mig_rate)+ggtitle("mean F1 intrinsic fitness")+geom_vline(xintercept = c(0.9^50,0.9^25,0.9^(100/9)))
  
  ggplot(assay_raw[assay_raw$barriers=="all",],aes(x=prop_success1))+geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.01)+facet_wrap(~mig_rate)+ggtitle("proportion succesful mating")+geom_vline(xintercept = c(0.1))
}
```

Relating parental and F1 metrics for different migration rates and depending on the nature of the parents
```{r parental metrics vs F1 metrics}
if(hasRawAssayFile){
  ggplot(assay_raw[assay_raw$barriers=="all",],aes(x=eco_fit_m1,y=eco_fi1,col=as.factor(class_m1),symbol=life_cycle))+geom_point()+facet_wrap(mig_pop1~mig_rate,nrow=2)+theme(legend.position = "bottom")+xlab("Parental ecological fitness")+ylab("Offspring ecological fitness")
  ggplot(assay_raw[assay_raw$barriers=="all",],aes(x=eco_fit_m2,y=eco_fi2,col=as.factor(class_m2),symbol=life_cycle))+geom_point()+facet_wrap(mig_pop2~mig_rate,nrow=2)+theme(legend.position = "bottom")+xlab("Parental ecological fitness")+ylab("Offspring ecological fitness")
  
  ggplot(assay_raw[assay_raw$barriers=="all",],aes(x=dmi_fit_m1,y=eco_fi1,col=as.factor(class_m1),symbol=life_cycle))+geom_point()+facet_wrap(mig_pop1~mig_rate,nrow=2)+theme(legend.position = "bottom")+xlab("Parental intrinsic fitness")+ylab("Offspring intrisic fitness")
  ggplot(assay_raw[assay_raw$barriers=="all",],aes(x=dmi_fit_m2,y=eco_fi2,col=as.factor(class_m2),symbol=life_cycle))+geom_point()+facet_wrap(mig_pop2~mig_rate,nrow=2)+theme(legend.position = "bottom")+xlab("Parental intrinsic fitness")+ylab("Offspring intrinsic fitness")
  
  ggplot(assay_raw[assay_raw$barriers=="all",],aes(x=pref_m1,y=prop_success1,col=as.factor(class_m1),symbol=life_cycle))+geom_point()+facet_wrap(mig_pop1~mig_rate,nrow=2)+theme(legend.position = "bottom")+xlab("Parental preference")+ylab("Proportion of succesful matings")+coord_trans(y="log10")
  ggplot(assay_raw[assay_raw$barriers=="all",],aes(x=pref_m2,y=prop_success2,col=as.factor(class_m2),symbol=life_cycle))+geom_point()+facet_wrap(mig_pop2~mig_rate,nrow=2)+theme(legend.position = "bottom")+xlab("Parental preference")+ylab("Proportion of succesful matings")+coord_trans(y="log10")
}
```

Display the correlation between different metrics related to the F1 offsprings of the focal individual
```{r correlation between F1 metrics}
if(hasRawAssayFile){
  ggplot(assay_raw[assay_raw$barriers=="all",],aes(x=eco_fi2,y=hyb_fit2,col=as.factor(class_m1)))+geom_point()+facet_wrap(mig_pop1~mig_rate,nrow=2)+coord_trans(y="log10")+theme(legend.position = "none")
  
  ggplot(assay_raw[assay_raw$barriers=="all",],aes(x=eco_fi1,y=nb_offspring1,col=as.factor(class_m1)))+geom_point()+facet_wrap(mig_pop1~mig_rate,nrow=2)+coord_trans(y="log10")+theme(legend.position = "none")
  ggplot(assay_raw[assay_raw$barriers=="all",],aes(x=eco_fi2,y=nb_offspring2,col=as.factor(class_m2)))+geom_point()+facet_wrap(mig_pop1~mig_rate,nrow=2)+coord_trans(y="log10")+theme(legend.position = "none")
  
  ggplot(assay_raw[assay_raw$barriers=="all",],aes(x=hyb_fit1,y=nb_offspring1,col=as.factor(class_m1)))+geom_point()+facet_wrap(mig_pop1~mig_rate,nrow=2)+coord_trans(y="log10")+theme(legend.position = "none")
  ggplot(assay_raw[assay_raw$barriers=="all",],aes(x=hyb_fit2,y=nb_offspring2,col=as.factor(class_m2)))+geom_point()+facet_wrap(mig_pop1~mig_rate,nrow=2)+coord_trans(y="log10")+theme(legend.position = "none")
}
```

### Sojourn time
Distribution of the sojourn time of the linked and unlinked marker in the absence of barriers
```{r distribution of sojourn time in the absence of barriers}
if(hasRawAssayFile){
  assay_raw$t_lmk_1[assay_raw$t_lmk_1==0]=10000 # marker that remain polymorphic after 10000 generations where given a sojourn time of 10000
  assay_raw$t_lmk_2[assay_raw$t_lmk_2==0]=10000
  assay_raw$t_fmk_1[assay_raw$t_fmk_1==0]=10000
  assay_raw$t_fmk_2[assay_raw$t_fmk_2==0]=10000
  
  summary(assay_raw$t_lmk_1[assay_raw$barriers=="neu"])
  hist(assay_raw$t_lmk_1[assay_raw$barriers=="neu"],breaks=seq(1,10000,1))
  
  ggplot(assay_raw[assay_raw$barriers=="neu",],aes(x=as.factor(rep),y=t_lmk_1))+geom_boxplot()+stat_summary(fun=mean,col="red")+facet_wrap(~mig_rate)+coord_trans(y="log10")+scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(1,5,10,30,100,1000,10000))
  
  ggplot(assay_raw[assay_raw$barriers=="neu",],aes(x=as.factor(rep),y=t_lmk_1))+geom_boxplot()+stat_summary(fun=mean,col="red")+facet_wrap(~mig_rate)+coord_cartesian(ylim=c(0,50)) # zommed version
}
```

```{r}
if(hasRawAssayFile){
  ggplot(assay_raw[assay_raw$barriers=="LA",],aes(x=pheno_m1+5,y=t_fmk_1,col=as.factor(mig_rate)))+geom_point()+facet_wrap(~mig_rate)+theme(legend.position = "none")+xlab("Distance of the focal individual to the optimum")+ylab("Sojourn time freely recombining marker")+geom_smooth(method = "lm",col="black")+coord_cartesian(ylim=c(0,50))
  
  ggplot(assay_raw[assay_raw$barriers=="DMI",],aes(x=hyb_fit1,y=t_fmk_1,col=as.factor(mig_rate)))+geom_point()+facet_wrap(~mig_rate)+theme(legend.position = "none")+xlab("Mean intrinsic fitness of F1 hybrid")+ylab("Sojourn time freely recombining marker")+geom_smooth(method = "lm",col="black")+coord_cartesian(ylim=c(0,50))
  
  ggplot(assay_raw[assay_raw$barriers=="MC",],aes(x=log10(pref_m1),y=t_fmk_1,col=as.factor(mig_rate)))+geom_point()+facet_wrap(~mig_rate)+theme(legend.position = "none")+xlab("Log10 choosiness")+ylab("Sojourn time freely recombining marker")+geom_smooth(method = "lm",col="black")+coord_cartesian(ylim=c(0,50))
}
```



For making comparison easier, we computed the relative sojourn time of all barriers relative to the neutral case
All three Euclidian means are computed here (arithmetic, geometric and harmonic) for each replicates and each "type" of focal individual. Outcomes are written to a file for future usage.
```{r computing relative sojourn time}
#first need to deal with segregating sites
if(hasRawAssayFile&FALSE){ # to avoid recomputing each time 
  assay_raw$t_lmk_1[assay_raw$t_lmk_1==0]=10000
  assay_raw$t_lmk_2[assay_raw$t_lmk_2==0]=10000
  assay_raw$t_fmk_1[assay_raw$t_fmk_1==0]=10000
  assay_raw$t_fmk_2[assay_raw$t_fmk_2==0]=10000
  
  assay_grp=rbind(rep(NA,14),rep(NA,14))
  colnames(assay_grp)=c("rep","mig","barrier","grp_ind","categ","count","ta_lmk","ta_fmk","th_lmk","th_fmk","tg_lmk","tg_fmk","F1_hyb1","F1_hyb2")
  
  neutral_la=mean(c(assay_raw$t_lmk_1[assay_raw$barriers=="neu"],assay_raw$t_lmk_2[assay_raw$barriers=="neu"]))
  neutral_fa=mean(c(assay_raw$t_fmk_1[assay_raw$barriers=="neu"],assay_raw$t_fmk_2[assay_raw$barriers=="neu"]))
  neutral_lh=1/mean(1/c(assay_raw$t_lmk_1[assay_raw$barriers=="neu"],assay_raw$t_lmk_2[assay_raw$barriers=="neu"]))
  neutral_fh=1/mean(1/c(assay_raw$t_fmk_1[assay_raw$barriers=="neu"],assay_raw$t_fmk_2[assay_raw$barriers=="neu"]))
  neutral_lg=exp(mean(log(c(assay_raw$t_lmk_1[assay_raw$barriers=="neu"],assay_raw$t_lmk_2[assay_raw$barriers=="neu"]))))
  neutral_fg=exp(mean(log(c(assay_raw$t_fmk_1[assay_raw$barriers=="neu"],assay_raw$t_fmk_2[assay_raw$barriers=="neu"]))))
  
  
  for(i in seq(10)){
    for (j in c("all","LA","MC","DMI","LA+DMI","LA+MC","MC+DMI")){
      for (l in c(0,0.00005,0.0005,0.005,0.05,0.2)){
        assay_b=assay_raw[assay_raw$rep==i&assay_raw$barriers==j&assay_raw$mig_rate==l,]
        vec_all=c(length(assay_b$nb_ind),mean(c(assay_b$t_lmk_1,assay_b$t_lmk_2))/neutral_la,mean(c(assay_b$t_fmk_1,assay_b$t_fmk_2))/neutral_fa,(1/mean(1/c(assay_b$t_lmk_1,assay_b$t_lmk_2)))/neutral_lh,(1/mean(1/c(assay_b$t_fmk_1,assay_b$t_fmk_2)))/neutral_fh,exp(mean(log(c(assay_b$t_lmk_1,assay_b$t_lmk_2))))/neutral_lg,exp(mean(log(c(assay_b$t_fmk_1,assay_b$t_fmk_2))))/neutral_fg,mean(assay_b$hyb_fit1),mean(assay_b$hyb_fit2))
        assay_grp=rbind(assay_grp,c(i,l,j,"all","all",vec_all))
        
        assay_b=assay_raw[assay_raw$rep==i&assay_raw$barriers==j&assay_raw$mig_rate==l&assay_raw$mig_pop1=="f1m",]
        vec_all=c(length(assay_b$nb_ind),mean(c(assay_b$t_lmk_1,assay_b$t_lmk_2))/neutral_la,mean(c(assay_b$t_fmk_1,assay_b$t_fmk_2))/neutral_fa,(1/mean(1/c(assay_b$t_lmk_1,assay_b$t_lmk_2)))/neutral_lh,(1/mean(1/c(assay_b$t_fmk_1,assay_b$t_fmk_2)))/neutral_fh,exp(mean(log(c(assay_b$t_lmk_1,assay_b$t_lmk_2))))/neutral_lg,exp(mean(log(c(assay_b$t_fmk_1,assay_b$t_fmk_2))))/neutral_fg,mean(assay_b$hyb_fit1),mean(assay_b$hyb_fit2))
        assay_grp=rbind(assay_grp,c(i,l,j,"all","fem",vec_all))
        
        assay_b=assay_raw[assay_raw$rep==i&assay_raw$barriers==j&assay_raw$mig_rate==l&assay_raw$mig_pop1=="m1m",]
        vec_all=c(length(assay_b$nb_ind),mean(c(assay_b$t_lmk_1,assay_b$t_lmk_2))/neutral_la,mean(c(assay_b$t_fmk_1,assay_b$t_fmk_2))/neutral_fa,(1/mean(1/c(assay_b$t_lmk_1,assay_b$t_lmk_2)))/neutral_lh,(1/mean(1/c(assay_b$t_fmk_1,assay_b$t_fmk_2)))/neutral_fh,exp(mean(log(c(assay_b$t_lmk_1,assay_b$t_lmk_2))))/neutral_lg,exp(mean(log(c(assay_b$t_fmk_1,assay_b$t_fmk_2))))/neutral_fg,mean(assay_b$hyb_fit1),mean(assay_b$hyb_fit2))
        assay_grp=rbind(assay_grp,c(i,l,j,"all","mal",vec_all))
        
        assay_b=assay_raw[assay_raw$rep==i&assay_raw$barriers==j&assay_raw$mig_rate==l&assay_raw$mig_pop1=="m1m",]
        vec_all=c(length(assay_b$nb_ind),mean(c(assay_b$t_lmk_1))/neutral_la,mean(c(assay_b$t_fmk_1))/neutral_fa,(1/mean(1/c(assay_b$t_lmk_1)))/neutral_lh,(1/mean(1/c(assay_b$t_fmk_1)))/neutral_fh,exp(mean(log(c(assay_b$t_lmk_1))))/neutral_lg,exp(mean(log(c(assay_b$t_fmk_1))))/neutral_fg,mean(assay_b$hyb_fit1),NA)
        assay_grp=rbind(assay_grp,c(i,l,j,"all","mal_p1",vec_all))
        
        assay_b=assay_raw[assay_raw$rep==i&assay_raw$barriers==j&assay_raw$mig_rate==l&assay_raw$mig_pop1=="f1m",]
        vec_all=c(length(assay_b$nb_ind),mean(c(assay_b$t_lmk_1))/neutral_la,mean(c(assay_b$t_fmk_1))/neutral_fa,(1/mean(1/c(assay_b$t_lmk_1)))/neutral_lh,(1/mean(1/c(assay_b$t_fmk_1)))/neutral_fh,exp(mean(log(c(assay_b$t_lmk_1))))/neutral_lg,exp(mean(log(c(assay_b$t_fmk_1))))/neutral_fg,mean(assay_b$hyb_fit1),NA)
        assay_grp=rbind(assay_grp,c(i,l,j,"all","fem_p1",vec_all))
        
        assay_b=assay_raw[assay_raw$rep==i&assay_raw$barriers==j&assay_raw$mig_rate==l&assay_raw$mig_pop1=="m1m",]
        vec_all=c(length(assay_b$nb_ind),mean(c(assay_b$t_lmk_2))/neutral_la,mean(c(assay_b$t_fmk_2))/neutral_fa,(1/mean(1/c(assay_b$t_lmk_2)))/neutral_lh,(1/mean(1/c(assay_b$t_fmk_2)))/neutral_fh,exp(mean(log(c(assay_b$t_lmk_2))))/neutral_lg,exp(mean(log(c(assay_b$t_fmk_2))))/neutral_fg,NA,mean(assay_b$hyb_fit2))
        assay_grp=rbind(assay_grp,c(i,l,j,"all","mal_p2",vec_all))
        
        assay_b=assay_raw[assay_raw$rep==i&assay_raw$barriers==j&assay_raw$mig_rate==l&assay_raw$mig_pop1=="f1m",]
        vec_all=c(length(assay_b$nb_ind),mean(c(assay_b$t_lmk_2))/neutral_la,mean(c(assay_b$t_fmk_2))/neutral_fa,(1/mean(1/c(assay_b$t_lmk_2)))/neutral_lh,(1/mean(1/c(assay_b$t_fmk_2)))/neutral_fh,exp(mean(log(c(assay_b$t_lmk_2))))/neutral_lg,exp(mean(log(c(assay_b$t_fmk_2))))/neutral_fg,NA,mean(assay_b$hyb_fit2))
        assay_grp=rbind(assay_grp,c(i,l,j,"all","fem_p2",vec_all))
        
        
        
        
        for( k in c("mig","mig_backcross","hybrid","res_backcross","res")){ 
          
          assay_b1=assay_raw[assay_raw$rep==i&assay_raw$barriers==j&assay_raw$class_m1==k&assay_raw$mig_rate==l,]
          assay_b2=assay_raw[assay_raw$rep==i&assay_raw$barriers==j&assay_raw$class_m2==k&assay_raw$mig_rate==l,]
          vec_all=c(length(c(assay_b1$nb_ind,assay_b2$nb_ind)),mean(c(assay_b1$t_lmk_1,assay_b2$t_lmk_2))/neutral_la,mean(c(assay_b1$t_fmk_1,assay_b2$t_fmk_2))/neutral_fa,(1/mean(1/c(assay_b1$t_lmk_1,assay_b2$t_lmk_2)))/neutral_lh,(1/mean(1/c(assay_b1$t_fmk_1,assay_b2$t_fmk_2)))/neutral_fh,exp(mean(log(c(assay_b1$t_lmk_1,assay_b2$t_lmk_2))))/neutral_lg,exp(mean(log(c(assay_b1$t_fmk_1,assay_b2$t_fmk_2))))/neutral_fg,mean(assay_b1$hyb_fit1),mean(assay_b2$hyb_fit2))
          assay_grp=rbind(assay_grp,c(i,l,j,k,"all",vec_all))
          
          assay_b1=assay_raw[assay_raw$rep==i&assay_raw$barriers==j&assay_raw$class_m1==k&assay_raw$mig_rate==l&assay_raw$mig_pop1=="f1m",]
          assay_b2=assay_raw[assay_raw$rep==i&assay_raw$barriers==j&assay_raw$class_m2==k&assay_raw$mig_rate==l&assay_raw$mig_pop1=="f1m",]
          vec_all=c(length(c(assay_b1$nb_ind,assay_b2$nb_ind)),mean(c(assay_b1$t_lmk_1,assay_b2$t_lmk_2))/neutral_la,mean(c(assay_b1$t_fmk_1,assay_b2$t_fmk_2))/neutral_fa,(1/mean(1/c(assay_b1$t_lmk_1,assay_b2$t_lmk_2)))/neutral_lh,(1/mean(1/c(assay_b1$t_fmk_1,assay_b2$t_fmk_2)))/neutral_fh,exp(mean(log(c(assay_b1$t_lmk_1,assay_b2$t_lmk_2))))/neutral_lg,exp(mean(log(c(assay_b1$t_fmk_1,assay_b2$t_fmk_2))))/neutral_fg,mean(assay_b1$hyb_fit1),mean(assay_b2$hyb_fit2))
          assay_grp=rbind(assay_grp,c(i,l,j,k,"fem",vec_all))
          
          assay_b1=assay_raw[assay_raw$rep==i&assay_raw$barriers==j&assay_raw$class_m1==k&assay_raw$mig_rate==l&assay_raw$mig_pop1=="m1m",]
          assay_b2=assay_raw[assay_raw$rep==i&assay_raw$barriers==j&assay_raw$class_m2==k&assay_raw$mig_rate==l&assay_raw$mig_pop1=="m1m",]
          vec_all=c(length(c(assay_b1$nb_ind,assay_b2$nb_ind)),mean(c(assay_b1$t_lmk_1,assay_b2$t_lmk_2))/neutral_la,mean(c(assay_b1$t_fmk_1,assay_b2$t_fmk_2))/neutral_fa,(1/mean(1/c(assay_b1$t_lmk_1,assay_b2$t_lmk_2)))/neutral_lh,(1/mean(1/c(assay_b1$t_fmk_1,assay_b2$t_fmk_2)))/neutral_fh,exp(mean(log(c(assay_b1$t_lmk_1,assay_b2$t_lmk_2))))/neutral_lg,exp(mean(log(c(assay_b1$t_fmk_1,assay_b2$t_fmk_2))))/neutral_fg,mean(assay_b1$hyb_fit1),mean(assay_b2$hyb_fit2))
          assay_grp=rbind(assay_grp,c(i,l,j,k,"mal",vec_all))
          
          assay_b=assay_raw[assay_raw$rep==i&assay_raw$barriers==j&assay_raw$class_m1==k&assay_raw$mig_rate==l&assay_raw$mig_pop1=="m1m",]
          vec_all=c(length(assay_b$nb_ind),mean(c(assay_b$t_lmk_1))/neutral_la,mean(c(assay_b$t_fmk_1))/neutral_fa,(1/mean(1/c(assay_b$t_lmk_1)))/neutral_lh,(1/mean(1/c(assay_b$t_fmk_1)))/neutral_fh,exp(mean(log(c(assay_b$t_lmk_1))))/neutral_lg,exp(mean(log(c(assay_b$t_fmk_1))))/neutral_fg,mean(assay_b$hyb_fit1),NA)
          assay_grp=rbind(assay_grp,c(i,l,j,k,"mal_p1",vec_all))
          
          assay_b=assay_raw[assay_raw$rep==i&assay_raw$barriers==j&assay_raw$class_m1==k&assay_raw$mig_rate==l&assay_raw$mig_pop1=="f1m",]
          vec_all=c(length(assay_b$nb_ind),mean(c(assay_b$t_lmk_1))/neutral_la,mean(c(assay_b$t_fmk_1))/neutral_fa,(1/mean(1/c(assay_b$t_lmk_1)))/neutral_lh,(1/mean(1/c(assay_b$t_fmk_1)))/neutral_fh,exp(mean(log(c(assay_b$t_lmk_1))))/neutral_lg,exp(mean(log(c(assay_b$t_fmk_1))))/neutral_fg,mean(assay_b$hyb_fit1),NA)
          assay_grp=rbind(assay_grp,c(i,l,j,k,"fem_p1",vec_all))
          
          assay_b=assay_raw[assay_raw$rep==i&assay_raw$barriers==j&assay_raw$class_m2==k&assay_raw$mig_rate==l&assay_raw$mig_pop1=="m1m",]
```
