```{r computing relative sojourn time}
          vec_all=c(length(assay_b$nb_ind),mean(c(assay_b$t_lmk_2))/neutral_la,mean(c(assay_b$t_fmk_2))/neutral_fa,(1/mean(1/c(assay_b$t_lmk_2)))/neutral_lh,(1/mean(1/c(assay_b$t_fmk_2)))/neutral_fh,exp(mean(log(c(assay_b$t_lmk_2))))/neutral_lg,exp(mean(log(c(assay_b$t_fmk_2))))/neutral_fg,NA,mean(assay_b$hyb_fit2))
          assay_grp=rbind(assay_grp,c(i,l,j,k,"mal_p2",vec_all))
          
          assay_b=assay_raw[assay_raw$rep==i&assay_raw$barriers==j&assay_raw$class_m2==k&assay_raw$mig_rate==l&assay_raw$mig_pop1=="f1m",]
          vec_all=c(length(assay_b$nb_ind),mean(c(assay_b$t_lmk_2))/neutral_la,mean(c(assay_b$t_fmk_2))/neutral_fa,(1/mean(1/c(assay_b$t_lmk_2)))/neutral_lh,(1/mean(1/c(assay_b$t_fmk_2)))/neutral_fh,exp(mean(log(c(assay_b$t_lmk_2))))/neutral_lg,exp(mean(log(c(assay_b$t_fmk_2))))/neutral_fg,NA,mean(assay_b$hyb_fit2))
          assay_grp=rbind(assay_grp,c(i,l,j,k,"fem_p2",vec_all))
          
        }
      }
    }
  }
  assay_grp=assay_grp[-c(1,2),]
  write.table(assay_grp,"Sojourn_time_default_decomp.csv")
}
```

Load the relative time
```{r load the relative time}
if(hasRawAssayFile){
  assay_grp=read.table("Sojourn_time_default_decomp.csv",header = TRUE)
  
  assay_grp$grp_ind=factor(as.character(assay_grp$grp_ind),levels=c("all","mig","mig_backcross","hybrid","res_backcross","res"))
  assay_grp$categ[assay_grp$categ=="fem"]="Female"
  assay_grp$categ[assay_grp$categ=="mal"]="Male"
  assay_grp$categ=factor(as.character(assay_grp$categ))
  
  assay_grp$barrier=factor(as.character(assay_grp$barrier),levels=c("LA","MC","DMI","LA+MC","LA+DMI","MC+DMI","all"))
}
```

Display decomposition sojourn time for different type of means and different categories of focal individuals
```{r decomposition sojourn time by focal individual category, fig.height=8, fig.width=10}
if(hasRawAssayFile){
  #pdf("Figure/decomposition_default.pdf",width=8,height=8)
  ggplot(assay_grp[assay_grp$categ=="all",],aes(x=barrier,y=log10(ta_lmk),col=grp_ind,grp=grp_ind))+geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA,na.rm = FALSE,position = position_dodge(preserve = 'single'))+geom_point(position=position_jitterdodge(0.15),alpha=0.5)+scale_color_manual(values=c("black","red","orange","magenta","cyan2","blue"),name="Focal individual phenotype")+theme(legend.position = "bottom")+ylab("Log relative (arithmetic) mean sojourn time")+ggtitle("Fate of a linked marker")+geom_abline(slope=0,intercept = 0,col="black",linetype=2)+facet_wrap(~mig)+theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 0.5, hjust=0.5))
  
  ggplot(assay_grp[assay_grp$categ%in%c("Male","Female"),],aes(x=barrier,y=log10(ta_lmk),col=grp_ind))+geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA,na.rm = FALSE,position = position_dodge(preserve = 'single'))+geom_point(position=position_jitterdodge(0.15),alpha=0.5)+scale_color_manual(values=c("black","red","orange","magenta","cyan2","blue"),name="Focal individual phenotype")+theme(legend.position = "bottom")+ylab("Log relative (arithmetic) mean sojourn time")+ggtitle("Fate of a linked marker")+geom_abline(slope=0,intercept = 0,col="black",linetype=2)+facet_wrap(~categ,ncol=1)+theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 0.5, hjust=0.5))
  
  ggplot(assay_grp[assay_grp$categ=="all",],aes(x=barrier,y=log10(ta_fmk),col=grp_ind,grp=grp_ind))+geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA,na.rm = FALSE,position = position_dodge(preserve = 'single'))+geom_point(position=position_jitterdodge(0.15),alpha=0.5)+scale_color_manual(values=c("black","red","orange","magenta","cyan2","blue"),name="Focal individual phenotype")+theme(legend.position = "bottom")+ylab("Log relative (arithmetic) mean sojourn time")+ggtitle("Fate of an unlinked marker")+geom_abline(slope=0,intercept = 0,col="black",linetype=2)+theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 0.5, hjust=0.5))
  
  ggplot(assay_grp[assay_grp$categ%in%c("Male","Female"),],aes(x=barrier,y=log10(ta_fmk),col=grp_ind))+geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA,na.rm = FALSE,position = position_dodge(preserve = 'single'))+geom_point(position=position_jitterdodge(0.15),alpha=0.5)+scale_color_manual(values=c("black","red","orange","magenta","cyan2","blue"),name="Focal individual phenotype")+theme(legend.position = "bottom")+ylab("Log relative (arithmetic) mean sojourn time")+ggtitle("Fate of an unlinked marker")+geom_abline(slope=0,intercept = 0,col="black",linetype=2)+facet_wrap(~categ,ncol=1)+theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 0.5, hjust=0.5))
  
  
  ggplot(assay_grp[assay_grp$categ=="all",],aes(x=barrier,y=log10(th_lmk),col=grp_ind,grp=grp_ind))+geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA,na.rm = FALSE,position = position_dodge(preserve = 'single'))+geom_point(position=position_jitterdodge(0.15),alpha=0.5)+scale_color_manual(values=c("black","red","orange","magenta","cyan2","blue"),name="Focal individual phenotype")+theme(legend.position = "bottom")+ylab("Log relative (harmonic) mean sojourn time")+ggtitle("Fate of a linked marker")+geom_abline(slope=0,intercept = 0,col="black",linetype=2)+theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 0.5, hjust=0.5))
  
  ggplot(assay_grp[assay_grp$categ%in%c("Male","Female"),],aes(x=barrier,y=log10(th_lmk),col=grp_ind))+geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA,na.rm = FALSE,position = position_dodge(preserve = 'single'))+geom_point(position=position_jitterdodge(0.15),alpha=0.5)+scale_color_manual(values=c("black","red","orange","magenta","cyan2","blue"),name="Focal individual phenotype")+theme(legend.position = "bottom")+ylab("Log relative (harmonic) mean sojourn time")+ggtitle("Fate of a linked marker")+geom_abline(slope=0,intercept = 0,col="black",linetype=2)+facet_wrap(~categ,ncol=1)+theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 0.5, hjust=0.5))
  
  ggplot(assay_grp[assay_grp$categ=="all",],aes(x=barrier,y=log10(th_fmk),col=grp_ind,grp=grp_ind))+geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA,na.rm = FALSE,position = position_dodge(preserve = 'single'))+geom_point(position=position_jitterdodge(0.15),alpha=0.5)+scale_color_manual(values=c("black","red","orange","magenta","cyan2","blue"),name="Focal individual phenotype")+theme(legend.position = "bottom")+ylab("Log relative (harmonic) mean sojourn time")+ggtitle("Fate of an unlinked marker")+geom_abline(slope=0,intercept = 0,col="black",linetype=2)+theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 0.5, hjust=0.5))
  
  ggplot(assay_grp[assay_grp$categ%in%c("Male","Female"),],aes(x=barrier,y=log10(th_fmk),col=grp_ind))+geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA,na.rm = FALSE,position = position_dodge(preserve = 'single'))+geom_point(position=position_jitterdodge(0.15),alpha=0.5)+scale_color_manual(values=c("black","red","orange","magenta","cyan2","blue"),name="Focal individual phenotype")+theme(legend.position = "bottom")+ylab("Log relative (harmonic) mean sojourn time")+ggtitle("Fate of an unlinked marker")+geom_abline(slope=0,intercept = 0,col="black",linetype=2)+facet_wrap(~categ,ncol=1)+theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 0.5, hjust=0.5))
  
  
  ggplot(assay_grp[assay_grp$categ=="all",],aes(x=barrier,y=log10(tg_lmk),col=grp_ind,grp=grp_ind))+geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA,na.rm = FALSE,position = position_dodge(preserve = 'single'))+geom_point(position=position_jitterdodge(0.15),alpha=0.5)+scale_color_manual(values=c("black","red","orange","magenta","cyan2","blue"),name="Focal individual phenotype")+theme(legend.position = "bottom")+ylab("Log relative (geometric) mean sojourn time")+ggtitle("Fate of a linked marker")+geom_abline(slope=0,intercept = 0,col="black",linetype=2)+theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 0.5, hjust=0.5))
  
  ggplot(assay_grp[assay_grp$categ%in%c("Male","Female"),],aes(x=barrier,y=log10(tg_lmk),col=grp_ind))+geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA,na.rm = FALSE,position = position_dodge(preserve = 'single'))+geom_point(position=position_jitterdodge(0.15),alpha=0.5)+scale_color_manual(values=c("black","red","orange","magenta","cyan2","blue"),name="Focal individual phenotype")+theme(legend.position = "bottom")+ylab("Log relative (geometric) mean sojourn time")+ggtitle("Fate of a linked marker")+geom_abline(slope=0,intercept = 0,col="black",linetype=2)+facet_wrap(~categ,ncol=1)+theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 0.5, hjust=0.5))
  
  ggplot(assay_grp[assay_grp$categ=="all",],aes(x=barrier,y=log10(tg_fmk),col=grp_ind,grp=grp_ind))+geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA,na.rm = FALSE,position = position_dodge(preserve = 'single'))+geom_point(position=position_jitterdodge(0.15),alpha=0.5)+scale_color_manual(values=c("black","red","orange","magenta","cyan2","blue"),name="Focal individual phenotype")+theme(legend.position = "bottom")+ylab("Log relative (geometric) mean sojourn time")+ggtitle("Fate of an unlinked marker")+geom_abline(slope=0,intercept = 0,col="black",linetype=2)+theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 0.5, hjust=0.5))
  
  ggplot(assay_grp[assay_grp$categ%in%c("Male","Female"),],aes(x=barrier,y=log10(tg_fmk),col=grp_ind))+geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA,na.rm = FALSE,position = position_dodge(preserve = 'single'))+geom_point(position=position_jitterdodge(0.15),alpha=0.5)+scale_color_manual(values=c("black","red","orange","magenta","cyan2","blue"),name="Focal individual phenotype")+theme(legend.position = "bottom")+ylab("Log relative (geometric) mean sojourn time")+ggtitle("Fate of an unlinked marker")+geom_abline(slope=0,intercept = 0,col="black",linetype=2)+facet_wrap(~categ,ncol=1)+theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 0.5, hjust=0.5))
  
  #dev.off()
}
```


## Analysis of the default dataset for different migration rates and 10000 replicates
these cases are sel-mig cases, meaning that the local adaptation case "double migrants" are extra penalized
Load the data for the default case and different migration rates
We also define the "type" of focal individual (for pop 1, but it is symmetric for the other):

```{r load raw data 10000 replicates}
if(hasRawAssayFile){
  assay_raw=rbind(rep(NA,60),rep(NA,60))
  colnames(assay_raw)=colnames_assay_raw
  
  
  setwd("./output_wkm")
  for (i in list.files(pattern="assaysV2")){
    
    assay_raw=load_RI_measure_raw(i,assay_raw)
    
  }
  for (i in list.files(pattern="assays")){
    
    assay_raw=load_RI_measure_raw(i,assay_raw)
    
  }
  
  setwd("./../output_default")
  for (i in list.files(pattern="assaysV2")){
    
    assay_raw=load_RI_measure_raw(i,assay_raw)
    
  }
  for (i in list.files(pattern="assays")){
    
    assay_raw=load_RI_measure_raw(i,assay_raw)
    
  }
  
  
  
  assay_raw=assay_raw[-c(1,2),]
  assay_raw=as.data.frame(assay_raw)
  
  assay_raw$scenario=as.factor(list_scenario[assay_raw$scenario])
  
  
  assay_raw$origin=as.factor(list_origin[(assay_raw$origin+1)])
  assay_raw$barriers=as.factor(list_scenario[assay_raw$barriers])
  assay_raw$life_cycle=as.factor(list_life_cycle[(assay_raw$life_cycle+1)])
  
  assay_raw$prop_success1=assay_raw$nb_offspring1/(assay_raw$nb_mating1+100*(1000-assay_raw$nb_offspring1))
  assay_raw$prop_success2=assay_raw$nb_offspring2/(assay_raw$nb_mating2+100*(1000-assay_raw$nb_offspring2))
  
  
  assay_raw$class_m1="mig"
  assay_raw$class_m1[assay_raw$pheno_m1>-4]="mig_backcross"
  assay_raw$class_m1[assay_raw$pheno_m1>-1]="hybrid"
  assay_raw$class_m1[assay_raw$pheno_m1>1]="res_backcross"
  assay_raw$class_m1[assay_raw$pheno_m1>4]="res"
  
  assay_raw$class_m2="res"
  assay_raw$class_m2[assay_raw$pheno_m2>-4]="res_backcross"
  assay_raw$class_m2[assay_raw$pheno_m2>-1]="hybrid"
  assay_raw$class_m2[assay_raw$pheno_m2>1]="mig_backcross"
  assay_raw$class_m2[assay_raw$pheno_m2>4]="mig"
}
```

Display sojourn time of the linked and unlinked marker in the absence of reproductive barrier
```{r figure sojourn time neutral case}
if(hasRawAssayFile){
  assay_raw$t_lmk_1[assay_raw$t_lmk_1==0]=10000
  assay_raw$t_lmk_2[assay_raw$t_lmk_2==0]=10000
  assay_raw$t_fmk_1[assay_raw$t_fmk_1==0]=10000
  assay_raw$t_fmk_2[assay_raw$t_fmk_2==0]=10000
  
  summary(assay_raw$t_lmk_1[assay_raw$barriers=="neu"])
  hist(assay_raw$t_lmk_1[assay_raw$barriers=="neu"],breaks=seq(1,10000,1))
  ggplot(assay_raw[assay_raw$barriers=="neu",],aes(x=as.factor(rep),y=t_lmk_1))+geom_boxplot()+stat_summary(fun=mean,col="red")+facet_wrap(~mig_rate)+coord_trans(y="log10")+scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(1,5,10,30,100,1000,10000))
  ggplot(assay_raw[assay_raw$barriers=="neu",],aes(x=as.factor(rep),y=t_fmk_1))+geom_boxplot()+stat_summary(fun=mean,col="red")+facet_wrap(~mig_rate)+coord_trans(y="log10")+scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(1,5,10,30,100,1000,10000))
}
```

Distribution of sojourn time in the absence of reproductive barriers
```{r distribution of sojourn time neutral case}
if(hasRawAssayFile){
  hist(assay_raw$t_lmk_1[assay_raw$barriers=="neu"],breaks=seq(1,10000,1),freq=FALSE,xlim=c(0,100))
}
```



Compute relative sojourn time for 10k replicates
```{r computing relative sojourn time 10k replicates}
#first need to deal with segregating sites
if(hasRawAssayFile){
  assay_raw$t_lmk_1[assay_raw$t_lmk_1==0]=10000
  assay_raw$t_lmk_2[assay_raw$t_lmk_2==0]=10000
  assay_raw$t_fmk_1[assay_raw$t_fmk_1==0]=10000
  assay_raw$t_fmk_2[assay_raw$t_fmk_2==0]=10000
  
  assay_grp10k=rbind(rep(NA,12),rep(NA,12))
  colnames(assay_grp10k)=c("rep","mig","barrier","grp_ind","count1","t_lmk_1","t_fmk_1","count2","t_lmk_2","t_fmk_2","F1_hyb1","F1_hyb2")
  for(i in seq(10)){
    assay_n=assay_raw[assay_raw$rep==i&assay_raw$barriers=="neu",]
    for (j in c("all","LA","MC","DMI","LA+DMI","LA+MC","MC+DMI")){
      for (l in c(0,0.00005,0.0005,0.005,0.05,0.2)){
        assay_b=assay_raw[assay_raw$rep==i&assay_raw$barriers==j&assay_raw$mig_rate==l,]
        
        assay_grp10k=rbind(assay_grp10k,c(i,l,j,"all",length(assay_b$nb_ind),mean(assay_b$t_lmk_1)/mean(assay_n$t_lmk_1),mean(assay_b$t_fmk_1)/mean(assay_n$t_fmk_1),length(assay_b$nb_ind),mean(assay_b$t_lmk_2)/mean(assay_n$t_lmk_2),mean(assay_b$t_fmk_2)/mean(assay_n$t_fmk_2),mean(assay_b$hyb_fit1),mean(assay_b$hyb_fit2)))
        for( k in c("mig","mig_backcross","hybrid","res_backcross","res")){ 
          
          assay_b1=assay_raw[assay_raw$rep==i&assay_raw$barriers==j&assay_raw$class_m1==k&assay_raw$mig_rate==l,]
          assay_b2=assay_raw[assay_raw$rep==i&assay_raw$barriers==j&assay_raw$class_m2==k&assay_raw$mig_rate==l,]
          
          assay_grp10k=rbind(assay_grp10k,c(i,l,j,k,length(assay_b1$nb_ind),mean(assay_b1$t_lmk_1)/mean(assay_n$t_lmk_1),mean(assay_b1$t_fmk_1)/mean(assay_n$t_fmk_1),length(assay_b2$nb_ind),mean(assay_b2$t_lmk_2)/mean(assay_n$t_lmk_2),mean(assay_b2$t_fmk_2)/mean(assay_n$t_fmk_2),mean(assay_b1$hyb_fit1),mean(assay_b2$hyb_fit2)))
        }
      }
    }
  }
  
  #assay_b=assay_raw[assay_raw$rep==1&assay_raw$barriers=="all"&assay_raw$class_m1=="mig",]
  assay_grp10k=assay_grp10k[-c(1,2),]
  assay_grp10k=as.data.frame(assay_grp10k)
  assay_grp10k$count1=as.numeric(assay_grp10k$count1)
  assay_grp10k$count2=as.numeric(assay_grp10k$count2)
  assay_grp10k$t_lmk_1=as.numeric(assay_grp10k$t_lmk_1)
  assay_grp10k$t_lmk_2=as.numeric(assay_grp10k$t_lmk_2)
  assay_grp10k$t_fmk_1=as.numeric(assay_grp10k$t_fmk_1)
  assay_grp10k$t_fmk_2=as.numeric(assay_grp10k$t_fmk_2)
  assay_grp10k$F1_hyb1=as.numeric(assay_grp10k$F1_hyb1)
  assay_grp10k$F1_hyb2=as.numeric(assay_grp10k$F1_hyb2)
  
  assay_grp10k$grp_ind=factor(as.character(assay_grp10k$grp_ind),levels=c("all","mig","mig_backcross","hybrid","res_backcross","res"))
  assay_grp10k$barrier=factor(as.character(assay_grp10k$barrier),levels=c("LA","MC","DMI","LA+MC","LA+DMI","MC+DMI","all"))
}
```


Display decomposition of the sojourn time depending on the barrier and the focal individual category
```{r decomposition sojourn time by migrant category, fig.height=10, fig.width=12}
if(hasRawAssayFile){
  #pdf("Figure/decomposition_default_10k.pdf",width=8,height=6)
  ggplot(assay_grp10k,aes(x=barrier,y=t_lmk_1,col=grp_ind))+geom_boxplot(position=position_dodge(0.9))+scale_color_manual(values=c("black","red","orange","magenta","cyan2","blue"))+theme(legend.position = "bottom")+ylab("Relative mean sojourn time")+ggtitle("Linked marker pop. 1")+coord_trans(y="log10")+stat_summary(aes(x=barrier, y=t_lmk_1,group=grp_ind),fun="mean",position=position_dodge(.9))+theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 0.5, hjust=0.5))
  ggplot(assay_grp10k,aes(x=barrier,y=t_lmk_1,col=grp_ind))+geom_boxplot()+scale_color_manual(values=c("black","red","orange","magenta","cyan2","blue"))+theme(legend.position = "bottom")+ylab("Relative mean sojourn time")+ggtitle("Linked marker pop. 1")+facet_wrap(~as.numeric(mig))+coord_trans(y="log10")
  ggplot(assay_grp10k,aes(x=mig,y=t_lmk_1,col=grp_ind))+geom_boxplot()+coord_trans(y="log10")+scale_color_manual(values=c("black","red","orange","magenta","cyan2","blue"))+theme(legend.position = "bottom")+ylab("Relative mean sojourn time")+ggtitle("Linked marker pop. 1")+facet_wrap(~barrier)
  
  ggplot(assay_grp10k,aes(x=as.numeric(rep),y=t_lmk_1,col=grp_ind))+geom_point()+scale_color_manual(values=c("black","red","orange","magenta","cyan2","blue"))+theme(legend.position = "bottom")+ylab("Relative mean sojourn time")+ggtitle("Linked marker pop. 1")+facet_wrap(~barrier,nrow = 2)+ylim(0,2)
  ggplot(assay_grp10k,aes(x=barrier,y=t_fmk_1,col=grp_ind))+geom_boxplot()+coord_trans(y="log10")+scale_color_manual(values=c("black","red","orange","magenta","cyan2","blue"))+theme(legend.position = "bottom")+ylab("Relative mean sojourn time")+ggtitle("Unlinked marker pop. 1")
  ggplot(assay_grp10k,aes(x=barrier,y=t_lmk_2,col=grp_ind))+geom_boxplot()+coord_trans(y="log10")+scale_color_manual(values=c("black","red","orange","magenta","cyan2","blue"))+theme(legend.position = "bottom")+ylab("Relative mean sojourn time")+ggtitle("Linked marker pop. 2")
  ggplot(assay_grp10k,aes(x=barrier,y=t_fmk_2,col=grp_ind))+geom_boxplot()+coord_trans(y="log10")+scale_color_manual(values=c("black","red","orange","magenta","cyan2","blue"))+theme(legend.position = "bottom")+ylab("Relative mean sojourn time")+ggtitle("Unlinked marker pop. 2")
}
#dev.off()
```


## Analysis of the default case for the migration-selection (juvenile dispersal) life cycle
Load raw data
```{r load data saasy migration selection}
if(hasRawAssayFile){
  assay_raw=rbind(rep(NA,60),rep(NA,60))
  colnames(assay_raw)=colnames_assay_raw
  
  setwd("output_iso_LC1")
  for (i in list.files(pattern="assay")){
    
    assay_raw=load_RI_measure_raw(i,assay_raw)
    
  }
  setwd("./../output_strgm_LC1")
  for (i in list.files(pattern="assay")){
    
    assay_raw=load_RI_measure_raw(i,assay_raw)
    
  }
  
  setwd("./../output_wkm_LC1")
  for (i in list.files(pattern="assay")){
    
    assay_raw=load_RI_measure_raw(i,assay_raw)
    
  }
  
  setwd("./../output_Rwkm_LC1")
  for (i in list.files(pattern="assay")){
    
    assay_raw=load_RI_measure_raw(i,assay_raw)
    
  }
  
  setwd("./../output_RRwkm_LC1")
  for (i in list.files(pattern="assay")){
    
    assay_raw=load_RI_measure_raw(i,assay_raw)
    
  }
  
  setwd("./../output_LC1")
  for (i in list.files(pattern="assay")){
    
    assay_raw=load_RI_measure_raw(i,assay_raw)
    
  }
  
  
  
  assay_raw=assay_raw[-c(1,2),]
  assay_raw=as.data.frame(assay_raw)
  
  assay_raw$scenario=as.factor(list_scenario[assay_raw$scenario])
  
  
  assay_raw$origin=as.factor(list_origin[(assay_raw$origin+1)])
  assay_raw$barriers=as.factor(list_scenario[assay_raw$barriers])
  assay_raw$life_cycle=as.factor(list_life_cycle[(assay_raw$life_cycle+1)])
  
  assay_raw$prop_success1=assay_raw$nb_offspring1/(assay_raw$nb_mating1+100*(1000-assay_raw$nb_offspring1))
  assay_raw$prop_success2=assay_raw$nb_offspring2/(assay_raw$nb_mating2+100*(1000-assay_raw$nb_offspring2))
  
  
  assay_raw$class_m1="mig"
  assay_raw$class_m1[assay_raw$pheno_m1>-4]="mig_backcross"
  assay_raw$class_m1[assay_raw$pheno_m1>-1]="hybrid"
  assay_raw$class_m1[assay_raw$pheno_m1>1]="res_backcross"
  assay_raw$class_m1[assay_raw$pheno_m1>4]="res"
  
  assay_raw$class_m2="res"
  assay_raw$class_m2[assay_raw$pheno_m2>-4]="res_backcross"
  assay_raw$class_m2[assay_raw$pheno_m2>-1]="hybrid"
  assay_raw$class_m2[assay_raw$pheno_m2>1]="mig_backcross"
  assay_raw$class_m2[assay_raw$pheno_m2>4]="mig"
}
```

### checking F1 properties
Distribution of focal individual metrics
```{r distribution of parents metrics juv dispersal}
if(hasRawAssayFile){
  ggplot(assay_raw[assay_raw$barriers=="all",],aes(x=pheno_m1  ))+geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.01)+facet_wrap(~mig_rate)+ggtitle("parental phenotype")+geom_vline(xintercept = c(-4,-1,1,4))
  
  ggplot(assay_raw[assay_raw$barriers=="all",],aes(x=eco_fit_m1 ))+geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.01)+facet_wrap(~mig_rate)+ggtitle("parental ecological fitness")+geom_vline(xintercept = c(0.1,exp(log(.1)*25/100)))
  
  ggplot(assay_raw[assay_raw$barriers=="all",],aes(x=dmi_fit_m1  ))+geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.01)+facet_wrap(~mig_rate)+ggtitle("parental intrinsic fitness")
  
  ggplot(assay_raw[assay_raw$barriers=="all",],aes(x=pref_m1 ))+geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.01)+facet_wrap(~mig_rate)+ggtitle("parental preference")+geom_vline(xintercept = c(0.1))
}
```

Display metrics of F1 offspring of focal individuals
```{r distribution of F1 metrics juvenile dispersal}
if(hasRawAssayFile){
  ggplot(assay_raw[assay_raw$barriers=="all",],aes(x=eco_fi1))+geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.01)+facet_wrap(~mig_rate)+ggtitle("mean F1 ecological fitness")+geom_vline(xintercept = c(0.1,exp(log(.1)*25/100)))
  
  ggplot(assay_raw[assay_raw$barriers=="all",],aes(x=hyb_fit1))+geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.01)+facet_wrap(~mig_rate)+ggtitle("mean F1 intrinsic fitness")+geom_vline(xintercept = c(0.9^50,0.9^25,0.9^(100/9)))
  
  ggplot(assay_raw[assay_raw$barriers=="all",],aes(x=prop_success1))+geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.01)+facet_wrap(~mig_rate)+ggtitle("proportion succesful mating")+geom_vline(xintercept = c(0.1))
}
```

Displaying correlation between parents and F1
```{r parental metrics vs F1 metrics juvenile dispersion}
if(hasRawAssayFile){
  ggplot(assay_raw[assay_raw$barriers=="all",],aes(x=eco_fit_m1,y=eco_fi1,col=as.factor(class_m1),symbol=life_cycle))+geom_point()+facet_wrap(mig_pop1~mig_rate,nrow=2)+theme(legend.position = "bottom")+xlab("Parental ecological fitness")+ylab("Offspring ecological fitness")
  ggplot(assay_raw[assay_raw$barriers=="all",],aes(x=eco_fit_m2,y=eco_fi2,col=as.factor(class_m2),symbol=life_cycle))+geom_point()+facet_wrap(mig_pop2~mig_rate,nrow=2)+theme(legend.position = "bottom")+xlab("Parental ecological fitness")+ylab("Offspring ecological fitness")
  
  ggplot(assay_raw[assay_raw$barriers=="all",],aes(x=dmi_fit_m1,y=eco_fi1,col=as.factor(class_m1),symbol=life_cycle))+geom_point()+facet_wrap(mig_pop1~mig_rate,nrow=2)+theme(legend.position = "bottom")+xlab("Parental intrinsic fitness")+ylab("Offspring intrisic fitness")
  ggplot(assay_raw[assay_raw$barriers=="all",],aes(x=dmi_fit_m2,y=eco_fi2,col=as.factor(class_m2),symbol=life_cycle))+geom_point()+facet_wrap(mig_pop2~mig_rate,nrow=2)+theme(legend.position = "bottom")+xlab("Parental intrinsic fitness")+ylab("Offspring intrinsic fitness")
  
  ggplot(assay_raw[assay_raw$barriers=="all",],aes(x=pref_m1,y=prop_success1,col=as.factor(class_m1),symbol=life_cycle))+geom_point()+facet_wrap(mig_pop1~mig_rate,nrow=2)+theme(legend.position = "bottom")+xlab("Parental preference")+ylab("Proportion of succesful matings")
  ggplot(assay_raw[assay_raw$barriers=="all",],aes(x=pref_m2,y=prop_success2,col=as.factor(class_m2),symbol=life_cycle))+geom_point()+facet_wrap(mig_pop2~mig_rate,nrow=2)+theme(legend.position = "bottom")+xlab("Parental preference")+ylab("Proportion of succesful matings")
}
```

Correlation between F1 metrics
```{r link between F1 metrics juvenile dispersal}
if(hasRawAssayFile){
  ggplot(assay_raw[assay_raw$barriers=="all",],aes(x=eco_fi2,y=hyb_fit2,col=as.factor(class_m1)))+geom_point()+facet_wrap(mig_pop1~mig_rate,nrow=2)+theme(legend.position = "none")
  
  ggplot(assay_raw[assay_raw$barriers=="all",],aes(x=eco_fi1,y=nb_offspring1,col=as.factor(class_m1)))+geom_point()+facet_wrap(mig_pop1~mig_rate,nrow=2)+theme(legend.position = "none")
  ggplot(assay_raw[assay_raw$barriers=="all",],aes(x=eco_fi2,y=nb_offspring2,col=as.factor(class_m2)))+geom_point()+facet_wrap(mig_pop1~mig_rate,nrow=2)+theme(legend.position = "none")
  
  ggplot(assay_raw[assay_raw$barriers=="all",],aes(x=hyb_fit1,y=nb_offspring1,col=as.factor(class_m1)))+geom_point()+facet_wrap(mig_pop1~mig_rate,nrow=2)+theme(legend.position = "none")
  ggplot(assay_raw[assay_raw$barriers=="all",],aes(x=hyb_fit2,y=nb_offspring2,col=as.factor(class_m2)))+geom_point()+facet_wrap(mig_pop1~mig_rate,nrow=2)+theme(legend.position = "none")
}
```

### Relative sojourn time

Computing relative sojourn time (for all three Euclidean means) for the juvenile dispersal case and write outcome to file
```{r computing relative sojourn time juvenile dispersal}
#first need to deal with segregating sites
if(hasRawAssayFile&FALSE){ # to avoid recomputing each time 
  assay_raw$t_lmk_1[assay_raw$t_lmk_1==0]=10000
  assay_raw$t_lmk_2[assay_raw$t_lmk_2==0]=10000
  assay_raw$t_fmk_1[assay_raw$t_fmk_1==0]=10000
  assay_raw$t_fmk_2[assay_raw$t_fmk_2==0]=10000
  
  assay_grp=rbind(rep(NA,14),rep(NA,14))
  colnames(assay_grp)=c("rep","mig","barrier","grp_ind","categ","count","ta_lmk","ta_fmk","th_lmk","th_fmk","tg_lmk","tg_fmk","F1_hyb1","F1_hyb2")
  
  neutral_la=mean(c(assay_raw$t_lmk_1[assay_raw$barriers=="neu"],assay_raw$t_lmk_2[assay_raw$barriers=="neu"]))
  neutral_fa=mean(c(assay_raw$t_fmk_1[assay_raw$barriers=="neu"],assay_raw$t_fmk_2[assay_raw$barriers=="neu"]))
  neutral_lh=1/mean(1/c(assay_raw$t_lmk_1[assay_raw$barriers=="neu"],assay_raw$t_lmk_2[assay_raw$barriers=="neu"]))
  neutral_fh=1/mean(1/c(assay_raw$t_fmk_1[assay_raw$barriers=="neu"],assay_raw$t_fmk_2[assay_raw$barriers=="neu"]))
  neutral_lg=exp(mean(log(c(assay_raw$t_lmk_1[assay_raw$barriers=="neu"],assay_raw$t_lmk_2[assay_raw$barriers=="neu"]))))
  neutral_fg=exp(mean(log(c(assay_raw$t_fmk_1[assay_raw$barriers=="neu"],assay_raw$t_fmk_2[assay_raw$barriers=="neu"]))))
  
  
  for(i in seq(10)){
    for (j in c("all","LA","MC","DMI","LA+DMI","LA+MC","MC+DMI")){
      for (l in c(0,0.00005,0.0005,0.005,0.05,0.2)){
        assay_b=assay_raw[assay_raw$rep==i&assay_raw$barriers==j&assay_raw$mig_rate==l,]
        vec_all=c(length(assay_b$nb_ind),mean(c(assay_b$t_lmk_1,assay_b$t_lmk_2))/neutral_la,mean(c(assay_b$t_fmk_1,assay_b$t_fmk_2))/neutral_fa,(1/mean(1/c(assay_b$t_lmk_1,assay_b$t_lmk_2)))/neutral_lh,(1/mean(1/c(assay_b$t_fmk_1,assay_b$t_fmk_2)))/neutral_fh,exp(mean(log(c(assay_b$t_lmk_1,assay_b$t_lmk_2))))/neutral_lg,exp(mean(log(c(assay_b$t_fmk_1,assay_b$t_fmk_2))))/neutral_fg,mean(assay_b$hyb_fit1),mean(assay_b$hyb_fit2))
        assay_grp=rbind(assay_grp,c(i,l,j,"all","all",vec_all))
        
        assay_b=assay_raw[assay_raw$rep==i&assay_raw$barriers==j&assay_raw$mig_rate==l&assay_raw$mig_pop1=="f1m",]
        vec_all=c(length(assay_b$nb_ind),mean(c(assay_b$t_lmk_1,assay_b$t_lmk_2))/neutral_la,mean(c(assay_b$t_fmk_1,assay_b$t_fmk_2))/neutral_fa,(1/mean(1/c(assay_b$t_lmk_1,assay_b$t_lmk_2)))/neutral_lh,(1/mean(1/c(assay_b$t_fmk_1,assay_b$t_fmk_2)))/neutral_fh,exp(mean(log(c(assay_b$t_lmk_1,assay_b$t_lmk_2))))/neutral_lg,exp(mean(log(c(assay_b$t_fmk_1,assay_b$t_fmk_2))))/neutral_fg,mean(assay_b$hyb_fit1),mean(assay_b$hyb_fit2))
        assay_grp=rbind(assay_grp,c(i,l,j,"all","fem",vec_all))
        
        assay_b=assay_raw[assay_raw$rep==i&assay_raw$barriers==j&assay_raw$mig_rate==l&assay_raw$mig_pop1=="m1m",]
        vec_all=c(length(assay_b$nb_ind),mean(c(assay_b$t_lmk_1,assay_b$t_lmk_2))/neutral_la,mean(c(assay_b$t_fmk_1,assay_b$t_fmk_2))/neutral_fa,(1/mean(1/c(assay_b$t_lmk_1,assay_b$t_lmk_2)))/neutral_lh,(1/mean(1/c(assay_b$t_fmk_1,assay_b$t_fmk_2)))/neutral_fh,exp(mean(log(c(assay_b$t_lmk_1,assay_b$t_lmk_2))))/neutral_lg,exp(mean(log(c(assay_b$t_fmk_1,assay_b$t_fmk_2))))/neutral_fg,mean(assay_b$hyb_fit1),mean(assay_b$hyb_fit2))
        assay_grp=rbind(assay_grp,c(i,l,j,"all","mal",vec_all))
        
        assay_b=assay_raw[assay_raw$rep==i&assay_raw$barriers==j&assay_raw$mig_rate==l&assay_raw$mig_pop1=="m1m",]
        vec_all=c(length(assay_b$nb_ind),mean(c(assay_b$t_lmk_1))/neutral_la,mean(c(assay_b$t_fmk_1))/neutral_fa,(1/mean(1/c(assay_b$t_lmk_1)))/neutral_lh,(1/mean(1/c(assay_b$t_fmk_1)))/neutral_fh,exp(mean(log(c(assay_b$t_lmk_1))))/neutral_lg,exp(mean(log(c(assay_b$t_fmk_1))))/neutral_fg,mean(assay_b$hyb_fit1),NA)
        assay_grp=rbind(assay_grp,c(i,l,j,"all","mal_p1",vec_all))
        
        assay_b=assay_raw[assay_raw$rep==i&assay_raw$barriers==j&assay_raw$mig_rate==l&assay_raw$mig_pop1=="f1m",]
        vec_all=c(length(assay_b$nb_ind),mean(c(assay_b$t_lmk_1))/neutral_la,mean(c(assay_b$t_fmk_1))/neutral_fa,(1/mean(1/c(assay_b$t_lmk_1)))/neutral_lh,(1/mean(1/c(assay_b$t_fmk_1)))/neutral_fh,exp(mean(log(c(assay_b$t_lmk_1))))/neutral_lg,exp(mean(log(c(assay_b$t_fmk_1))))/neutral_fg,mean(assay_b$hyb_fit1),NA)
        assay_grp=rbind(assay_grp,c(i,l,j,"all","fem_p1",vec_all))
        
        assay_b=assay_raw[assay_raw$rep==i&assay_raw$barriers==j&assay_raw$mig_rate==l&assay_raw$mig_pop1=="m1m",]
        vec_all=c(length(assay_b$nb_ind),mean(c(assay_b$t_lmk_2))/neutral_la,mean(c(assay_b$t_fmk_2))/neutral_fa,(1/mean(1/c(assay_b$t_lmk_2)))/neutral_lh,(1/mean(1/c(assay_b$t_fmk_2)))/neutral_fh,exp(mean(log(c(assay_b$t_lmk_2))))/neutral_lg,exp(mean(log(c(assay_b$t_fmk_2))))/neutral_fg,NA,mean(assay_b$hyb_fit2))
        assay_grp=rbind(assay_grp,c(i,l,j,"all","mal_p2",vec_all))
        
        assay_b=assay_raw[assay_raw$rep==i&assay_raw$barriers==j&assay_raw$mig_rate==l&assay_raw$mig_pop1=="f1m",]
        vec_all=c(length(assay_b$nb_ind),mean(c(assay_b$t_lmk_2))/neutral_la,mean(c(assay_b$t_fmk_2))/neutral_fa,(1/mean(1/c(assay_b$t_lmk_2)))/neutral_lh,(1/mean(1/c(assay_b$t_fmk_2)))/neutral_fh,exp(mean(log(c(assay_b$t_lmk_2))))/neutral_lg,exp(mean(log(c(assay_b$t_fmk_2))))/neutral_fg,NA,mean(assay_b$hyb_fit2))
        assay_grp=rbind(assay_grp,c(i,l,j,"all","fem_p2",vec_all))
        
        
        
        
        for( k in c("mig","mig_backcross","hybrid","res_backcross","res")){ 
          
          assay_b1=assay_raw[assay_raw$rep==i&assay_raw$barriers==j&assay_raw$class_m1==k&assay_raw$mig_rate==l,]
          assay_b2=assay_raw[assay_raw$rep==i&assay_raw$barriers==j&assay_raw$class_m2==k&assay_raw$mig_rate==l,]
          vec_all=c(length(c(assay_b1$nb_ind,assay_b2$nb_ind)),mean(c(assay_b1$t_lmk_1,assay_b2$t_lmk_2))/neutral_la,mean(c(assay_b1$t_fmk_1,assay_b2$t_fmk_2))/neutral_fa,(1/mean(1/c(assay_b1$t_lmk_1,assay_b2$t_lmk_2)))/neutral_lh,(1/mean(1/c(assay_b1$t_fmk_1,assay_b2$t_fmk_2)))/neutral_fh,exp(mean(log(c(assay_b1$t_lmk_1,assay_b2$t_lmk_2))))/neutral_lg,exp(mean(log(c(assay_b1$t_fmk_1,assay_b2$t_fmk_2))))/neutral_fg,mean(assay_b1$hyb_fit1),mean(assay_b2$hyb_fit2))
          assay_grp=rbind(assay_grp,c(i,l,j,k,"all",vec_all))
          
          assay_b1=assay_raw[assay_raw$rep==i&assay_raw$barriers==j&assay_raw$class_m1==k&assay_raw$mig_rate==l&assay_raw$mig_pop1=="f1m",]
          assay_b2=assay_raw[assay_raw$rep==i&assay_raw$barriers==j&assay_raw$class_m2==k&assay_raw$mig_rate==l&assay_raw$mig_pop1=="f1m",]
          vec_all=c(length(c(assay_b1$nb_ind,assay_b2$nb_ind)),mean(c(assay_b1$t_lmk_1,assay_b2$t_lmk_2))/neutral_la,mean(c(assay_b1$t_fmk_1,assay_b2$t_fmk_2))/neutral_fa,(1/mean(1/c(assay_b1$t_lmk_1,assay_b2$t_lmk_2)))/neutral_lh,(1/mean(1/c(assay_b1$t_fmk_1,assay_b2$t_fmk_2)))/neutral_fh,exp(mean(log(c(assay_b1$t_lmk_1,assay_b2$t_lmk_2))))/neutral_lg,exp(mean(log(c(assay_b1$t_fmk_1,assay_b2$t_fmk_2))))/neutral_fg,mean(assay_b1$hyb_fit1),mean(assay_b2$hyb_fit2))
          assay_grp=rbind(assay_grp,c(i,l,j,k,"fem",vec_all))
          
          assay_b1=assay_raw[assay_raw$rep==i&assay_raw$barriers==j&assay_raw$class_m1==k&assay_raw$mig_rate==l&assay_raw$mig_pop1=="m1m",]
          assay_b2=assay_raw[assay_raw$rep==i&assay_raw$barriers==j&assay_raw$class_m2==k&assay_raw$mig_rate==l&assay_raw$mig_pop1=="m1m",]
          vec_all=c(length(c(assay_b1$nb_ind,assay_b2$nb_ind)),mean(c(assay_b1$t_lmk_1,assay_b2$t_lmk_2))/neutral_la,mean(c(assay_b1$t_fmk_1,assay_b2$t_fmk_2))/neutral_fa,(1/mean(1/c(assay_b1$t_lmk_1,assay_b2$t_lmk_2)))/neutral_lh,(1/mean(1/c(assay_b1$t_fmk_1,assay_b2$t_fmk_2)))/neutral_fh,exp(mean(log(c(assay_b1$t_lmk_1,assay_b2$t_lmk_2))))/neutral_lg,exp(mean(log(c(assay_b1$t_fmk_1,assay_b2$t_fmk_2))))/neutral_fg,mean(assay_b1$hyb_fit1),mean(assay_b2$hyb_fit2))
          assay_grp=rbind(assay_grp,c(i,l,j,k,"mal",vec_all))
          
          assay_b=assay_raw[assay_raw$rep==i&assay_raw$barriers==j&assay_raw$class_m1==k&assay_raw$mig_rate==l&assay_raw$mig_pop1=="m1m",]
          vec_all=c(length(assay_b$nb_ind),mean(c(assay_b$t_lmk_1))/neutral_la,mean(c(assay_b$t_fmk_1))/neutral_fa,(1/mean(1/c(assay_b$t_lmk_1)))/neutral_lh,(1/mean(1/c(assay_b$t_fmk_1)))/neutral_fh,exp(mean(log(c(assay_b$t_lmk_1))))/neutral_lg,exp(mean(log(c(assay_b$t_fmk_1))))/neutral_fg,mean(assay_b$hyb_fit1),NA)
          assay_grp=rbind(assay_grp,c(i,l,j,k,"mal_p1",vec_all))
          
          assay_b=assay_raw[assay_raw$rep==i&assay_raw$barriers==j&assay_raw$class_m1==k&assay_raw$mig_rate==l&assay_raw$mig_pop1=="f1m",]
          vec_all=c(length(assay_b$nb_ind),mean(c(assay_b$t_lmk_1))/neutral_la,mean(c(assay_b$t_fmk_1))/neutral_fa,(1/mean(1/c(assay_b$t_lmk_1)))/neutral_lh,(1/mean(1/c(assay_b$t_fmk_1)))/neutral_fh,exp(mean(log(c(assay_b$t_lmk_1))))/neutral_lg,exp(mean(log(c(assay_b$t_fmk_1))))/neutral_fg,mean(assay_b$hyb_fit1),NA)
          assay_grp=rbind(assay_grp,c(i,l,j,k,"fem_p1",vec_all))
          
          assay_b=assay_raw[assay_raw$rep==i&assay_raw$barriers==j&assay_raw$class_m2==k&assay_raw$mig_rate==l&assay_raw$mig_pop1=="m1m",]
          vec_all=c(length(assay_b$nb_ind),mean(c(assay_b$t_lmk_2))/neutral_la,mean(c(assay_b$t_fmk_2))/neutral_fa,(1/mean(1/c(assay_b$t_lmk_2)))/neutral_lh,(1/mean(1/c(assay_b$t_fmk_2)))/neutral_fh,exp(mean(log(c(assay_b$t_lmk_2))))/neutral_lg,exp(mean(log(c(assay_b$t_fmk_2))))/neutral_fg,NA,mean(assay_b$hyb_fit2))
          assay_grp=rbind(assay_grp,c(i,l,j,k,"mal_p2",vec_all))
          
          assay_b=assay_raw[assay_raw$rep==i&assay_raw$barriers==j&assay_raw$class_m2==k&assay_raw$mig_rate==l&assay_raw$mig_pop1=="f1m",]
          vec_all=c(length(assay_b$nb_ind),mean(c(assay_b$t_lmk_2))/neutral_la,mean(c(assay_b$t_fmk_2))/neutral_fa,(1/mean(1/c(assay_b$t_lmk_2)))/neutral_lh,(1/mean(1/c(assay_b$t_fmk_2)))/neutral_fh,exp(mean(log(c(assay_b$t_lmk_2))))/neutral_lg,exp(mean(log(c(assay_b$t_fmk_2))))/neutral_fg,NA,mean(assay_b$hyb_fit2))
          assay_grp=rbind(assay_grp,c(i,l,j,k,"fem_p2",vec_all))
          
        }
      }
    }
  }
  assay_grp=assay_grp[-c(1,2),]
  write.table(assay_grp,"Sojourn_time_default_decomp_LC1.csv")
  
}
```

Load data juvenile dispersal
```{r load sojourn time juvenile dispersal}
if(hasRawAssayFile){
  assay_grp=read.table("Sojourn_time_default_decomp_LC1.csv",header = TRUE)
  
  assay_grp$grp_ind=factor(as.character(assay_grp$grp_ind),levels=c("all","mig","mig_backcross","hybrid","res_backcross","res"))
  assay_grp$categ[assay_grp$categ=="fem"]="Female"
  assay_grp$categ[assay_grp$categ=="mal"]="Male"
  assay_grp$categ=factor(as.character(assay_grp$categ))
  
  assay_grp$barrier=factor(as.character(assay_grp$barrier),levels=c("LA","MC","DMI","LA+MC","LA+DMI","MC+DMI","all"))
}
```

Display distribution of sojourn time depending on the categorie of the focal individual
```{r decomposition sojourn time by migrant category juvenile dispersal, fig.height=8, fig.width=6}
if(hasRawAssayFile){
  #pdf("Figure/decomposition_LC1.pdf",width=6,height=8)
  ggplot(assay_grp[assay_grp$categ=="all",],aes(x=barrier,y=log10(ta_lmk),col=grp_ind,grp=grp_ind))+geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA)+geom_point(position=position_jitterdodge(0.15),alpha=0.5)+scale_color_manual(values=c("black","red","orange","magenta","cyan2","blue"),name="Focal individual phenotype")+theme(legend.position = "bottom")+ylab("Log relative (arithmetic) mean sojourn time")+ggtitle("Fate of a linked marker")+geom_abline(slope=0,intercept = 0,col="black",linetype=2)
  
  ggplot(assay_grp[assay_grp$categ%in%c("Male","Female"),],aes(x=barrier,y=log10(ta_lmk),col=grp_ind))+geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA)+geom_point(position=position_jitterdodge(0.15),alpha=0.5)+scale_color_manual(values=c("black","red","orange","magenta","cyan2","blue"),name="Focal individual phenotype")+theme(legend.position = "bottom")+ylab("Log relative (arithmetic) mean sojourn time")+ggtitle("Fate of a linked marker")+geom_abline(slope=0,intercept = 0,col="black",linetype=2)+facet_wrap(~categ,ncol=1)
  
  ggplot(assay_grp[assay_grp$categ=="all",],aes(x=barrier,y=log10(ta_fmk),col=grp_ind,grp=grp_ind))+geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA)+geom_point(position=position_jitterdodge(0.15),alpha=0.5)+scale_color_manual(values=c("black","red","orange","magenta","cyan2","blue"),name="Focal individual phenotype")+theme(legend.position = "bottom")+ylab("Log relative (arithmetic) mean sojourn time")+ggtitle("Fate of an unlinked marker")+geom_abline(slope=0,intercept = 0,col="black",linetype=2)
  
  ggplot(assay_grp[assay_grp$categ%in%c("Male","Female"),],aes(x=barrier,y=log10(ta_fmk),col=grp_ind))+geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA)+geom_point(position=position_jitterdodge(0.15),alpha=0.5)+scale_color_manual(values=c("black","red","orange","magenta","cyan2","blue"),name="Focal individual phenotype")+theme(legend.position = "bottom")+ylab("Log relative (arithmetic) mean sojourn time")+ggtitle("Fate of an unlinked marker")+geom_abline(slope=0,intercept = 0,col="black",linetype=2)+facet_wrap(~categ,ncol=1)
  
  
  ggplot(assay_grp[assay_grp$categ=="all",],aes(x=barrier,y=log10(th_lmk),col=grp_ind,grp=grp_ind))+geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA)+geom_point(position=position_jitterdodge(0.15),alpha=0.5)+scale_color_manual(values=c("black","red","orange","magenta","cyan2","blue"),name="Focal individual phenotype")+theme(legend.position = "bottom")+ylab("Log relative (harmonic) mean sojourn time")+ggtitle("Fate of a linked marker")+geom_abline(slope=0,intercept = 0,col="black",linetype=2)
  
  ggplot(assay_grp[assay_grp$categ%in%c("Male","Female"),],aes(x=barrier,y=log10(th_lmk),col=grp_ind))+geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA)+geom_point(position=position_jitterdodge(0.15),alpha=0.5)+scale_color_manual(values=c("black","red","orange","magenta","cyan2","blue"),name="Focal individual phenotype")+theme(legend.position = "bottom")+ylab("Log relative (harmonic) mean sojourn time")+ggtitle("Fate of a linked marker")+geom_abline(slope=0,intercept = 0,col="black",linetype=2)+facet_wrap(~categ,ncol=1)
  
  ggplot(assay_grp[assay_grp$categ=="all",],aes(x=barrier,y=log10(th_fmk),col=grp_ind,grp=grp_ind))+geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA)+geom_point(position=position_jitterdodge(0.15),alpha=0.5)+scale_color_manual(values=c("black","red","orange","magenta","cyan2","blue"),name="Focal individual phenotype")+theme(legend.position = "bottom")+ylab("Log relative (harmonic) mean sojourn time")+ggtitle("Fate of an unlinked marker")+geom_abline(slope=0,intercept = 0,col="black",linetype=2)
  
  ggplot(assay_grp[assay_grp$categ%in%c("Male","Female"),],aes(x=barrier,y=log10(th_fmk),col=grp_ind))+geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA)+geom_point(position=position_jitterdodge(0.15),alpha=0.5)+scale_color_manual(values=c("black","red","orange","magenta","cyan2","blue"),name="Focal individual phenotype")+theme(legend.position = "bottom")+ylab("Log relative (harmonic) mean sojourn time")+ggtitle("Fate of an unlinked marker")+geom_abline(slope=0,intercept = 0,col="black",linetype=2)+facet_wrap(~categ,ncol=1)
  
  
  ggplot(assay_grp[assay_grp$categ=="all",],aes(x=barrier,y=log10(tg_lmk),col=grp_ind,grp=grp_ind))+geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA)+geom_point(position=position_jitterdodge(0.15),alpha=0.5)+scale_color_manual(values=c("black","red","orange","magenta","cyan2","blue"),name="Focal individual phenotype")+theme(legend.position = "bottom")+ylab("Log relative (geometric) mean sojourn time")+ggtitle("Fate of a linked marker")+geom_abline(slope=0,intercept = 0,col="black",linetype=2)
  
  ggplot(assay_grp[assay_grp$categ%in%c("Male","Female"),],aes(x=barrier,y=log10(tg_lmk),col=grp_ind))+geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA)+geom_point(position=position_jitterdodge(0.15),alpha=0.5)+scale_color_manual(values=c("black","red","orange","magenta","cyan2","blue"),name="Focal individual phenotype")+theme(legend.position = "bottom")+ylab("Log relative (geometric) mean sojourn time")+ggtitle("Fate of a linked marker")+geom_abline(slope=0,intercept = 0,col="black",linetype=2)+facet_wrap(~categ,ncol=1)
  
  ggplot(assay_grp[assay_grp$categ=="all",],aes(x=barrier,y=log10(tg_fmk),col=grp_ind,grp=grp_ind))+geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA)+geom_point(position=position_jitterdodge(0.15),alpha=0.5)+scale_color_manual(values=c("black","red","orange","magenta","cyan2","blue"),name="Focal individual phenotype")+theme(legend.position = "bottom")+ylab("Log relative (geometric) mean sojourn time")+ggtitle("Fate of an unlinked marker")+geom_abline(slope=0,intercept = 0,col="black",linetype=2)
  
  ggplot(assay_grp[assay_grp$categ%in%c("Male","Female"),],aes(x=barrier,y=log10(tg_fmk),col=grp_ind))+geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA)+geom_point(position=position_jitterdodge(0.15),alpha=0.5)+scale_color_manual(values=c("black","red","orange","magenta","cyan2","blue"),name="Focal individual phenotype")+theme(legend.position = "bottom")+ylab("Log relative (geometric) mean sojourn time")+ggtitle("Fate of an unlinked marker")+geom_abline(slope=0,intercept = 0,col="black",linetype=2)+facet_wrap(~categ,ncol=1)
  
  #dev.off()
}
```

```{r decomposition as a function of migration, fig.height=12, fig.width=12}
if(hasRawAssayFile){
  #pdf("Figure/decomposition_LC1_details.pdf",width=10,height=8)
  ggplot(assay_grp[assay_grp$categ=="all",],aes(x=barrier,y=log10(ta_lmk),col=grp_ind,grp=grp_ind))+geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA,na.rm = FALSE,position = position_dodge(preserve = 'single'))+theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 0.5, hjust=0.5))+geom_point(position=position_jitterdodge(0.15),alpha=0.5)+scale_color_manual(values=c("black","red","orange","magenta","cyan2","blue"),name="Focal individual phenotype")+theme(legend.position = "bottom")+ylab("Log relative (arithmetic) mean sojourn time")+ggtitle("Fate of a linked marker")+geom_abline(slope=0,intercept = 0,col="black",linetype=2)
  
  ggplot(assay_grp[assay_grp$categ=="all",],aes(x=barrier,y=log10(ta_lmk),col=grp_ind,grp=grp_ind))+geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA,na.rm = FALSE,position = position_dodge(preserve = 'single'))+theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 0.5, hjust=0.5))+geom_point(position=position_jitterdodge(0.15),alpha=0.5)+scale_color_manual(values=c("black","red","orange","magenta","cyan2","blue"),name="Focal individual phenotype")+theme(legend.position = "bottom")+ylab("Log relative (arithmetic) mean sojourn time")+ggtitle("Fate of a linked marker")+geom_abline(slope=0,intercept = 0,col="black",linetype=2)+facet_wrap(~mig,ncol = 2)
  
  ggplot(assay_grp[assay_grp$categ=="all",],aes(x=as.factor(mig),y=log10(ta_lmk),col=grp_ind,grp=grp_ind))+geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA,na.rm = FALSE,position = position_dodge(preserve = 'single'))+theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 0.5, hjust=0.5))+geom_point(position=position_jitterdodge(0.15),alpha=0.5)+scale_color_manual(values=c("black","red","orange","magenta","cyan2","blue"),name="Focal individual phenotype")+theme(legend.position = "bottom")+ylab("Log relative (arithmetic) mean sojourn time")+ggtitle("Fate of a linked marker")+geom_abline(slope=0,intercept = 0,col="black",linetype=2)+facet_wrap(~barrier,ncol = 3)+theme(legend.position = "none")
  
  ggplot(assay_grp[assay_grp$categ=="all",],aes(x=as.factor(mig),y=log10(ta_lmk),col=barrier,grp=barrier))+geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA,na.rm = FALSE,position = position_dodge(preserve = 'single'))+theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 0.5, hjust=0.5))+geom_point(position=position_jitterdodge(0.15),alpha=0.5)+scale_color_manual(values=c("black","red","orange","magenta","cyan2","blue","purple"),name="Focal individual phenotype")+theme(legend.position = "bottom")+ylab("Log relative (arithmetic) mean sojourn time")+ggtitle("Fate of a linked marker")+geom_abline(slope=0,intercept = 0,col="black",linetype=2)+facet_wrap(~grp_ind,ncol = 3)+theme(legend.position = "none")
  
  
  ggplot(assay_grp[assay_grp$categ=="all",],aes(x=as.factor(mig),y=log10(ta_lmk),col=barrier,grp=barrier))+geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA)+  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 0.5, hjust=0.5)) +geom_point(position=position_jitterdodge(0.15),alpha=0.5)+scale_color_manual(values=c("black","red","orange","magenta","cyan2","blue","purple"),name="Focal individual phenotype")+theme(legend.position = "bottom")+ylab("Log relative (arithmetic) mean sojourn time")+ggtitle("Fate of a linked marker")+geom_abline(slope=0,intercept = 0,col="black",linetype=2)+facet_grid(barrier~grp_ind)
  #dev.off()
}
```

## Analysis of the reproductive isolation
Load data for all assays to measure reproductive isolation
```{r load data assay}
if(load_from_raw_file&hasRawAssayFile){
  assay_all=rbind(rep(NA,length(colnames_assay_geom)),rep(NA,length(colnames_assay_geom)))
  colnames(assay_all)=colnames_assay_geom
  assay_all=as.data.frame(assay_all)
  
  for (i in list.files(pattern="assays_",recursive = TRUE)){
    
    assay_all=load_RI_measure_geom(i,assay_all)
    
  }
  
  assay_all=assay_all[-c(1,2),]
  
  assay_all$scenario=as.factor(list_scenario[assay_all$scenario])
  
  
  assay_all$origin=as.factor(list_origin[(assay_all$origin+1)])
  assay_all$barriers=as.factor(list_scenario[assay_all$barriers])
  assay_all$life_cycle=as.factor(list_life_cycle[(assay_all$life_cycle+1)])
  
  assay_all$prop_suc_mat_m1=assay_all$nb_offspring_m1_mean/(assay_all$nb_mating_m1_mean+(1000-assay_all$nb_offspring_m1_mean)*1000)
  assay_all$prop_suc_mat_m2=assay_all$nb_offspring_m2_mean/(assay_all$nb_mating_m2_mean+(1000-assay_all$nb_offspring_m2_mean)*1000)
  assay_all$prop_suc_mat_f1=assay_all$nb_offspring_f1_mean/(assay_all$nb_mating_f1_mean+(1000-assay_all$nb_offspring_f1_mean)*1000)
  assay_all$prop_suc_mat_f2=assay_all$nb_offspring_f2_mean/(assay_all$nb_mating_f2_mean+(1000-assay_all$nb_offspring_f2_mean)*1000)
  
  write.table(assay_all,"summary_assay.csv")
}
```

Load the summary assay file
```{r reload data assay}
assay_all=read.table("summary_assay.csv",header = T)
assay_all$origin=as.factor(assay_all$origin)
assay_all$life_cycle=as.factor(assay_all$life_cycle)
assay_all$scenario=as.factor(assay_all$scenario)
assay_all$barriers=as.factor(assay_all$barriers)
```

## Loss in 1st generation
### Analysis of the sojourn time in the absence of barriers
Select data for the absence of barriers
```{r select neutral data}
assay_temp=assay_all[assay_all$barriers=="neu"&assay_all$ep_FL==2,]
display_constant_assay(assay_temp)
```

Probability of loss of the marker in the 1st generation
```{r distribution of loss of the marker}
#pdf("Figure/Distribution_loss1gen_neutral.pdf",width=6,height=4)
hist(c(assay_temp$ie_fmk_f1,assay_temp$ie_fmk_f2),pch=16,breaks=seq(0,0.2,0.002),xlab = "Probability of loss in the 1st generation",main="Female focal individual - freely recombining marker")
abline(v=(4999/5000)^10000,lty=2,col="red")
hist(c(assay_temp$ie_fmk_m1,assay_temp$ie_fmk_m2),pch=16,breaks=seq(0,0.2,0.002),xlab = "Probability of loss in the 1st generation",main="Male focal individual - freely recombining marker")
abline(v=(4999/5000)^10000,lty=2,col="red")

hist(c(assay_temp$ie_lmk_f1,assay_temp$ie_lmk_f2),pch=16,breaks=seq(0,0.2,0.002),xlab = "Probability of loss in the 1st generation",main="Female focal individual - linked marker")
abline(v=(4999/5000)^10000,lty=2,col="red")
hist(c(assay_temp$ie_lmk_m1,assay_temp$ie_lmk_m2),pch=16,breaks=seq(0,0.2,0.002),xlab = "Probability of loss in the 1st generation",main="Male focal individual - linked marker")
abline(v=(4999/5000)^10000,lty=2,col="red")
#dev.off()
```

### Analysis of the default case
#### With only ecological differentiation
Subset data for the case with only ecological differentiation

```{r select data only LA}
assay_temp=assay_all[assay_all$barriers=="LA"&assay_all$ep_FL==2&assay_all$fit_alt==0.1&assay_all$ep_dmi==0.1&assay_all$nb_dmi==50&assay_all$initial_cost==100,]
display_constant_assay(assay_temp)
```

Display probability of loss of the marker in the 1st generation with only ecological differentiation 
```{r loss of the marker in 1st generation LA}
#pdf("Figure/Distribution_loss_1gen_LABarrier.pdf",width=8,height=6)
assay_temp2=assay_temp[,c("mig_rate","life_cycle","ie_fmk_f1")]
assay_temp3=assay_temp[,c("mig_rate","life_cycle","ie_fmk_f2")]
assay_temp4=assay_temp[,c("mig_rate","life_cycle","ie_fmk_m1")]
assay_temp5=assay_temp[,c("mig_rate","life_cycle","ie_fmk_m2")]
colnames(assay_temp2)=c("mig_rate","life_cycle","ie_fmk")
colnames(assay_temp3)=c("mig_rate","life_cycle","ie_fmk")
colnames(assay_temp4)=c("mig_rate","life_cycle","ie_fmk")
colnames(assay_temp5)=c("mig_rate","life_cycle","ie_fmk")
assay_temp2$life_cycle=as.character(assay_temp2$life_cycle)
assay_temp2$life_cycle[assay_temp2$life_cycle=="mig-sel"]="juvenile dispersal\n - female"
assay_temp2$life_cycle[assay_temp2$life_cycle=="sel-mig"]="adult dispersal\n - female"
assay_temp3$life_cycle=as.character(assay_temp3$life_cycle)
assay_temp3$life_cycle[assay_temp3$life_cycle=="mig-sel"]="juvenile dispersal\n - female"
assay_temp3$life_cycle[assay_temp3$life_cycle=="sel-mig"]="adult dispersal\n - female"
assay_temp4$life_cycle=as.character(assay_temp4$life_cycle)
assay_temp4$life_cycle[assay_temp4$life_cycle=="mig-sel"]="juvenile dispersal\n - male"
assay_temp4$life_cycle[assay_temp4$life_cycle=="sel-mig"]="adult dispersal\n - male"
assay_temp5$life_cycle=as.character(assay_temp5$life_cycle)
assay_temp5$life_cycle[assay_temp5$life_cycle=="mig-sel"]="juvenile dispersal\n - male"
assay_temp5$life_cycle[assay_temp5$life_cycle=="sel-mig"]="adult dispersal\n - male"

assay_temp2=rbind(assay_temp2,assay_temp3)
assay_temp2=rbind(assay_temp2,assay_temp4)
assay_temp2=rbind(assay_temp2,assay_temp5)

assay_temp2$life_cycle=as.factor(assay_temp2$life_cycle)

ggplot(assay_temp2,aes(x=ie_fmk))+geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.02)+facet_grid(life_cycle~mig_rate)+geom_vline(xintercept = (4999/5000)^10000,col="red")+xlab("Probability of the focal individual to leave no descendants in the 1st generation")
#dev.off()
```

#### With only mate choice
Subset data barrier is in only mate choice
```{r select data only MC}
assay_temp=assay_all[assay_all$barriers=="MC"&assay_all$ep_FL==2&assay_all$fit_alt==0.1&assay_all$ep_dmi==0.1&assay_all$nb_dmi==50&assay_all$initial_cost==100,]
display_constant_assay(assay_temp)
```

Display distribution of the loss of marker in the first generation with only mate choice
```{r distribution of the loss of the marker in the 1st generation with only mate choice}
#pdf("Figure/Distribution_loss_1gen_MCBarrier.pdf",width=8,height=6)
assay_temp2=assay_temp[,c("mig_rate","life_cycle","ie_fmk_f1")]
assay_temp3=assay_temp[,c("mig_rate","life_cycle","ie_fmk_f2")]
assay_temp4=assay_temp[,c("mig_rate","life_cycle","ie_fmk_m1")]
assay_temp5=assay_temp[,c("mig_rate","life_cycle","ie_fmk_m2")]
colnames(assay_temp2)=c("mig_rate","life_cycle","ie_fmk")
colnames(assay_temp3)=c("mig_rate","life_cycle","ie_fmk")
colnames(assay_temp4)=c("mig_rate","life_cycle","ie_fmk")
colnames(assay_temp5)=c("mig_rate","life_cycle","ie_fmk")
assay_temp2$life_cycle=as.character(assay_temp2$life_cycle)
assay_temp2$life_cycle[assay_temp2$life_cycle=="mig-sel"]="juvenile dispersal\n - female"
assay_temp2$life_cycle[assay_temp2$life_cycle=="sel-mig"]="adult dispersal\n - female"
assay_temp3$life_cycle=as.character(assay_temp3$life_cycle)
assay_temp3$life_cycle[assay_temp3$life_cycle=="mig-sel"]="juvenile dispersal\n - female"
assay_temp3$life_cycle[assay_temp3$life_cycle=="sel-mig"]="adult dispersal\n - female"
assay_temp4$life_cycle=as.character(assay_temp4$life_cycle)
assay_temp4$life_cycle[assay_temp4$life_cycle=="mig-sel"]="juvenile dispersal\n - male"
assay_temp4$life_cycle[assay_temp4$life_cycle=="sel-mig"]="adult dispersal\n - male"
assay_temp5$life_cycle=as.character(assay_temp5$life_cycle)
assay_temp5$life_cycle[assay_temp5$life_cycle=="mig-sel"]="juvenile dispersal\n - male"
assay_temp5$life_cycle[assay_temp5$life_cycle=="sel-mig"]="adult dispersal\n - male"

assay_temp2=rbind(assay_temp2,assay_temp3)
assay_temp2=rbind(assay_temp2,assay_temp4)
assay_temp2=rbind(assay_temp2,assay_temp5)

assay_temp2$life_cycle=as.factor(assay_temp2$life_cycle)

ggplot(assay_temp2,aes(x=ie_fmk))+geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.02)+facet_grid(life_cycle~mig_rate)+geom_vline(xintercept = (4999/5000)^10000,col="red")+xlab("Probability of the focal individual to leave no descendants in the 1st generation")
#dev.off()
```

#### with all 3 barriers
Subset data when all barriers are active
```{r load data with all barriers}
assay_temp=assay_all[assay_all$barriers=="all"&assay_all$ep_FL==2&assay_all$fit_alt==0.1&assay_all$ep_dmi==0.1&assay_all$nb_dmi==50&assay_all$initial_cost==100,]
display_constant_assay(assay_temp)
```

Distribution of the loss of the marker in the 1st generation when all barriers are active
```{r distribution loss of the maker 1st generation with all barriers}
#pdf("Figure/Distribution_loss_1gen_allBarrier.pdf",width=8,height=6)
assay_temp2=assay_temp[,c("mig_rate","life_cycle","ie_fmk_f1")]
assay_temp3=assay_temp[,c("mig_rate","life_cycle","ie_fmk_f2")]
assay_temp4=assay_temp[,c("mig_rate","life_cycle","ie_fmk_m1")]
assay_temp5=assay_temp[,c("mig_rate","life_cycle","ie_fmk_m2")]
colnames(assay_temp2)=c("mig_rate","life_cycle","ie_fmk")
colnames(assay_temp3)=c("mig_rate","life_cycle","ie_fmk")
colnames(assay_temp4)=c("mig_rate","life_cycle","ie_fmk")
colnames(assay_temp5)=c("mig_rate","life_cycle","ie_fmk")
assay_temp2$life_cycle=as.character(assay_temp2$life_cycle)
assay_temp2$life_cycle[assay_temp2$life_cycle=="mig-sel"]="juvenile dispersal\n - female"
assay_temp2$life_cycle[assay_temp2$life_cycle=="sel-mig"]="adult dispersal\n - female"
assay_temp3$life_cycle=as.character(assay_temp3$life_cycle)
assay_temp3$life_cycle[assay_temp3$life_cycle=="mig-sel"]="juvenile dispersal\n - female"
assay_temp3$life_cycle[assay_temp3$life_cycle=="sel-mig"]="adult dispersal\n - female"
assay_temp4$life_cycle=as.character(assay_temp4$life_cycle)
assay_temp4$life_cycle[assay_temp4$life_cycle=="mig-sel"]="juvenile dispersal\n - male"
assay_temp4$life_cycle[assay_temp4$life_cycle=="sel-mig"]="adult dispersal\n - male"
assay_temp5$life_cycle=as.character(assay_temp5$life_cycle)
assay_temp5$life_cycle[assay_temp5$life_cycle=="mig-sel"]="juvenile dispersal\n - male"
assay_temp5$life_cycle[assay_temp5$life_cycle=="sel-mig"]="adult dispersal\n - male"

assay_temp2=rbind(assay_temp2,assay_temp3)
assay_temp2=rbind(assay_temp2,assay_temp4)
assay_temp2=rbind(assay_temp2,assay_temp5)

assay_temp2$life_cycle=as.factor(assay_temp2$life_cycle)

ggplot(assay_temp2,aes(x=ie_fmk))+geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.02)+facet_grid(life_cycle~mig_rate)+geom_vline(xintercept = (4999/5000)^10000,col="red")+xlab("Probability of the focal individual to leave no descendants in the 1st generation")
#dev.off()
```

### Secondary Contact Divergent Case
Subset data for a case of secondary contact
```{r select data for secondary contact}
assay_temp=assay_all[assay_all$origin=="Specific_barrier_strength"&assay_all$barriers=="all"&assay_all$ep_dmi_eval %in% c(0.0138,0.045,0.088)&assay_all$fit_alt_eval==assay_all$fit_alt,]
display_constant_assay(assay_temp)
```


```{r distribution of the loss of the allele in the 1st generation}
assay_temp2=assay_temp[,c("fit_alt","life_cycle","ie_fmk_f1")]
assay_temp3=assay_temp[,c("fit_alt","life_cycle","ie_fmk_f2")]
assay_temp4=assay_temp[,c("fit_alt","life_cycle","ie_fmk_m1")]
assay_temp5=assay_temp[,c("fit_alt","life_cycle","ie_fmk_m2")]
colnames(assay_temp2)=c("fit_alt","life_cycle","ie_fmk")
colnames(assay_temp3)=c("fit_alt","life_cycle","ie_fmk")
colnames(assay_temp4)=c("fit_alt","life_cycle","ie_fmk")
colnames(assay_temp5)=c("fit_alt","life_cycle","ie_fmk")
assay_temp2$life_cycle=as.character(assay_temp2$life_cycle)
assay_temp2$life_cycle[assay_temp2$life_cycle=="mig-sel"]="juvenile dispersal - female"
assay_temp2$life_cycle[assay_temp2$life_cycle=="sel-mig"]="adult dispersal - female"
assay_temp3$life_cycle=as.character(assay_temp3$life_cycle)
assay_temp3$life_cycle[assay_temp3$life_cycle=="mig-sel"]="juvenile dispersal - female"
assay_temp3$life_cycle[assay_temp3$life_cycle=="sel-mig"]="adult dispersal - female"
assay_temp4$life_cycle=as.character(assay_temp4$life_cycle)
assay_temp4$life_cycle[assay_temp4$life_cycle=="mig-sel"]="juvenile dispersal - male"
assay_temp4$life_cycle[assay_temp4$life_cycle=="sel-mig"]="adult dispersal - male"
assay_temp5$life_cycle=as.character(assay_temp5$life_cycle)
assay_temp5$life_cycle[assay_temp5$life_cycle=="mig-sel"]="juvenile dispersal - male"
assay_temp5$life_cycle[assay_temp5$life_cycle=="sel-mig"]="adult dispersal - male"

assay_temp2=rbind(assay_temp2,assay_temp3)
assay_temp2=rbind(assay_temp2,assay_temp4)
assay_temp2=rbind(assay_temp2,assay_temp5)

assay_temp2$life_cycle=as.factor(assay_temp2$life_cycle)


assay_temp5=assay_temp2[assay_temp2$fit_alt==0.01&assay_temp2$life_cycle %in% c("juvenile dispersal - male","juvenile dispersal - female"),]
assay_temp5$rep=rep(seq(20),2)
ggplot(assay_temp5,aes(x=ie_fmk))+geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.02)+facet_wrap(~life_cycle,ncol = 1)+geom_vline(data=subset(assay_temp5,life_cycle=="juvenile dispersal - male"),aes(xintercept = (4999/((1-0.01)*(1-(1-0.01)^100)+4999))^10000),col="purple",lty=2)+geom_vline(data=subset(assay_temp5,life_cycle=="juvenile dispersal - female"),aes(xintercept = (4999/((1-0.01)*(1-(1-0.01)^1)+4999))^10000),col="purple")+xlab("Probability of the focal individual to leave no descendants in the 1st generation")+xlim(0,1.02)+ylim(0,20)

ggplot(assay_temp5,aes(x=rep,y=ie_fmk))+geom_point()+facet_wrap(~life_cycle,ncol = 1)+geom_hline(data=subset(assay_temp5,life_cycle=="juvenile dispersal - male"),aes(yintercept = (4999/((0.01)*(1-(1-0.01)^100)+4999))^10000),col="purple",lty=2)+geom_hline(data=subset(assay_temp5,life_cycle=="juvenile dispersal - female"),aes(yintercept = (4999/((0.01)*(1-(1-0.01)^1)+4999))^10000),col="purple")+ylab("Probability of the focal individual\n to leave no descendants in the 1st generation")+ylim(0,1.02)

```


## Neutral case
Analysis of the variance between replicates of the case without genetic barriers
Subset the data to only keep neutral cases and edit the data set for convenience
```{r checking variance in neutral barriers case}
assay_temp=assay_all[assay_all$barriers=="neu"&assay_all$ep_FL==2,]
display_constant_assay(assay_temp)
assay_all_neu=c()
assay_neu=assay_temp[,c("mig_rate","rep","t_loss_lmk_m1","t_loss_fmk_m1","t_q95_loss_lmk_m1","t_q95_loss_fmk_m1","t_med_loss_lmk_m1","t_med_loss_fmk_m1","th_loss_lmk_m1","th_loss_fmk_m1","tg_loss_lmk_m1","tg_loss_fmk_m1")]
assay_neu$focal_pop=1
assay_neu$sex="m"
colnames(assay_neu)=c("mig_rate","rep","t_loss_linked","t_loss_free","t_q95_loss_linked","t_q95_loss_free","t_med_loss_linked","t_med_loss_free","th_loss_linked","th_loss_free","tg_loss_linked","tg_loss_free","focal_pop","sex")
assay_all_neu=rbind(assay_all_neu,assay_neu)
assay_neu=assay_temp[assay_temp$barriers=="neu",c("mig_rate","rep","t_loss_lmk_m2","t_loss_fmk_m2","t_q95_loss_lmk_m2","t_q95_loss_fmk_m2","t_med_loss_lmk_m2","t_med_loss_fmk_m2","th_loss_lmk_m2","th_loss_fmk_m2","tg_loss_lmk_m2","tg_loss_fmk_m2")]
assay_neu$focal_pop=2
assay_neu$sex="m"
colnames(assay_neu)=c("mig_rate","rep","t_loss_linked","t_loss_free","t_q95_loss_linked","t_q95_loss_free","t_med_loss_linked","t_med_loss_free","th_loss_linked","th_loss_free","tg_loss_linked","tg_loss_free","focal_pop","sex")
assay_all_neu=rbind(assay_all_neu,assay_neu)
assay_neu=assay_temp[assay_temp$barriers=="neu",c("mig_rate","rep","t_loss_lmk_f2","t_loss_fmk_f2","t_q95_loss_lmk_f2","t_q95_loss_fmk_f2","t_med_loss_lmk_f2","t_med_loss_fmk_f2","th_loss_lmk_f2","th_loss_fmk_f2","tg_loss_lmk_f2","tg_loss_fmk_f2")]
assay_neu$focal_pop=2
assay_neu$sex="f"
colnames(assay_neu)=c("mig_rate","rep","t_loss_linked","t_loss_free","t_q95_loss_linked","t_q95_loss_free","t_med_loss_linked","t_med_loss_free","th_loss_linked","th_loss_free","tg_loss_linked","tg_loss_free","focal_pop","sex")
assay_all_neu=rbind(assay_all_neu,assay_neu)
assay_neu=assay_temp[assay_temp$barriers=="neu",c("mig_rate","rep","t_loss_lmk_f1","t_loss_fmk_f1","t_q95_loss_lmk_f1","t_q95_loss_fmk_f1","t_med_loss_lmk_f1","t_med_loss_fmk_f1","th_loss_lmk_f1","th_loss_fmk_f1","tg_loss_lmk_f1","tg_loss_fmk_f1")]
assay_neu$focal_pop=1
assay_neu$sex="f"
colnames(assay_neu)=c("mig_rate","rep","t_loss_linked","t_loss_free","t_q95_loss_linked","t_q95_loss_free","t_med_loss_linked","t_med_loss_free","th_loss_linked","th_loss_free","tg_loss_linked","tg_loss_free","focal_pop","sex")
assay_all_neu=rbind(assay_all_neu,assay_neu)

assay_all_neu_L=assay_all_neu[c(1,2,3,5,7,9,11,13,14)]
assay_all_neu_F=assay_all_neu[c(1,2,4,6,8,10,12,13,14)]
assay_all_neu_L$link="linked"
assay_all_neu_F$link="free"
colnames(assay_all_neu_L)=colnames(assay_all_neu_F)
assay_all_neu=rbind(assay_all_neu_L,assay_all_neu_F)
```


Compute mean and (standardized) variance between the mean estimates of each replicate for all three Euclidian means for the free and linked markers. This is for the case without any barrier.
```{r compute mean and standardized variance}
record_varA=c()
record_varG=c()
record_varH=c()


for (i in c("f","m")){
  for ( j in c(0,0.00005,0.0005,0.005,0.05,0.2)){
    v=assay_all_neu$t_loss_free[assay_all_neu$mig_rate==j&assay_all_neu$sex==i&assay_all_neu$link=="free"]    
    w=assay_all_neu$t_loss_free[assay_all_neu$mig_rate==j&assay_all_neu$sex==i&assay_all_neu$link=="linked"]    
    record_varA=rbind(record_varA,c(i,j,mean(v),var(v/mean(v)),mean(w),var(w/mean(w))))
    
    v=assay_all_neu$tg_loss_free[assay_all_neu$mig_rate==j&assay_all_neu$sex==i&assay_all_neu$link=="free"]    
    w=assay_all_neu$tg_loss_free[assay_all_neu$mig_rate==j&assay_all_neu$sex==i&assay_all_neu$link=="linked"]
    record_varG=rbind(record_varG,c(i,j,exp(sum(1000*log(v))/sum(1000*length(v))),var(v/(exp(sum(1000*log(v))/sum(1000*length(v))))),exp(sum(1000*log(w))/sum(1000*length(w))),var(w/(exp(sum(1000*log(w))/sum(1000*length(w)))))))
    v=assay_all_neu$th_loss_free[assay_all_neu$mig_rate==j&assay_all_neu$sex==i&assay_all_neu$link=="free"]    
    w=assay_all_neu$th_loss_free[assay_all_neu$mig_rate==j&assay_all_neu$sex==i&assay_all_neu$link=="linked"]
    record_varH=rbind(record_varH,c(i,j,(sum(1000*length(v))/sum(1000/v)),var(v/((sum(1000*length(v))/sum(1000/v)))),(sum(1000*length(w))/sum(1000/w)),var(w/((sum(1000*length(w))/sum(1000/w))))))
    
  }
}
v=assay_all_neu$t_loss_free[assay_all_neu$link=="free"]    
w=assay_all_neu$t_loss_free[assay_all_neu$link=="linked"]    
print(paste(c("Arithmetic mean:","Mean free marker",mean(v),"Variance standardized mean free marker",var(v/mean(v)),"Mean linked marker",mean(w),"Variance standardized mean linked marker",var(w/mean(w))),collapse=" "))

v=assay_all_neu$tg_loss_free[assay_all_neu$link=="free"]    
w=assay_all_neu$tg_loss_free[assay_all_neu$link=="linked"]
print(paste(c("Geometric mean:","Mean free marker",exp(sum(1000*log(v))/sum(1000*length(v))),"Variance standardized mean free marker",var(v/(exp(sum(1000*log(v))/sum(1000*length(v))))),"Mean linked marker",exp(sum(1000*log(w))/sum(1000*length(w))),"Variance standardized mean linked marker",var(w/(exp(sum(1000*log(w))/sum(1000*length(w)))))),collapse=" "))
v=assay_all_neu$th_loss_free[assay_all_neu$link=="free"]    
w=assay_all_neu$th_loss_free[assay_all_neu$link=="linked"]
print(paste(c("Harmonic mean:","Mean free marker",sum(1000*length(v))/sum(1000/v),"Variance standardized mean free marker",var(v/((sum(1000*length(v))/sum(1000/v)))),"Mean linked marker",(sum(1000*length(w))/sum(1000/w)),"Variance standardized mean linked marker",var(w/((sum(1000*length(w))/sum(1000/w))))),collapse=" "))

```


Variation sojourn time 
```{r display sojourn time distribution with different mean}
#pdf("Figure/sojourn_time_variation.pdf",width=8,height=6)
ggplot(assay_all_neu,aes(x=as.factor(mig_rate),y=t_loss_free,fill=paste(sex,link),col=paste(sex,link)))+geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA)+theme(legend.position = "none")+geom_point(position=position_jitterdodge(0.1),alpha=0.2)+ylab("Arithmetic mean sojourn time")+xlab("Migration rate")+scale_fill_manual(values=c("blue","red","black","black"))+scale_color_manual(values=c("black","black","blue","red"))
ggplot(assay_all_neu,aes(x=as.factor(mig_rate),y=th_loss_free,fill=paste(sex,link),col=paste(sex,link)))+geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA)+theme(legend.position = "none")+geom_point(position=position_jitterdodge(0.1),alpha=0.2)+ylab("Harmonic mean sojourn time")+xlab("Migration rate")+scale_fill_manual(values=c("blue","red","black","black"))+scale_color_manual(values=c("black","black","blue","red"))
ggplot(assay_all_neu,aes(x=as.factor(mig_rate),y=tg_loss_free,fill=paste(sex,link),col=paste(sex,link)))+geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA)+theme(legend.position = "none")+geom_point(position=position_jitterdodge(0.1),alpha=0.2)+ylab("Geometric mean sojourn time")+xlab("Migration rate")+scale_fill_manual(values=c("blue","red","black","black"))+scale_color_manual(values=c("black","black","blue","red"))
ggplot(assay_all_neu,aes(x=as.factor(mig_rate),y=t_med_loss_free,fill=paste(sex,link),col=paste(sex,link)))+geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA)+theme(legend.position = "none")+geom_point(position=position_jitterdodge(0.1),alpha=0.2)+ylab("Median sojourn time")+xlab("Migration rate")+scale_fill_manual(values=c("blue","red","black","black"))+scale_color_manual(values=c("black","black","blue","red"))
ggplot(assay_all_neu,aes(x=as.factor(mig_rate),y=t_q95_loss_free,fill=paste(sex,link),col=paste(sex,link)))+geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA)+theme(legend.position = "none")+geom_point(position=position_jitterdodge(0.1),alpha=0.2)+ylab("95th quantile mean sojourn time")+xlab("Migration rate")+scale_fill_manual(values=c("blue","red","black","black"))+scale_color_manual(values=c("black","black","blue","red"))


plot(record_varA[,4],ylim=c(0.0001,0.3),log="y",pch=16,col="blue",ylab="Variance between relative mean sojourn time",xlab="")
points(record_varG[,4],pch=16,col="red")
points(record_varH[,4],pch=16,col="cyan")

points(record_varA[,6],pch=8,col="blue")
points(record_varG[,6],pch=8,col="red")
points(record_varH[,6],pch=8,col="cyan")
legend("bottomleft",legend=c("Linked","Unlinked"),col=c("black","black"),pch=c(8,16),horiz=TRUE)
legend("bottomright",legend=c("Arithmetric","Harmonic","Geometric"),col=c("blue","cyan","red"),pch=c(15,15,15),horiz=TRUE)


ggplot(assay_all_neu,aes(x=as.factor(mig_rate),y=t_loss_free,fill=paste(sex,link),col=paste(sex,link)))+geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA)+theme(legend.position = "bottom")+geom_point(position=position_jitterdodge(0.1),alpha=0.2)+ylab("Arithmetic mean sojourn time")+xlab("Migration rate")+scale_fill_manual(values=c("blue","red","black","black"))+scale_color_manual(values=c("black","black","blue","red"))
#dev.off()
```

##  Compute relative time
### Juvenile dispersal
Subset data to keep the juvenile dispersal and compute relative sojourn time
```{r compute relative mean time juvenile dispersal}
assay_temp=assay_all[(assay_all$ep_FL==2&assay_all$initial_cost==100&assay_all$initial_pref==1&assay_all$origin=="Ancestral"&assay_all$nb_trials==1000&assay_all$nb_dmi==50&assay_all$life_cycle=="mig-sel"),]
display_constant_assay(assay_temp)

assay_all_temp=compute_relative_mean_sojourn_time(assay_temp,var = "mig_rate")
```

Display sojourn time absolute values Figure S18B
```{r display sojourn time absolute value juv-dis}
assay_temp_mixed=assay_temp[,c("rep","mig_rate","barriers","t_loss_fmk_m1")]
colnames(assay_temp_mixed)[4]="t_loss"
assay_temp_mixed1=assay_temp[,c("rep","mig_rate","barriers","t_loss_fmk_m2")]
assay_temp_mixed1$rep=assay_temp_mixed1$rep+10
colnames(assay_temp_mixed1)[4]="t_loss"
assay_temp_mixed=rbind(assay_temp_mixed,assay_temp_mixed1)
assay_temp_mixed$sex="M"
assay_temp_mixed1=assay_temp[,c("rep","mig_rate","barriers","t_loss_fmk_f1")]
colnames(assay_temp_mixed1)[4]="t_loss"
assay_temp_mixed1$sex="F"
assay_temp_mixed=rbind(assay_temp_mixed,assay_temp_mixed1)
assay_temp_mixed1=assay_temp[,c("rep","mig_rate","barriers","t_loss_fmk_f2")]
colnames(assay_temp_mixed1)[4]="t_loss"
assay_temp_mixed1$rep=assay_temp_mixed1$rep+10
assay_temp_mixed1$sex="F"
assay_temp_mixed=rbind(assay_temp_mixed,assay_temp_mixed1)

assay_temp_mixed$barriers=factor(as.character(assay_temp_mixed$barriers),levels=c("neu","LA","MC","DMI","LA+MC","LA+DMI","MC+DMI","all"))
assay_temp_mixed$mig_rate=paste("m =",assay_temp_mixed$mig_rate)
assay_temp_mixed$mig_rate=factor(assay_temp_mixed$mig_rate,levels=c("m = 0","m = 5e-05","m = 5e-04","m = 0.005",  "m = 0.05",   "m = 0.2"))
#pdf("Figure/absolute_time_juv-dis.pdf",width=8,height=6)
ggplot(assay_temp_mixed, aes(x=barriers,y=t_loss,col=sex, fill=sex,grp=sex))+geom_boxplot()+facet_wrap(~mig_rate)+theme_bw()+theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 0.5, hjust=0.5))+scale_fill_manual(values = c("purple","orange"))+scale_colour_manual(values = c("purple4","darkorange4"))+xlab("Genetic barriers")+ylab("Mean sojourn time")+coord_cartesian(ylim=c(0,50))+geom_abline(intercept = 2,slope=0)
#dev.off()
```

Figure S20
```{r}
assay_temp_mixed=assay_temp[,c("rep","mig_rate","barriers","pheno_par_m1","hyb_fit_m1_mean","pref_par_m1","t_loss_fmk_m1")]
colnames(assay_temp_mixed)[4:7]=c("pheno_foc","f1_fit","pref_par","t_loss")
assay_temp_mixed$pop=5
assay_temp_mixed1=assay_temp[,c("rep","mig_rate","barriers","pheno_par_m2","hyb_fit_m2_mean","pref_par_m2","t_loss_fmk_m2")]
assay_temp_mixed1$rep=assay_temp_mixed1$rep
assay_temp_mixed1$pop=-5
colnames(assay_temp_mixed1)[4:7]=c("pheno_foc","f1_fit","pref_par","t_loss")
assay_temp_mixed=rbind(assay_temp_mixed,assay_temp_mixed1)
assay_temp_mixed$sex="Male"
assay_temp_mixed1=assay_temp[,c("rep","mig_rate","barriers","pheno_par_f1","hyb_fit_f1_mean","pref_par_f1","t_loss_fmk_f1")]
colnames(assay_temp_mixed1)[4:7]=c("pheno_foc","f1_fit","pref_par","t_loss")
assay_temp_mixed1$sex="Female"
assay_temp_mixed1$pop=5
assay_temp_mixed=rbind(assay_temp_mixed,assay_temp_mixed1)
assay_temp_mixed1=assay_temp[,c("rep","mig_rate","barriers","pheno_par_f2","hyb_fit_f2_mean","pref_par_f2","t_loss_fmk_f2")]
colnames(assay_temp_mixed1)[4:7]=c("pheno_foc","f1_fit","pref_par","t_loss")
assay_temp_mixed1$rep=assay_temp_mixed1$rep+10
assay_temp_mixed1$sex="Female"
assay_temp_mixed1$pop=-5
assay_temp_mixed=rbind(assay_temp_mixed,assay_temp_mixed1)

assay_temp_mixed$barriers=factor(as.character(assay_temp_mixed$barriers),levels=c("neu","LA","MC","DMI","LA+MC","LA+DMI","MC+DMI","all"))
assay_temp_mixed$mig_rate=paste("m =",assay_temp_mixed$mig_rate)
assay_temp_mixed$mig_rate=factor(assay_temp_mixed$mig_rate,levels=c("m = 0","m = 5e-05","m = 5e-04","m = 0.005",  "m = 0.05",   "m = 0.2"))

#pdf("Figure/details_sojournt_itme_juv_dis.pdf",width=6,height=4.5)


ggplot(assay_temp_mixed[assay_temp_mixed$barriers=="LA",],aes(x=abs(pheno_foc-pop),y=t_loss,col=mig_rate))+geom_point()+facet_grid(~sex)+ylab("Mean sojourn time")+xlab("Mean distance of the focal individual to the optimum")+labs(colour = "Migration rate")+theme_bw()+theme(legend.position = "none")+ expand_limits(y = 0)
ggplot(assay_temp_mixed[assay_temp_mixed$barriers=="DMI",],aes(x=f1_fit,y=t_loss,col=mig_rate))+geom_point()+facet_grid(~sex)+ylab("Mean sojourn time")+xlab("Mean intrinsic fitness of F1 hybrid")+labs(colour = "Migration rate")+theme(legend.position = "none")+theme_bw()+theme(legend.position = "none")+ expand_limits(y = 0)
ggplot(assay_temp_mixed[assay_temp_mixed$barriers=="MC",],aes(x=log10(pref_par),y=t_loss,col=mig_rate))+geom_point()+facet_grid(~sex)+ylab("Mean sojourn time")+xlab("log10 Mean choosiness")+labs(colour = "Migration rate")+theme_bw()+theme(legend.position = "none") + expand_limits(y = 0)
ggplot(assay_temp_mixed[assay_temp_mixed$barriers=="neu",],aes(x=mig_rate,y=t_loss,col=mig_rate))+geom_jitter()+facet_grid(~sex)+ylab("Mean sojourn time")+xlab("Mean distance of the focal individual to the optimum")+labs(colour = "Migration rate")+theme_bw()+theme(legend.position = c(0.45,.1),legend.background = element_rect(fill=alpha("gray",0.3)))+ expand_limits(y = 0)+guides(colour = guide_legend(nrow = 1))

ggplot(assay_temp_mixed[assay_temp_mixed$barriers%in% c("neu","LA","LA+DMI","LA+MC","all"),],aes(x=abs(pheno_foc-pop),y=t_loss,col=mig_rate))+geom_point()+facet_grid(sex~barriers)+ylab("Mean sojourn time")+xlab("Distance of the focal individual to the optimum")+theme(legend.position = "none")

ggplot(assay_temp_mixed[assay_temp_mixed$barriers%in% c("MC","MC+DMI","LA+MC","all"),],aes(x=log10(pref_par),y=t_loss,col=mig_rate))+geom_point()+facet_grid(sex~barriers)+ylab("Mean sojourn time")+xlab("log10 choosiness")+theme(legend.position = "none")

ggplot(assay_temp_mixed[assay_temp_mixed$barriers%in% c("DMI","LA+DMI","MC+DMI","all"),],aes(x=f1_fit,y=t_loss,col=mig_rate))+geom_point()+facet_grid(sex~barriers)+ylab("Mean sojourn time")+xlab("Mean intrinsic fitness of F1 hybrid")+theme(legend.position = "none")
#dev.off()
```


```{r}

ggplot(assay_all_temp,aes(x=hyb_fit,y=t_loss_free))+geom_point(col=alpha("blue",0.2))+facet_wrap(~barriers)+geom_smooth()
ggplot(assay_all_temp,aes(x=eco_fit,y=t_loss_free))+geom_point(col=alpha("blue",0.2))+facet_wrap(~barriers)
ggplot(assay_all_temp,aes(x=nb_offspring/nb_mating ,y=t_loss_free))+geom_point(col=alpha("blue",0.2))+facet_wrap(~barriers)


ggplot(assay_all_temp,aes(x=hyb_fit,y=t_loss_free))+geom_point(col=alpha("blue",0.2))+facet_grid(mig_rate~barriers)
ggplot(assay_all_temp,aes(x=eco_fit,y=t_loss_free))+geom_point(col=alpha("blue",0.2))+facet_grid(mig_rate~barriers)
ggplot(assay_all_temp,aes(x=nb_offspring/nb_mating ,y=t_loss_free))+geom_point(col=alpha("blue",0.2))+facet_grid(mig_rate~barriers)

ggplot(assay_all_temp[assay_all_temp$mig_rate==0.2,],aes(x=hyb_fit,y=t_loss_free))+geom_point(col=alpha("blue",0.2))+facet_wrap(~barriers)+coord_cartesian(ylim=c(0,2))
ggplot(assay_all_temp[assay_all_temp$mig_rate==0,],aes(x=hyb_fit,y=t_loss_free))+geom_point(col=alpha("blue",0.2))+facet_wrap(~barriers)+coord_cartesian(ylim=c(0,2))+geom_smooth()
ggplot(assay_all_temp[assay_all_temp$mig_rate==0.2,],aes(x=eco_fit,y=t_loss_free))+geom_point(col=alpha("blue",0.2))+facet_wrap(~barriers)+geom_smooth()+coord_cartesian(ylim=c(0,2))
ggplot(assay_all_temp[assay_all_temp$mig_rate==0.2,],aes(x=nb_offspring/nb_mating ,y=t_loss_free))+geom_point(col=alpha("blue",0.2))+facet_wrap(~barriers)


```

Display decomposition by barrier for the arithmetic mean 
```{r figure relative time arithmetic mean}
assay_all_temp$mig_rate=paste("m =",assay_all_temp$mig_rate)
assay_all_temp$mig_rate=factor(assay_all_temp$mig_rate,levels=c("m = 0","m = 5e-05","m = 5e-04","m = 0.005",  "m = 0.05",   "m = 0.2"))
#pdf("Figure/relative_time_mig-sel.pdf",width=8,height=6)
do_plot_decomposition_migpanel(assay_all_temp,"arith")
#dev.off()
```

```{r figure relative time harmonic mean}
do_plot_decomposition_migpanel(assay_all_temp,"harm")
```

```{r figure relative time geometric mean}
do_plot_decomposition_migpanel(assay_all_temp,"geom")
```


### Adult dispersal
Subset data to keep the adult dispersal and compute relative sojourn time
```{r compute relative mean time ad-dis}
assay_temp=assay_all[(assay_all$ep_FL==2&assay_all$initial_cost==100&assay_all$initial_pref==1&assay_all$origin=="Ancestral"&assay_all$nb_trials==1000&assay_all$nb_dmi==50&assay_all$life_cycle=="sel-mig"),]
display_constant_assay(assay_temp)

assay_all_temp=compute_relative_mean_sojourn_time(assay_temp,var = "mig_rate")
```

Display sojourn time absolute values for adult dispersal Figure S18A
```{r display sojourn time absolute value ad-dis}
assay_temp_mixed=assay_temp[,c("rep","mig_rate","barriers","t_loss_fmk_m1")]
colnames(assay_temp_mixed)[4]="t_loss"
assay_temp_mixed1=assay_temp[,c("rep","mig_rate","barriers","t_loss_fmk_m2")]
assay_temp_mixed1$rep=assay_temp_mixed1$rep+10
colnames(assay_temp_mixed1)[4]="t_loss"
assay_temp_mixed=rbind(assay_temp_mixed,assay_temp_mixed1)
assay_temp_mixed$sex="M"
assay_temp_mixed1=assay_temp[,c("rep","mig_rate","barriers","t_loss_fmk_f1")]
colnames(assay_temp_mixed1)[4]="t_loss"
assay_temp_mixed1$sex="F"
assay_temp_mixed=rbind(assay_temp_mixed,assay_temp_mixed1)
assay_temp_mixed1=assay_temp[,c("rep","mig_rate","barriers","t_loss_fmk_f2")]
colnames(assay_temp_mixed1)[4]="t_loss"
assay_temp_mixed1$rep=assay_temp_mixed1$rep+10
assay_temp_mixed1$sex="F"
assay_temp_mixed=rbind(assay_temp_mixed,assay_temp_mixed1)

assay_temp_mixed$barriers=factor(as.character(assay_temp_mixed$barriers),levels=c("neu","LA","MC","DMI","LA+MC","LA+DMI","MC+DMI","all"))

assay_temp_mixed$mig_rate=paste("m =",assay_temp_mixed$mig_rate)
assay_temp_mixed$mig_rate=factor(assay_temp_mixed$mig_rate,levels=c("m = 0","m = 5e-05","m = 5e-04","m = 0.005",  "m = 0.05",   "m = 0.2"))

#pdf("Figure/absolute_time_ad-dis.pdf",width=8,height=6)
ggplot(assay_temp_mixed, aes(x=barriers,y=t_loss,col=sex, fill=sex,grp=sex))+geom_boxplot()+facet_wrap(~mig_rate)+theme_bw()+theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 0.5, hjust=0.5))+scale_fill_manual(values = c("purple","orange"))+scale_colour_manual(values = c("purple4","darkorange4"))+xlab("Genetic barriers")+ylab("Mean sojourn time")+coord_cartesian(ylim=c(0,50))+geom_abline(intercept = 2,slope=0)
#dev.off()
```
