### Both life cycle together
Subset data for the relative sojourn time 
```{r compute relative mean time both life cycle}
assay_temp=assay_all[(assay_all$ep_FL==2&assay_all$initial_cost==100&assay_all$initial_pref==1&assay_all$origin=="Ancestral"&assay_all$nb_trials==1000&assay_all$nb_dmi==50&assay_all$life_cycle=="mig-sel"&assay_all$mig_rate %in% c(0,0.0005,0.05,0.2)),]
display_constant_assay(assay_temp)

assay_all_temp=compute_relative_mean_sojourn_time(assay_temp,var = "mig_rate")
assay_all_temp1=assay_all_temp[assay_all_temp$background=="neu",]
assay_all_temp1$life_cycle="mig-sel"

assay_temp=assay_all[(assay_all$ep_FL==2&assay_all$initial_cost==100&assay_all$initial_pref==1&assay_all$origin=="Ancestral"&assay_all$nb_trials==1000&assay_all$nb_dmi==50&assay_all$life_cycle=="sel-mig"&assay_all$mig_rate %in% c(0,0.0005,0.05,0.2)),]
display_constant_assay(assay_temp)

assay_all_temp=compute_relative_mean_sojourn_time(assay_temp,var = "mig_rate")
assay_all_temp2=assay_all_temp[assay_all_temp$background=="neu",]
assay_all_temp2$life_cycle="sel-mig"

assay_all_temp=rbind(assay_all_temp1,assay_all_temp2)
```

(basis for) Figure 6; Figure S16
```{r figure relative time both life cycle}
assay_all_temp$mig_rate=paste("m =", assay_all_temp$mig_rate)
assay_all_temp$mig_rate=factor(assay_all_temp$mig_rate,levels=c("m = 0","m = 5e-04",  "m = 0.05",   "m = 0.2"))
#pdf("Figure/relative_time.pdf",width=7,height=3.5)
do_plot_decomposition_migpanel_onlyNeu(assay_all_temp,"arith",4)
#dev.off()
#pdf("Figure/relative_time_v2.pdf",width=7,height=3.5)
do_plot_decomposition_migpanel_onlyNeu_V2(assay_all_temp,"arith",4)
#dev.off()


```

Figure absolute time of loss
```{r lgened time}
ggplot(assay_temp_mixed, aes(x=barriers,y=t_loss,col=sex, fill=sex,grp=sex))+geom_boxplot()+facet_wrap(~mig_rate)+theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 0.5, hjust=0.5))+scale_fill_manual(values = c("pink","yellow"))+scale_colour_manual(values = c("purple","orange"))+xlab("Genetic barriers")+ylab("Mean sojourn time")+coord_cartesian(ylim=c(0,50))+geom_abline(intercept = 2,slope=0)
```

Subset data for the relative sojourn time 
```{r compute relative mean time both life cycle all mig rate}
assay_temp=assay_all[(assay_all$ep_FL==2&assay_all$initial_cost==100&assay_all$initial_pref==1&assay_all$origin=="Ancestral"&assay_all$nb_trials==1000&assay_all$nb_dmi==50&assay_all$life_cycle=="mig-sel"),]
display_constant_assay(assay_temp)

assay_all_temp=compute_relative_mean_sojourn_time(assay_temp,var = "mig_rate")
assay_all_temp1=assay_all_temp[assay_all_temp$background=="neu",]
assay_all_temp1$life_cycle="mig-sel"

assay_temp=assay_all[(assay_all$ep_FL==2&assay_all$initial_cost==100&assay_all$initial_pref==1&assay_all$origin=="Ancestral"&assay_all$nb_trials==1000&assay_all$nb_dmi==50&assay_all$life_cycle=="sel-mig"),]
display_constant_assay(assay_temp)

assay_all_temp=compute_relative_mean_sojourn_time(assay_temp,var = "mig_rate")
assay_all_temp2=assay_all_temp[assay_all_temp$background=="neu",]
assay_all_temp2$life_cycle="sel-mig"

assay_all_temp=rbind(assay_all_temp1,assay_all_temp2)
assay_all_temp$mig_rate=paste("m =", assay_all_temp$mig_rate)
assay_all_temp$mig_rate=factor(assay_all_temp$mig_rate,levels=c("m = 0","m = 5e-05","m = 5e-04","m = 0.005",  "m = 0.05",   "m = 0.2"))
```

### Compare link vs unlinked markers
Subset data for the default
```{r select data default case}
assay_temp=assay_all[(assay_all$ep_FL==2&assay_all$initial_cost==100&assay_all$initial_pref==1&assay_all$origin=="Ancestral"&assay_all$nb_trials==1000&assay_all$nb_dmi==50&assay_all$mig_rate %in% c(0,0.0005,0.05,0.2)),]
display_constant_assay(assay_temp)
```

Display correlation between the time of loss of freely recombining marker and th linked marker
```{r figure correlation, fig.height=10, fig.width=8}
#pdf("Figure/correlation_link_vs_FR.pdf")
ggplot(assay_all_temp,aes(x=t_loss_linked,y=t_loss_free))+geom_point()+facet_grid(barriers~mean,scales = "free")+geom_abline(slope=1,intercept=0)+xlab("Mean loss time of a linked marker")+ylab("Mean loss time of a freely recombining marker")
#dev.off()
```
Calculate correlation between sojourn time
```{r calculate correlation sojourn time}
cor_table=NULL
for (i in unique(assay_temp$barriers)){
  cor_table=rbind(cor_table,c(i,cor(c(assay_temp$t_loss_lmk_m1[assay_temp$barriers==i],assay_temp$t_loss_lmk_m2[assay_temp$barriers==i]),c(assay_temp$t_loss_fmk_m1[assay_temp$barriers==i],assay_temp$t_loss_fmk_m2[assay_temp$barriers==i])),cor(c(assay_temp$t_loss_lmk_f1[assay_temp$barriers==i],assay_temp$t_loss_lmk_f2[assay_temp$barriers==i]),c(assay_temp$t_loss_fmk_f1[assay_temp$barriers==i],assay_temp$t_loss_fmk_f2[assay_temp$barriers==i])),  cor(c(assay_temp$th_loss_lmk_m1[assay_temp$barriers==i],assay_temp$th_loss_lmk_m2[assay_temp$barriers==i]),c(assay_temp$th_loss_fmk_m1[assay_temp$barriers==i],assay_temp$th_loss_fmk_m2[assay_temp$barriers==i])),cor(c(assay_temp$th_loss_lmk_f1[assay_temp$barriers==i],assay_temp$th_loss_lmk_f2[assay_temp$barriers==i]),c(assay_temp$th_loss_fmk_f1[assay_temp$barriers==i],assay_temp$th_loss_fmk_f2[assay_temp$barriers==i])), cor(c(assay_temp$tg_loss_lmk_m1[assay_temp$barriers==i],assay_temp$tg_loss_lmk_m2[assay_temp$barriers==i]),c(assay_temp$tg_loss_fmk_m1[assay_temp$barriers==i],assay_temp$tg_loss_fmk_m2[assay_temp$barriers==i])),cor(c(assay_temp$tg_loss_lmk_f1[assay_temp$barriers==i],assay_temp$tg_loss_lmk_f2[assay_temp$barriers==i]),c(assay_temp$tg_loss_fmk_f1[assay_temp$barriers==i],assay_temp$tg_loss_fmk_f2[assay_temp$barriers==i]))))
}
cor_table=as.data.frame(cor_table)
cor_table$V2=as.numeric(cor_table$V2)
cor_table$V3=as.numeric(cor_table$V3)
cor_table$V4=as.numeric(cor_table$V4)
cor_table$V5=as.numeric(cor_table$V5)
cor_table$V6=as.numeric(cor_table$V6)
cor_table$V7=as.numeric(cor_table$V7)
colnames(cor_table)=c("barriers","correlation arithmetic male","correlation arithmetic female","correlation harmonic male","correlation harmonic female","correlation geometric male","correlation geometric female")
kable(cor_table)
```

## Effect of cost on the sojourn time
Subset data for m=0.05 and different cost values
```{r compute relative mean time for different cost values}
assay_temp=assay_all[(assay_all$ep_FL==2&assay_all$mig_rate==0.05&assay_all$initial_pref==1&assay_all$origin=="Ancestral"&assay_all$nb_trials==1000&assay_all$nb_dmi==50&assay_all$life_cycle=="sel-mig"),]
display_constant_assay(assay_temp)

assay_all_temp=compute_relative_mean_sojourn_time(assay_temp,var = "initial_cost",merge_tag = TRUE)
```



Display effect of cost on the relative time 
```{r figure relative time as a function of the cost}
#pdf("Figure/relative_time_cost.pdf",width=8,height=6)
do_plot_decomposition(assay_all_temp,"arith")
do_plot_decomposition(assay_all_temp,"harm")
do_plot_decomposition(assay_all_temp,"geom")
#dev.off()
```


## Analysis of "predefined" population
Through the simulations, we let the two populations evolved. As a consequence, we also created ad-hoc populations where all barriers have roughly the same strength. In particular, it means that the extrinsic fitness of a migrant individual (adapted to the alternative environment) is about 10% (for example) of a resident individual, the intrinsic fitness of a F1 individual between 2 individuals adapted to their own environment and the probability that an individual adapted to an environment mate with one adapted to the other environment is also 10%.

Select data corresponding to these ad-hoc populations.
```{r subset data all percent cenario}
assay_temp_sm=assay_all[assay_all$ep_dmi==0&assay_all$ep_dmi_eval %in% c(0,0.045,0.088,0.0138) & assay_all$fit_alt_eval %in% c(1,0.1,0.01,0.5)&assay_all$fit_alt %in% c(0.01,0.1,0.5)&assay_all$life_cycle=="sel-mig",]
display_constant_assay(assay_temp_sm)
assay_all_temp_sm=compute_relative_mean_sojourn_time(assay_temp_sm,"fit_alt",TRUE)


assay_temp_ms=assay_all[assay_all$ep_dmi==0&assay_all$ep_dmi_eval %in% c(0,0.045,0.088,0.0138) & assay_all$fit_alt_eval %in% c(1,0.1,0.01,0.5)&assay_all$fit_alt %in% c(0.01,0.1,0.5)&(assay_all$life_cycle=="mig-sel"|(assay_all$life_cycle=="sel-mig"&assay_all$barriers=="neu")),]
display_constant_assay(assay_temp_ms)
assay_all_temp_ms=compute_relative_mean_sojourn_time(assay_temp_ms,"fit_alt",TRUE)
```

### Adult dispersal
Display relative strength of the reproductive isolation barrier, for the ad-hoc simulations: all barriers have a strength of 50% (purple), 10% (red) and 1% (cyan) for the arithmetic mean for adult dispersal. Figure S19B
```{r display adhoc case barrier arithmetic}
#pdf("Figure/barriers_relative_strength_all_percent_sel_mig.pdf",width=8,height=6)
do_plot_decomposition(assay_all_temp_sm ,"arith")
#dev.off()
```
Display relative strength of the reproductive isolation barrier, for the ad-hoc simulations: all barriers have a strength of 50% (purple), 10% (red) and 1% (cyan) for the harmonic mean for adult dispersal. 
```{r display adhoc case barrier harmonic}
do_plot_decomposition(assay_all_temp_sm ,"harm")
```

Display relative strength of the reproductive isolation barrier, for the ad-hoc simulations: all barriers have a strength of 50% (purple), 10% (red) and 1% (cyan) for the geometric mean for adult dispersal. 
```{r display adhoc case barrier geometric}
do_plot_decomposition(assay_all_temp_sm ,"geom")
```

### Juvenile dispersal
Display relative strength of the reproductive isolation barrier, for the ad-hoc simulations: all barriers have a strength of 50% (purple), 10% (red) and 1% (cyan) for the arithmetic mean for juvenile dispersal. Figure S19A
```{r display adhoc case barrier arithmetic juvenile dispersal}
#pdf("Figure/barriers_relative_strength_all_percent_mig_sel.pdf",width=8,height=6)
do_plot_decomposition(assay_all_temp_ms ,"arith")
#dev.off()
```

Display relative strength of the reproductive isolation barrier, for the ad-hoc simulations: all barriers have a strength of 50% (purple), 10% (red) and 1% (cyan) for the harmonic mean for juvenile dispersal. 
```{r display adhoc case barrier harmonic juvenile dispersal}
do_plot_decomposition(assay_all_temp_ms ,"harm")
```

Display relative strength of the reproductive isolation barrier, for the ad-hoc simulations: all barriers have a strength of 50% (purple), 10% (red) and 1% (cyan) for the geometric mean for juvenile dispersal. 
```{r display adhoc case barrier geometric juvenile dispersal}
do_plot_decomposition(assay_all_temp_ms ,"geom")
```


## Strength of relative barrier when mutation rates are asymmetric
Load data measure of barrier strength for simulations with asymmetric mutation rate
```{r load data assay with different back mutation}
if(load_from_raw_file&hasRawAssayFile){
  assay_all_bm=rbind(rep(NA,length(colnames_assay_geom)),rep(NA,length(colnames_assay_geom)))
  colnames(assay_all_bm)=colnames_assay_geom
  assay_all_bm=as.data.frame(assay_all_bm)
  
  setwd("./../multiloci_backmu/")
  for (i in list.files(pattern="assays_",recursive = TRUE)){
    
    assay_all_bm=load_RI_measure_geom(i,assay_all_bm)
    
  }
  
  assay_all_bm=assay_all_bm[-c(1,2),]
  assay_all_bm=as.data.frame(assay_all_bm)
  
  assay_all_bm$scenario=as.factor(list_scenario[assay_all_bm$scenario])
  
  
  assay_all_bm$origin=as.factor(list_origin[(assay_all_bm$origin+1)])
  assay_all_bm$barriers=as.factor(list_scenario[assay_all_bm$barriers])
  assay_all_bm$life_cycle=as.factor(list_life_cycle[(assay_all_bm$life_cycle+1)])
  
  assay_all_bm$prop_suc_mat_m1=assay_all_bm$nb_offspring_m1_mean/(assay_all_bm$nb_mating_m1_mean+(1000-assay_all_bm$nb_offspring_m1_mean)*1000)
  assay_all_bm$prop_suc_mat_m2=assay_all_bm$nb_offspring_m2_mean/(assay_all_bm$nb_mating_m2_mean+(1000-assay_all_bm$nb_offspring_m2_mean)*1000)
  assay_all_bm$prop_suc_mat_f1=assay_all_bm$nb_offspring_f1_mean/(assay_all_bm$nb_mating_f1_mean+(1000-assay_all_bm$nb_offspring_f1_mean)*1000)
  assay_all_bm$prop_suc_mat_f2=assay_all_bm$nb_offspring_f2_mean/(assay_all_bm$nb_mating_f2_mean+(1000-assay_all_bm$nb_offspring_f2_mean)*1000)
  
  write.table(assay_all_bm,"summary_assay_bm.csv")
}

```


```{r load data assay back mutation}
assay_all_bm=read.table("summary_assay_bm.csv",header=T)
assay_all_bm$origin=as.factor(assay_all_bm$origin)
assay_all_bm$life_cycle=as.factor(assay_all_bm$life_cycle)
assay_all_bm$scenario=as.factor(assay_all_bm$scenario)
assay_all_bm$barriers=as.factor(assay_all_bm$barriers)
```

Compute relative mean sojourn time of mutation
```{r compute relative mean time for cases with back mutation}
assay_all_bm_temp=compute_relative_mean_sojourn_time(assay_all_bm,"fit_alt",TRUE)
```

Display sojourn time for the simulations with asymmetric mutation rate and using the arithmetic mean
```{r Figure relative sojourn time with asymmetric mutation rate and arithmetic mean}
do_plot_decomposition(assay_all_bm_temp ,"arith")
```
Display sojourn time for the simulations with asymmetric mutation rate and using the harmonic mean
```{r Figure relative sojourn time with asymmetric mutation rate and harmonic mean}
do_plot_decomposition(assay_all_bm_temp ,"harm")
```

Display sojourn time for the simulations with asymmetric mutation rate and using the geometric mean
```{r Figure relative sojourn time with asymmetric mutation rate and geometric mean}
do_plot_decomposition(assay_all_bm_temp ,"geom")
```

# Make and edit mutations files
```{r make and edit genetic map file}
if(FALSE){
  #load the "default map" to add a second trait for the "neutral" dispaly map
  dmi_pos=read.table("save_mutations_file/mutations_500L_1D_var0d05_50DMI.txt")
  v1=dmi_pos[1:5]
  v2=dmi_pos[6:505]
  v2bis=signif(rnorm(500,0,0.05),6)
  v3=dmi_pos[506:606]
  
  v1[2]=2
  p_v2=unlist(sapply(seq(2,1001,1), function(x) if(x%%2==0){v2[x%/%2]}else{v2bis[x%/%2]} ))
  final_v=c(v1,p_v2,v3)
  write.table(paste(final_v, collapse=" "),"Ind_MC_mutations_500L_1D_var0d05_50DMI.txt")
  
  
  dmi_pos2=read.table("./../miltiloci_IndMC/Ind_MC_mutations_500L_1D_var0d05_50DMI.txt")
  
  dmi_pos=read.table("save_mutations_file/mutations_800L_1D_var0d05_50_neu_DMI_upd.txt")
  v1=dmi_pos[1:5]
  v2=dmi_pos[6:805]
  v3=dmi_pos[806:905]
  
  dmi_pos2=read.table("save_mutations_file/mutations_800L_1D_var0d05_200_neu_DMI_ntwk50L.txt")
  u1=dmi_pos2[1:5]
  u2=dmi_pos2[6:805]
  u3=dmi_pos2[806:906]
  
  
  load_metrics(i,data_mc)
  
  
  setwd("./../miltiloci_IndMC/")
  
  load_metrics_mc(i,data_mc)
}
```

# separate mate choice
```{r select data starting conditions  - neutral display}
#select data with neutral mate choice
data_mc=data_all[data_all$nb_dim==2,]# Note that this filter works because of the data simulated - not due to some specific indicators.
data_temp=data_mc[data_mc$ep_dmi==0.1,]
data_temp$origin=as.character(data_temp$origin)
data_temp$origin[data_temp$origin=="Diverged SC"&data_temp$initial_pref==0.0001]="SC + initial mate choice"


data_temp$origin[data_temp$origin=="Diverged SC"]="SC"
data_temp$origin=as.factor(data_temp$origin)
```

Effect of mate choice based on a neutral mating cue Figure S11
```{r figure ind mc effect of starting conditions  - neutral display}
#pdf("Figure/effect_of_migration_idMC.pdf",width=7,height=3.5)

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pref_m1,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(mig_rate)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(origin),ncol = 4,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+theme_bw()+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean choosiness")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pref_m1,group=mig_rate),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=hcl.colors(5,"Plasma"))+coord_trans(y="log10")+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")+scale_y_continuous(labels=c(1,0.1,0.01,0.001),breaks=c(1,0.1,0.01,0.001))+theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = -.04, vjust = -7))+labs(title="B/")+labs(col="Migration rate")

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m1_DI,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(mig_rate)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(origin),ncol = 4,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme_bw()+theme(legend.position = c(0.75,0.09),legend.direction = "horizontal")+ylab("Mean phenotypic value for\n trait udner ecological selection")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m1_DI,group=mig_rate),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=hcl.colors(5,"Plasma"))+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")+theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = -.04, vjust = -7))+labs(title="A/")+labs(col="Migration rate")#+geom_hline(aes(yintercept = opt_one_DI*(1-mig_rate)+opt_two_DI*(mig_rate)),linetype="dashed",col="black")


ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m1_DII,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(mig_rate)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(origin),ncol = 4,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme_bw()+theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean phenotype")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m1_DII,group=mig_rate),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=hcl.colors(5,"Plasma"))+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")+theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = -.04, vjust = -7))+labs(title="D/")+labs(col="Migration rate")


ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=abs(pheno_m1_DII-pheno_m2_DII),symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(mig_rate)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(origin),ncol = 4,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme_bw()+theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean phenotypic distance for\n the trait acting as mating cue")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=abs(pheno_m1_DII-pheno_m2_DII),group=mig_rate),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=hcl.colors(5,"Plasma"))+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")+theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = -.04, vjust = -7))+labs(title="D/")+labs(col="Migration rate")

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-F1_m1f2,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(mig_rate)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(origin),ncol = 4,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+theme_bw()+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean hybrid load")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-F1_m1f2,group=mig_rate),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=hcl.colors(5,"Plasma"))+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")+labs(col="Migration rate")

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=fit_eco_m1,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(mig_rate)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(origin),ncol = 4,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme_bw()+theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean ecological fitness")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=fit_eco_m1,group=mig_rate),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=hcl.colors(5,"Plasma"))+coord_trans(y="log10")+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")+scale_y_continuous(labels=c(1,0.75,0.1,0.01,0.001),breaks=c(1,0.75,0.1,0.01,0.001))+labs(col="Migration rate")

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2),symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(mig_rate)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~as.factor(origin),ncol = 4,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+ theme_bw()+theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean corrected hybrid load")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2),group=mig_rate),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=hcl.colors(5,"Plasma"))+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")+theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = -.04, vjust = -7))+labs(title="C/")+labs(col="Migration rate")


#data_temp2=data_temp[data_temp$mig==0.2,]
#ggplot(data_temp2,aes(x=pheno_m1_DI,y=1-(2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2),symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(mig_rate)))+geom_path()+facet_wrap(~as.factor(rep),ncol = 4,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+theme(legend.position = "none")+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple"))

#ggplot(data_temp2,aes(x=log10(pref_m1),y=1-(2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2),symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(mig_rate)))+geom_path()+facet_wrap(~as.factor(rep),ncol = 4,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+theme(legend.position = "none")+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple"))

#dev.off()
```

Trajectories of mate choice and hybrid load
```{r figure ind mc xy trajectories  - neutral display}

data_temp=data_mc[data_mc$origin=="Diverged SC"&data_mc$ep_dmi==0.1,]


data_temp2=data_temp[data_temp$mig_rate>=0.05,]
ggplot(data_temp2,aes(x=pheno_m1_DI,y=1-(2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2),symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(initial_pref)))+geom_path()+facet_wrap(~as.factor(rep),ncol = 4,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+theme(legend.position = "none")+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple"))

ggplot(data_temp2,aes(x=log10(pref_m1),y=1-(2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2),symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(initial_pref)))+geom_path()+facet_wrap(~as.factor(rep),ncol = 4,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+theme(legend.position = "none")+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple"))

ggplot(data_temp2[data_temp2$initial_pref<1,],aes(x=log10(pref_m1),y=1-(2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2),symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(mig_rate)))+geom_path()+facet_wrap(~as.factor(rep),ncol = 4,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+theme(legend.position = "none")+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple"))
```

Effect of epistasis (of DMI) for a neutral mate choice trait  Figure S22
```{r figure ind mc epistasis  - neutral display}
#pdf("Figure/effect_of_migration_idMC_diff_ep.pdf",width=7,height=3.5)
data_temp=data_mc[data_mc$initial_pref<1&data_mc$mig_rate==0.2,]
ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pref_m1,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(ep_dmi)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~paste("epsilon=",ep_dmi),ncol = 4,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+theme_bw()+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean choosiness")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pref_m1,group=ep_dmi),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=hcl.colors(4,"Plasma"))+coord_trans(y="log10")+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")+scale_y_continuous(labels=c(1,0.1,0.01,0.001),breaks=c(1,0.1,0.01,0.001))+theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = -.04, vjust = -7))+labs(title="B/")+labs(col="Epistasis")

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m1_DI,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(ep_dmi)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~paste("epsilon=",ep_dmi),ncol = 4,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+theme_bw()+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean phenotypic value for\n trait udner ecological selection")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m1_DI,group=ep_dmi),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=hcl.colors(4,"Plasma"))+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")+theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = -.04, vjust = -7))+labs(title="A/")+labs(col="Epistasis")


ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m1_DII,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(ep_dmi)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~paste("epsilon=",ep_dmi),ncol = 4,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+theme_bw()+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean phenotype")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=pheno_m1_DII,group=ep_dmi),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=hcl.colors(4,"Plasma"))+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")+theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = -.04, vjust = -7))+labs(title="D/")+labs(col="Epistasis")


ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=abs(pheno_m1_DII-pheno_m2_DII),symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(ep_dmi)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~paste("epsilon=",ep_dmi),ncol = 4,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+theme_bw()+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean phenotypic distance for\n the trait acting as mating cue")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=abs(pheno_m1_DII-pheno_m2_DII),group=ep_dmi),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=hcl.colors(4,"Plasma"))+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")+theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = -.04, vjust = -7))+labs(title="D/")+labs(col="Epistasis")

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-F1_m1f2,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(ep_dmi)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~paste("epsilon=",ep_dmi),ncol = 4,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+theme_bw()+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean hybrid load")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-F1_m1f2,group=ep_dmi),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=hcl.colors(4,"Plasma"))+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")+labs(col="Epistasis")

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=fit_eco_m1,symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(ep_dmi)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~paste("epsilon=",ep_dmi),ncol = 4,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+theme_bw()+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean ecological fitness")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=fit_eco_m1,group=ep_dmi),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=hcl.colors(4,"Plasma"))+coord_trans(y="log10")+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")+scale_y_continuous(labels=c(1,0.75,0.1,0.01,0.001),breaks=c(1,0.75,0.1,0.01,0.001))+labs(col="Epistasis")

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2),symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(ep_dmi)))+geom_line(alpha=0.4)+facet_wrap(~paste("epsilon=",ep_dmi),ncol = 4,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+theme_bw()+ theme(legend.position = "none")+ylab("Mean corrected hybrid load")+xlab("Time (in N generations)")+stat_summary(aes(x=generations/nb_ind,y=1-(2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2),group=ep_dmi),fun.y=mean,geom = "line",size=1)+scale_color_manual(values=hcl.colors(4,"Plasma"))+scale_x_continuous(name="Time (in N generations)")+theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = -.04, vjust = -7))+labs(title="C/")+labs(col="Epistasis")


#data_temp2=data_temp[data_temp$mig==0.2,]
#ggplot(data_temp2,aes(x=pheno_m1_DI,y=1-(2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2),symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(mig_rate)))+geom_path()+facet_wrap(~as.factor(rep),ncol = 4,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+theme(legend.position = "none")+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple"))

#ggplot(data_temp2,aes(x=log10(pref_m1),y=1-(2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2),symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(mig_rate)))+geom_path()+facet_wrap(~as.factor(rep),ncol = 4,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+theme(legend.position = "none")+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple"))

#dev.off()
```

#data_temp=data_mc[data_mc$origin=="Diverged SC"&data_mc$ep_dmi==0.1,]
data_temp=data_temp[data_temp$ep_dmi==0.3,]

#data_temp2=data_temp[data_temp$mig==0.2,]
ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=pheno_m1_DI,y=1-(2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2),symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(ep_dmi)))+geom_path()+facet_wrap(~as.factor(rep),ncol = 4,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+theme(legend.position = "none")+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple","black"))

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=pheno_m1_DII,y=1-(2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2),symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(ep_dmi)))+geom_path()+facet_wrap(~as.factor(rep),ncol = 4,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+theme(legend.position = "none")+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple","black"))

ggplot(data_temp,aes(x=log10(pref_m1),y=1-(2*F1_m1f2)/(fit_dmi_m1+fit_dmi_f2),symbol=as.factor(rep),col=as.factor(ep_dmi)))+geom_path()+facet_wrap(~as.factor(rep),ncol = 4,labeller = labeller(mig_rate=c("m=0","m=0.005","m=0.05","m=0.2")))+theme(legend.position = "none")+scale_color_manual(values=c("orange","purple","black"))
